If you do not we'll have to suspend API access.\n\nPlease don't use the Remote OK logo without written permission as it's a registered trademark, please DO use our name Remote OK though."},{"slug":"remote-proposal-manager-linkedin-1134548","id":"1134548","epoch":1783350488,"date":"2026-07-06T15:08:08+00:00","company":"LinkedIn","company_logo":"","position":"Proposal Manager","tags":["exec","design","saas","technical","customer support","dev","marketing","content writing","legal","sales","golang","digital nomad"],"description":"<p>LinkedIn is the world's largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. We're also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture that's built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun \u00e2\u0080\u0093 where everyone can succeed.<br><br><\/p><p>Join us to transform the way the world works.<br><br><br><br><\/p><strong>Job Description<br><br><\/strong><p>At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is remote, meaning it will be performed from the designated home work location upon time of hire, and any changes to this home work location requires a review of remote status and approval. <br><br><\/p><p>Are you looking to become an indispensable asset to our global sales team \u00e2\u0080\u0094 one who regularly saves the day with a creative knack for building strategic, well-positioned sales proposals? At LinkedIn, the Proposal Manager serves as the hub for each pursuit, injecting strategy, solutions knowledge, and process into the fast-moving, high wire act known as proposal development. As a core part of the global Deal Desk team, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll get to own proposal development, from content creation and design to cross-functional coordination with SMEs and LinkedIn leadership. The ideal candidate will instill confidence throughout the pre-sale process with an ability to craft compelling content, a fierce dedication to the highest quality at every level, a team-driven mindset to partner with the sales opportunity owner, and the ability to manage a high volume of proposals on a flexible schedule to drive success on a global scale.<br><br><\/p><p>Responsibilities:<br><br><\/p><ul><li>Own pre-sale proposal development from end-to-end \u00e2\u0080\u0094 strategy, project management, writing, editing, and delivery<\/li><li>Management of deliverables in response to proactive proposal requests, RFPs, RFIs, RFQs, PQQs, etc. <\/li><li>Become an expert on LinkedIn SaaS solutions, including messaging and positioning, product\/technical details, competition, methodology, and sales offering (products include LinkedIn Sales Navigator, LinkedIn Learning, LinkedIn Hiring Solutions, and more)<\/li><li>Forge relationships with subject matter experts to continually build a shared repository of knowledge and content<\/li><li>Serve as the go-to point person for agile proposal support across multiple time zones<\/li><li>Collaborate with a broad team on creative tasks surrounding topics that stretch the limits of your comfort zone<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><p><strong>Basic Qualifications:<br><br><\/strong><\/p><ul><li>4+ years direct experience supporting similar pre-sale and proposal efforts<\/li><li>Flexible schedule to accommodate occasional meetings outside of 9-5 hours<br><br><\/li><\/ul><p><strong>Preferred Qualifications:<br><br><\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Experience in a SaaS-based environment<\/li><li>Experience supporting pre-sale and proposal \/ bid response efforts<\/li><li>Superior writing and editing skills. Must be able to write and edit concisely, with an ability to quickly grasp and communicate technical concepts. <\/li><li>Strong sense of ownership over a flawless proposal product, including attention to detail, commitment to deadlines, and a customer-service orientation<\/li><li>Strong ability to problem-solve and exercise judgment on a regular basis with minimal oversight<\/li><li>Highly responsive \u00e2\u0080\u0094 hungry to meet compressed timelines and multiple, concurrent projects<\/li><li>Excellent computer software skills (MS Office, OneDrive, Google Suite, Adobe InDesign, MS Dynamics); ability to adapt to new, technology-driven tools and processes<\/li><li>Experience \/ familiarity with LinkedIn products is seen as a benefit<\/li><li>Fluency in a language other than English is seen as a benefit<\/li><li>Proposal management software experience is seen as a benefit<\/li><li>Collaborative team player with excellent listening, communication, and organizational skills<\/li><li>The personality to dream big, get the job done, and have fun!<br><br><\/li><\/ul><p><strong>Suggested Skills: <br><br><\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Writing and editing<\/li><li>Project management<\/li><li>Software savvy<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Additional Information<br><br><\/strong><p><strong>India Disability Policy <br><br><\/strong><\/p><p>LinkedIn is an equal employment opportunity employer offering opportunities to all job seekers, including individuals with disabilities. For more information on our equal opportunity policy, please visit https:\/\/legal.linkedin.com\/content\/dam\/legal\/Policy_India_EqualOppPWD_9-12-2023.pdf<br><br><\/p><br><p><strong>Global Data Privacy Notice and Compliance Posters for Job Candidates <br><br><\/strong><\/p><p>Please use this link to access documents that provide information about how LinkedIn handles the personal data of employees and job applicants, as well as the E-Verify Participation Notice and the Department of Justice Immigrant and Employee Rights Section Right to Work posters: https:\/\/www.linkedin.com\/legal\/candidate-portal.<br><br><\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **PALATIAL** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a partnership opportunity for execution-minded professionals who want to grow beyond employment, build influence, support client delivery, and create additional income part-time.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>The goal is to train and position 10 Agile Revenue Partners as trusted support resources for HSI client work, coaching programs, implementation projects, business transformation engagements, and future revenue opportunities.<\/p><p><br><\/p><strong>About HSI<\/strong><p>Holliday Systems Inc. helps entrepreneurs, small businesses, nonprofits, private offices, and growing organizations improve execution, systems, revenue operations, and business delivery.<\/p><p>HSI combines Agile delivery experience, business coaching, implementation support, automation tools, CRM systems, content strategy, and accountability to help clients move faster and execute with discipline.<\/p><p><br><\/p><strong>Who This Is For<\/strong><p>This opportunity is ideal for:<\/p><p>Scrum Masters<\/p><p>Agile Coaches<\/p><p>Agile Delivery Leads<\/p><p>Project Managers<\/p><p>Program Managers<\/p><p>Business Analysts<\/p><p>Product Owners<\/p><p>Consultants<\/p><p>Veterans with Agile, leadership, or operations experience<\/p><p>Professionals looking to grow into coaching, consulting, or implementation work<\/p><p>You do not need to have everything figured out. You do need to be coachable, professional, reliable, and willing to learn how HSI serves clients.<\/p><p><br><\/p><strong>What You Will Support<\/strong><p>As an Agile Revenue Partner, you may support HSI with:<\/p><p>Client onboarding and discovery support<\/p><p>Agile coaching and facilitation<\/p><p>Business execution sessions<\/p><p>CRM and workflow implementation support<\/p><p>Meeting facilitation and follow-up<\/p><p>Project tracking and delivery support<\/p><p>Client accountability check-ins<\/p><p>Documentation, SOPs, and process improvement<\/p><p>Training sessions and group coaching support<\/p><p>Business growth and implementation projects<\/p><p>Partner outreach and client relationship support<\/p><p>The purpose of this role is to help HSI serve more clients while giving qualified partners a real pathway to earn, grow, and become part of the broader HSI implementation ecosystem.<\/p><p><br><\/p><strong>What You Will Learn<\/strong><p>Partners will receive training and exposure around:<\/p><p>HSI\u00e2\u0080\u0099s client delivery model<\/p><p>Business execution systems<\/p><p>Agile consulting outside of corporate jargon<\/p><p>How to support entrepreneurs and small businesses<\/p><p>How to turn Agile knowledge into implementation value<\/p><p>Client communication and facilitation<\/p><p>CRM, automation, and workflow support<\/p><p>Revenue-focused business coaching<\/p><p>How to position yourself as a trusted execution partner<\/p><p>How to create additional income through support, delivery, and implementation work<\/p><p><br><\/p><strong>Ideal Partner Profile<\/strong><p>The right partner is someone who:<\/p><p>Has experience with Scrum, Agile, project delivery, coaching, or operations<\/p><p>Communicates professionally<\/p><p>Can follow through on commitments<\/p><p>Is comfortable working with business owners and teams<\/p><p>Wants to grow beyond a traditional 9\u00e2\u0080\u00935 role<\/p><p>Is interested in part-time income opportunities<\/p><p>Can support client-facing work with excellence<\/p><p>Believes in discipline, execution, systems, and transformation<\/p><p>Is willing to be trained in the HSI way of delivery<\/p><p>Wants to be part of a mission-driven business ecosystem<br><\/p><strong>Preferred Experience<\/strong><p>Experience in one or more of the following is preferred:<\/p><p>Scrum Master experience<\/p><p>Agile coaching experience<\/p><p>Project or program management<\/p><p>Jira, Trello, ClickUp, Asana, or similar tools<\/p><p>GoHighLevel or CRM platforms<\/p><p>Business process improvement<\/p><p>Client success or account management<\/p><p>Training, facilitation, or consulting<\/p><p>Entrepreneurship or small business support<\/p><p>Military leadership or veteran transition experience<\/p><p><br><\/p><strong>Income Opportunity<\/strong><p>This is a part-time partnership opportunity with the potential to create additional income through HSI-supported revenue lanes, client delivery, implementation support, coaching support, and future partner opportunities.<\/p><p>The goal is to position qualified partners to potentially earn meaningful additional income while supporting HSI\u00e2\u0080\u0099s growing client base.<\/p><p>Income is based on participation, performance, client opportunities, delivery capacity, and partner alignment. This is not a guaranteed salary or employment role.<\/p><p><br><\/p><strong>Why This Opportunity Matters<\/strong><p>Many Scrum Masters and Agile Coaches have valuable skills, but they only use those skills inside corporate environments.<\/p><p>HSI is building a bridge for Agile professionals to use their knowledge in the real business world \u00e2\u0080\u0094 helping entrepreneurs, nonprofits, private offices, and growing companies improve execution, build systems, generate leads, serve clients, and scale operations.<\/p><p>This is an opportunity to stop only talking about Agile and start using Agile thinking to help real businesses grow.<\/p><p><br><\/p><strong>Founding Partner Benefit<\/strong><p>The first 10 selected partners will be part of the founding Agile Revenue Partner group.<\/p><p>Founding partners will receive early access to training, positioning, support opportunities, client delivery experience, and future HSI partnership lanes as the program grows.<\/p><p><br><\/p><strong>How to Apply<\/strong><p>If you are a Scrum Master, Agile Coach, Delivery Lead, or Agile professional looking to make additional income part-time while supporting real business transformation, this opportunity may be a strong fit.<\/p><p>HSI is currently reviewing candidates for 10 founding partner spots.<\/p><ul><li>Message directly or apply to learn more about the HSI Agile Revenue Partner Program.<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **APPRECIATIVE** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Your information will be handled in accordance with applicable privacy laws and Accenture's privacy policies and used solely for recruitment-related purposes.<br><br>Submitting this Expression of Interest is entirely voluntary and does not constitute an offer of employment, guarantee consideration for a role, or alter your current application status. At the forefront of innovation in wireless access and transmission, we offer a competitive software portfolio alongside a comprehensive range of professional services across various market domains.<br><br>Our mission is to shape the future through technology, with human capital as the key driver of success in today's fast-paced business environment. Our highly skilled and experienced professionals are instrumental in achieving our ambitious objectives and enhancing our ability to serve customers effectively.<br><br><strong>About the Role:<\/strong>We are seeking a Technical Support Engineer to support our world-class packet microwave and millimeter-wave radio systems, used in front-haul and mobile backhaul transport of 3G\/4G\/5G networks, as well as in fixed wireless access broadband systems. You will work on both customer technical support and field implementation projects across USA, with the base of operations in Texas or Florida.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Provide technical support for wireless systems, addressing customer inquiries and troubleshooting issues related to 4G\/LTE, 5G, and network protocols<\/li><li>Travel to customer sites to supervise the installation of trial systems and train customer's engineers to install and operate our wireless solutions<\/li><li>Manage computer systems and hardware, ensuring optimal performance and security through effective IT support and desktop support practices<\/li><li>Collaborate with team members to resolve complex technical challenges and enhance customer service experiences<\/li><li>Utilize Microsoft Office and SQL for documentation and reporting purposes<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><strong>Required Skills<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Associate or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or Telecommunications or Electrical Engineering<\/li><li>Minimum 5 years proven working experience in Technical Support or Field Engineer Roles in RF systems<\/li><li>Work experience with Microwave systems is highly desirable<\/li><li>Knowledge of RF systems theory<\/li><li>Knowledge of L2\/L3 networking &amp; protocols<\/li><li>US work authorization and residency in the US required<\/li><li>Availability to travel within USA<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Desired Skills (any Of The Following)<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Experience in using network protocol analyzers and traffic generators<\/li><li>Working knowledge of Linux<\/li><li>Knowledge of SQL<\/li><li>Experience with NMS systems<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Personal characteristics<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Strong problem-solving skills, creativity and attention to detail<\/li><li>Results-oriented, able to articulate the reasoning behind decisions and trade-offs<\/li><li>Flexible, with a strong desire to learn and accept new challenges<\/li><li>Stress-tolerant, with ability to adapt to shifting priorities and schedules, able to develop, organize and manage multiple tasks<\/li><li>Self-motivated, with a sense of urgency to meet project goals and schedules while working with minimal supervision<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **RECTIFY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). We are looking for dynamic colleagues who share our passion for technology and care for our planet. Yokogawa wants a diverse, equitable and inclusive culture. We will actively recruit, develop, and promote people from a variety of backgrounds who differ in terms of experience, knowledge, thinking styles, perspective, cultural background, and socioeconomic status. Yokogawa values differences and enables everyone to belong, contribute, succeed, and demonstrate their full potential.<br><br>Are you being referred to one of our roles? In this role, your work will have a direct and measurable impact on the company\u00e2\u0080\u0099s success. By designing and running smart, strategic A\/B tests, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll help increase user acquisition, activation, and retention across our subscription-based learning products. You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll collaborate closely with designers, developers, data analysts, and senior leadership to uncover high-potential growth opportunities and turn insights into real results.<\/p><p><br \/>\u00f0\u009f\u0093\u008d\u00c2\u00a0<strong>100% remote (EMEA)\u00c2\u00a0<\/strong>| \u00e2\u008f\u00b3\u00c2\u00a0<strong>32-40h\/week<\/strong><\/p><p><br \/><\/p><h3>Your Tasks:<\/h3><ul><li><p><strong>Define and implement growth experiments across the funnel \u00e2\u0080\u0094<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0from hypothesis to launch and evaluation.<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>Maintain a clear pipeline of experiments<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0based on impact, effort, and learning value.<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>Collaborate closely with design, engineering<\/strong>, and key\u00c2\u00a0<strong>stakeholders<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0to translate testing concepts into high-quality experiments.<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>Leverage analytics, user research, competitor insights<\/strong>, and best practices to identify opportunities and build strong hypotheses.<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>Share<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0experiment\u00c2\u00a0<strong>results, insights, and learnings<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0transparently with the team and stakeholders to drive alignment and continuous improvement.<\/p><\/li><\/ul><h2 class=\"sc-1npqnwg-4 sc-1npqnwg-5 sc-1uwf3m5-0 sc-1uwf3m5-1 bvUNBQ custom-css-style-job-requirements\">What you bring to the table:<\/h2><div class=\"sc-1fwbcuw-0 dzeKPx\"><ul><li><p>A minimum of<strong>\u00c2\u00a02 \u00e2\u0080\u0093 4+ years of experience<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0in conversion rate optimization (CRO), website optimization, or growth-focused roles.<\/p><\/li><li><p>A\u00c2\u00a0<strong>strong track record<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0of designing and executing experiments that resulted in measurable business outcomes (e.g., increased conversion rates, revenue uplift).<\/p><\/li><li><p>Experience working in\u00c2\u00a0<strong>high-velocity testing<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0environments and a drive to continuously improve experimentation speed without sacrificing quality or learning value.<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>Advanced analytical capabilities<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0with hands-on experience interpreting quantitative data from platforms such as GA4, Amplitude, or Power BI.<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>Strong conceptual thinking<\/strong>, with the ability to structure and prioritize In this role, you will assist with organizing, updating, and maintaining accurate company records and databases while ensuring information is handled efficiently and correctly.<\/p> <p>You will also provide general administrative support across teams, helping to improve workflow and streamline internal processes. Strong computer skills, a willingness to learn, and a keen eye for detail are essential for success in this position.<\/p> <p>This remote opportunity offers flexible working arrangements and the chance to grow within a supportive and dynamic work environment.<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>What You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Be Doing:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Perform data entry and maintain accurate records across internal systems <\/li><li>Update spreadsheets, trackers, and documentation regularly <\/li><li>Organize digital files and ensure information is easy to access <\/li><li>Assist with scheduling, task coordination, and administrative workflows <\/li><li>Monitor and follow up on assigned tasks to ensure completion <\/li><li>Support internal teams by maintaining structured and up-to-date information <\/li><li>Identify and flag missing or inconsistent data for correction <\/li><li>Maintain clear and professional written communication <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>What We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re Looking For:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Strong attention to detail and accuracy <\/li><li>Good organizational and time management skills <\/li><li>Ability to follow instructions and structured workflows <\/li><li>Basic familiarity with tools like Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel <\/li><li>Clear written communication skills <\/li><li>Ability to manage repetitive tasks with consistency <\/li><li>Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment <\/li><li>No prior experience required \u00e2\u0080\u0094 training will be provided <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Tools &amp; Work Environment:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Spreadsheets (Google Sheets \/ Excel) <\/li><li>Internal tracking and documentation systems <\/li><li>Email and communication platforms <\/li><li>Remote collaboration tools (chat and video calls) <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Benefits:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Competitive entry-level compensation <\/li><li>Flexible remote working schedule <\/li><li>Structured onboarding and training support <\/li><li>Opportunities for career growth in administration and operations <\/li><li>Performance-based incentives <\/li><li>Supportive and collaborative remote team environment <\/li><li>Access to learning resources and skill development tools <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Why Join?<\/strong><\/p> <p>This role offers a strong foundation in administrative support and digital operations. You will gain practical experience in data management, task coordination, and workflow organization\u00e2\u0080\u0094skills that are highly transferable across various career paths.<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Keywords:<br><\/strong><br>Administrative assistant \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Entry-level \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Remote role \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Data entry \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Office support \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Task coordination \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Digital organization \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Spreadsheet skills \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Work from home \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Career development<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **EXALT** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Your role is essential in managing schedules, coordinating communications, organizing meetings, and ensuring daily operations run smoothly and efficiently.<\/p> <p>You will play a key part in maintaining organization, improving productivity, and supporting important business decisions. Your professionalism, attention to detail, and ability to manage multiple priorities will contribute directly to the success of both our leadership team and the organization as a whole.<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Job Responsibilities:<\/strong><\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>1) Calendar and Communication Management<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Manage executive calendars, including scheduling meetings, appointments, and reminders<\/li><li>Handle incoming emails and communications, prioritizing and responding when appropriate<\/li><li>Maintain clear and professional communication on behalf of executives<\/li><li>Coordinate internal and external correspondence<\/li><br><\/ul> <p><strong>2) Task and Workflow Coordination<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Track tasks, deadlines, and priorities to ensure timely completion<\/li><li>Organize and follow up on action items from meetings and communications<\/li><li>Assist in managing day-to-day administrative workflows<\/li><li>Ensure all activities are properly documented and tracked<\/li><br><\/ul> <p><strong>3) Meeting and Travel Support<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Coordinate meeting logistics including agendas, materials, and virtual setup<\/li><li>Take notes during meetings and distribute summaries or action items<\/li><li>Arrange travel plans, accommodations, and itineraries when required<\/li><li>Ensure all scheduling aligns with executive priorities<\/li><br><\/ul> <p><strong>4) Documentation and Administrative Support<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Prepare, format, and organize documents, reports, and presentations<\/li><li>Maintain organized digital files and records<\/li><li>Assist with data entry and information management tasks<\/li><li>Ensure documentation is accurate and easily accessible<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Required Qualifications:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Strong verbal and written communication skills in English<\/li><li>Previous administrative, executive assistant, or coordination experience preferred<\/li><li>Excellent organizational and time management abilities<\/li><li>High level of discretion and professionalism when handling sensitive information<\/li><li>Ability to multitask and manage competing priorities<\/li><li>Comfortable using digital tools, calendars, and collaboration platforms<\/li><li>Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills<\/li><li>Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment<\/li><li>Adaptable and responsive to changing priorities<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Benefits Package:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Competitive compensation based on experience<\/li><li>Performance-based incentives and recognition<\/li><li>Flexible remote working environment<\/li><li>Opportunities for professional growth and advancement<\/li><li>Ongoing training and development support<\/li><li>Collaborative and supportive team culture<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p>We are committed to creating a professional and supportive remote environment where you can grow your skills while contributing meaningfully to executive operations.<\/p> If you deliver, you move. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Competitive pay and bonus scheme<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Market-synced pay that respects your craft and location. <\/li><li>Performance-based bonus recognition based on your impact (up to 20%).<\/li><li>Help us build our crew and get paid for it with our high-value referral bonus. Pool tables, table tennis, gaming consoles and an F1 simulator. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>We play fair. As a hands-on generalist, you will own the full employee lifecycle end-to-end, partnering with leadership to build scalable processes and a premier staff experience.<br><br><strong>Key Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>3-5 years of HR experience, with at least 2 years as a generalist owning multiple functions<\/li><li>Required: Strong working knowledge of California and Arizona state employment laws<\/li><li>Desired: Proficiency in Rippling HRIS<\/li><li>Desired: High growth, or start-up experience<\/li><li>Required: Availability for full-time work within Pacific Time Zone business hours<\/li><li>Experience in healthcare or regulated industries is highly preferred<\/li><li>Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience; HR certification (PHR\/SHRM-CP) is a plus<\/li><li>Exceptional communication skills and discretion with confidential information<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Core Responsibilities<br><br><ul><li>Compliance &amp; Payroll: Manage multi-state compliance, own full-cycle payroll in Rippling, and maintain audit-ready records<\/li><li>Talent Acquisition: Drive full-cycle recruiting from JD creation to onboarding top-tier talent<\/li><li>Employee Experience: Administer benefits, design engagement programs, and support professional development<\/li><li>Strategic Partnership: Serve as the primary HR resource for managers, providing coaching on performance and policy<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Compensation &amp; Benefits<br><br><\/strong>We offer a competitive salary of $65,000 - $75,000 plus a comprehensive benefits package including health plans, 401(k), generous PTO, and a remote-first work environment.<br><br>How to Apply<br><br>Ready to make an impact? To apply, please schedule a call via https:\/\/calendly.com\/seasoned-recruitment\/telephone-screening or email your resume to gethired@seasonedrecruitment.com.<br><br><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong>Key Qualifications<br><br><ul><li>3-5 years of HR experience, with at least 2 years as a generalist owning multiple functions<\/li><li>Required: Strong working knowledge of California and Arizona state employment laws<\/li><li>Desired: Proficiency in Rippling HRIS<\/li><li>Desired: High growth, or start-up experience<\/li><li>Required: Availability for full-time work within Pacific Time Zone business hours<\/li><li>Experience in healthcare or regulated industries is highly preferred<\/li><li>Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience; HR certification (PHR\/SHRM-CP) is a plus<\/li><li>Exceptional communication skills and discretion with confidential information<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benefits<br><br><\/strong>Compensation &amp; Benefits<br><br>We offer a competitive salary of $65,000 - $75,000 plus a comprehensive benefits package including health plans, 401(k), generous PTO, and a remote-first work environment.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **REVOLUTIONIZED** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Nashville, Nashville, Tennessee, United States","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-human-resources-generalist-manager-seasoned-recruitment-1134533","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-human-resources-generalist-manager-seasoned-recruitment-1134533"},{"slug":"remote-content-creator-medicomedics-1134523","id":"1134523","epoch":1783280536,"date":"2026-07-05T19:42:16+00:00","company":"medicomedics","company_logo":"","position":"Content Creator","tags":["teaching","education","video","exec","content writing","stats","medical","part time"],"description":"<p><strong>Company Description<\/strong> medicomedics is a digital medical education platform that supports medical students, residents, and healthcare professionals across all stages of training. The team produces high-impact learning content ranging from short, 1-minute explainers to comprehensive lecture series on key subjects such as pathophysiology, pharmacology, and clinical reasoning. MedicoMedics focuses on making complex topics clear, visual, and exam-relevant for learners preparing for exams like USMLE, PLAB, NEET-PG, or reinforcing clinical knowledge. Content is delivered through YouTube and the official website, offering visual, step-by-step breakdowns and curated playlists for clinically focused, exam-ready education. The platform continues to grow its global audience by providing accessible, high-quality medical education.<\/p><p><strong>Role Description<\/strong> The Content Creator role is a part-time, remote position focused on producing engaging, high-quality digital medical education content. Day-to-day responsibilities include researching medical topics, scripting concise explainers and longer-form educational videos, and collaborating with the team to develop clear, visual learning materials aligned with exam and clinical objectives. The Content Creator will adapt complex medical concepts into accessible language, coordinate with editors or designers for visual assets, and optimize content for platforms such as YouTube and the MedicoMedics website. The role also involves reviewing analytics and feedback to refine content, maintaining consistency with MedicoMedics\u00e2\u0080\u0099 educational standards, and meeting agreed-upon production timelines while working independently.<\/p><p><strong>Qualifications<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Strong skills in medical content creation, including the ability to translate complex clinical, pharmacology, and pathophysiology concepts into clear, exam-oriented explanations.<\/li><li>Experience with digital content production, such as scripting videos, creating educational materials, and collaborating on visuals or slide decks for online learning.<\/li><li>Comfort with online platforms and tools used for remote work, including document collaboration, video communication, and basic content management workflows.<\/li><li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, with attention to clarity, structure, and educational impact.<\/li><li>Background in medicine or a related health science field (e.g., medical student, resident, physician, or other healthcare professional) is strongly preferred.<\/li><li>Ability to work independently in a remote setting, manage a part-time schedule, and consistently meet content delivery deadlines.<\/li><li>Familiarity with major medical exams (e.g., USMLE, PLAB, NEET-PG) and current medical education trends is a plus.<\/li><li>Previous experience in teaching, tutoring, or medical education content creation is beneficial.<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **SPIRITED** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). nomad","scrum","jira","education","consulting","marketing","content writing","part time","ecommerce","full time"],"description":"<p>About the job<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Develop and execute U.S. PR strategies aligned with global communications priorities, including brand narrative development, messaging, and reputation initiatives.<\/li><li>Build and maintain strong relationships with top-tier national, business, and trade media, as well as industry experts, analysts, and other influential voices.<\/li><li>Create compelling stories and campaigns that bring Temu\u00e2\u0080\u0099s values, mission, and innovations to life for U.S. audiences.<\/li><li>Collaborate cross-functionally with internal teams and external partners to ensure consistent messaging and impactful execution of communication initiatives.<\/li><li>Monitor media coverage and public sentiment, providing actionable insights and strategic recommendations to internal stakeholders.<\/li><li>Lead localized storytelling efforts that highlight Temu\u00e2\u0080\u0099s value proposition, community impact, and contributions to consumers and sellers.<\/li><li>Serve as a trusted advisor on messaging, narrative framing, and reputational risk for leadership and internal teams.<\/li><\/ul><p><strong>Requirements<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>7+ years of experience in public relations, communications, or media roles, ideally with a focus on e-commerce, retail, technology, internet, or consumer sectors.<\/li><li>Proven track record of media relations with established relationships across major national, business, and trade outlets.<\/li><li>Exceptional writing, storytelling, and message development skills, with the ability to adapt tone and narrative for different audiences and channels.<\/li><li>Demonstrated ability to work cross-functionally in a fast-paced, global environment, collaborating effectively across cultures and time zones.<\/li><li>Strategic thinker with strong analytical skills and the ability to translate insights into actionable communications strategies.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Compensation and Benefits<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Our compensation structure is designed to align with the cost of labor in various geographic markets across the US. The <strong>total salary<\/strong> for this position ranges from $80,000 to $200,000 annually, based on job-related factors such as skills, experience, qualifications, competencies and location.<\/li><li>In addition, you may receive benefits depending on the nature of employment, job position, and work location. The benefits that generally apply to regular, full-time employees include:<\/li><\/ul><p>1. Medical, Dental, and Vision Insurance Coverage<\/p><p>2. Paid Time Off (PTO)<\/p><p>3. Paid Sick Leave (in accordance with applicable state and local laws)<\/p><p>4. 401(k) Plan<\/p><p>The Company reserves the right to modify or change these benefit programs at any time, with or without notice, consistent with applicable law.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Equal Employment Statement<\/strong><\/p><p>At Temu, we are proud to be an employer that builds a diverse community. (\u00e2\u0080\u009cDIVA\u00e2\u0080\u009d) is looking for a Sr. Supply Chain Specialist (12m Maternity Leave Contract) who will be responsible<\/span><\/span><\/span> <span><span><span>supporting inventory management, forecasting, supply chain operations, purchasing, assembly coordination, and internal quality control processes. This role provides analytical insight, operational support, and process improvements to ensure efficient production planning, inventory accuracy, and timely fulfillment across DIVA\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Canadian and U.S. warehouses.<\/span><\/span><\/span> <br><br><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><span><span><span>The Sr. Supply Chain Specialist role is <strong>a 12-month maternity leave contract<\/strong>. The role allows for remote work in <strong>Ontario, Canada only<\/strong>. Travel may be required on occasion. Must be legally eligible for employment and reside in Ontario, Canada. The start date of this position will ideally begin in <strong>late September\/early October of 2026<\/strong>. <br><br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><strong><span>About Us:<br><br><\/span><\/strong><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><span><span><span>Since 2003, DIVA has introduced and onboarded millions of people as they keenly\u00e2\u0080\u0094or\u00e2\u0080\u0094anxiously\u00e2\u0080\u0094discovered reusable period care. Founded by mother-daughter duo Francine Chambers and Carinne Chambers-Saini, DIVA revolutionized the \u00e2\u0080\u009cfeminine hygiene\u00e2\u0080\u009d industry and created the mass market adoption of sustainable period care alternatives. Today, the DIVA brand is synonymous with the menstrual care category, driving change and bringing sustainability to the forefront of new period care innovation.<br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><span><span><span>We are DIVA. <br><br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><span>Founded in 2002, DIVA disrupted the cycle care industry with the DivaCup\u00c2\u00ae, offering a reusable, comfortable, and innovative alternative to disposable menstrual products. As a pioneer in menstrual health and equity, DIVA has spent over two decades challenging taboos, advocating for education, and driving social impact initiatives that improve accessibility to period care worldwide. DIVA\u00e2\u0080\u0099s commitment to conscious wellness extends beyond menstrual care. Guided by science-backed formulations and human-first innovation, DIVA continues to develop vegan, cruelty-free, and premium crafted products that<br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><span>empower individuals to feel informed, confident, and cared for\u00e2\u0080\u0094without stigma.<br><br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><strong><span><span><span>Responsibilities:<br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/strong><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><strong><span>Inventory Management &amp; Forecasting<\/span><\/strong><\/span><\/span><\/span><ul><li><span><span><span><span>Support inventory management, forecasting, and supply chain planning, including MRP, production scheduling, and monthly updates.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span>Monitor reconciliations, inventory counts, and adjustments across multiple warehouses in Canada and the U.S.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span>Assist in defining and tracking departmental KPIs to ensure inventory and supply chain efficiency.<br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><\/ul><span><span><span><strong><span>Production &amp; Assembly Coordination<\/span><\/strong><\/span><\/span><\/span><ul><li><span><span><span><span>Collaborate with Sales and Marketing Communications to align production plans with demand forecasts.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span>Assist with assembly operations, coordinating with manufacturing partners to resolve production, inventory, or quality issues.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span>Participate in monthly production planning meetings with assembly partners (e.g., Unique Global) and provide status updates.<br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><\/ul><span><span><span><strong><span>Purchasing &amp; Vendor Management<\/span><\/strong><\/span><\/span><\/span><ul><li><span><span><span><span>Support purchase orders, vendor quotes, work orders, and raw material approvals, ensuring cost efficiency and timely delivery.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span>Build and maintain relationships with suppliers, monitoring performance and holding vendors accountable for deliverables.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span>Assist with requests for quotes and support sourcing of raw materials as needed.<br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><\/ul><span><span><span><strong><span>Cross-Functional Collaboration<\/span><\/strong><\/span><\/span><\/span><ul><li><span><span><span><span>Partner with Accounting to reconcile MCOG accounts and support financial reporting related to supply chain operations.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span>Develop and maintain standard operating procedures (SOPs) for supply chain and inventory management activities.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span>Support monthly reporting activities related to inventory and supply chain performance, and assist with proposal purchases for inventory to ensure product availability and alignment with business objectives.<br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><\/ul><span><span><span><strong><span>Quality Assurance Support<\/span><\/strong><\/span><\/span><\/span><ul><li><span><span><span><span>Collaborate with Quality Assurance to support the product realization process, investigate product issues, and implement corrective and preventative actions.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span>Identify opportunities for continual improvement across supply chain and assembly processes.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span>Ensure compliance with DIVA International Inc.\u00e2\u0080\u0099s ISO 13485 Quality Management System and B-Corp standards<\/span><strong><span>.<br><br><\/span><\/strong><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><\/ul><span><span><span><strong><span><span><span>Qualifications:<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/strong><\/span><\/span><\/span><ul><li><span><span><span><span><span><span>3\u00e2\u0080\u00935 years of experience in supply chain, inventory management, or operations analysis, preferably in CPG or regulated industries.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span><span><span>Strong analytical skills with experience in forecasting, MRP systems, and production planning.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span><span><span>Knowledge of inventory control, purchasing, and assembly operations.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span><span><span>Familiarity with quality management systems and regulatory requirements (ISO 13485, FDA, Health Canada).<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span><span><span>Experience working with ERP systems (NetSuite or similar) and Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUP).<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span><span><span>Strong organizational, communication, and problem-solving skills.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span><span><span>Ability to collaborate effectively across departments and with external suppliers.<\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><li><span><span><span><span><span><span>Detail-oriented, proactive, and able to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.<br><br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/li><\/ul><span><span><span><strong><span><span><span>About Our Hiring Process:<br><br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/strong><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><span><span><span>Does this sound like great fit for you?<\/span><\/span><\/span>\u00c2\u00a0<span><span><span> We would love to hear from you.<\/span><\/span><\/span>\u00c2\u00a0\u00c2\u00a0<br><br><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><span><span><span>You can expect us to be curious about who you are, what experiences you have gained to date and what you are looking for in your next opportunity. We know that you are selecting us as an employer just as much as we are inviting you to join our team. We will provide a series of opportunities for us to connect and for you to meet various members of our team. Please ask us questions and let us know how we can support you throughout our hiring process.<br><br><br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><strong><span><span><span>Why work at Diva International?<br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/strong><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><span><span><span>People are the heart and soul of DIVA, sharing our passion to make a meaningful difference in the world.<\/span><\/span><\/span>\u00c2\u00a0<span><span><span> We empower our employees to shatter societal norms and status quo, raise our standards, so we can grow together and make a great company even better.<br><br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><span><span><span>At DIVA, we strive to be a welcoming and safe space for everyone, regardless of their race, national or ethnic origin, colour, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical ability, or any other protected grounds.<\/span><\/span><\/span>\u00c2\u00a0<span><span><span> We welcome employees and candidates from these underrepresented groups to help make this vision a reality.<br><br><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><\/span><span><span><span><span><span><span>Accommodations are available on request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection process. We combine strategy, creativity, and technology to deliver data-driven digital solutions that help our clients grow, engage their audiences, and build stronger brands.<br><br>As our global team continues to grow, we're looking for a <strong>Junior Front-End Developer<\/strong> based in the <strong>MENA region<\/strong> to join us remotely. This is an excellent opportunity for an early-career developer who is passionate about modern web development and eager to build engaging, high-performing digital experiences while working alongside experienced designers, marketers, and developers.<br><br>If you're enthusiastic about clean code, responsive design, and continuous learning, we'd love to meet you.<br><br>What You'll clean, maintainable, and reusable front-end code.<\/li><li>Build digital marketing assets that deliver excellent user experiences across all devices.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Collaboration<br><br><ul><li>Work closely with designers, digital marketers, and project managers to deliver high-quality projects.<\/li><li>Support SEO, conversion optimization (CRO), and performance-focused website improvements.<\/li><li>Participate in team discussions and contribute ideas to improve development workflows.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Performance &amp; Optimization<br><br><ul><li>Optimize websites for speed, accessibility, and cross-browser compatibility.<\/li><li>Ensure responsive performance across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.<\/li><li>Follow front-end best practices for usability, accessibility, and maintainability.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>CMS &amp; Website Management<br><br><ul><li>Maintain and update WordPress websites and other CMS platforms.<\/li><li>Implement content updates, page layouts, and reusable templates.<\/li><li>Assist with ongoing website improvements and feature enhancements.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Quality Assurance<br><br><ul><li>Identify and resolve front-end bugs and visual inconsistencies.<\/li><li>Test websites across browsers and devices to ensure reliable performance.<\/li><li>Help maintain high coding standards and quality across projects.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Continuous Learning<br><br><ul><li>Stay up to date with modern front-end technologies and industry best practices.<\/li><li>Participate in code reviews and collaborate with senior developers.<\/li><li>Continuously improve your technical and problem-solving skills.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>What We're Looking For<br><br><strong>Experience<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>0\u00e2\u0080\u00932 years of front-end development experience, including internships, freelance work, personal projects, or junior roles.<\/li><li>Experience building or contributing to live websites or web applications is an advantage.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Education<br><br><ul><li>Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Web Development, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Technical Skills<br><br><ul><li>Strong understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.<\/li><li>Knowledge of responsive and mobile-first development.<\/li><li>Familiarity with React, Vue.js, or similar front-end frameworks is a plus.<\/li><li>Experience working with WordPress or other CMS platforms.<\/li><li>Basic understanding of SEO-friendly front-end development.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Tools<br><br><ul><li>Experience using Git or other version control systems.<\/li><li>Familiarity with Figma, Adobe XD, or similar design tools.<\/li><li>Basic knowledge of website performance optimization and cross-browser testing.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Soft Skills<br><br><ul><li>Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.<\/li><li>Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.<\/li><li>Comfortable working independently in a remote environment.<\/li><li>Eager to learn, receive feedback, and continuously improve.<\/li><li>Strong organizational and time-management skills.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Nice to Have<br><br><ul><li>Experience with Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, or similar CSS frameworks.<\/li><li>Understanding of WCAG accessibility standards.<\/li><li>Exposure to healthcare, medical, or other regulated industries.<\/li><li>Familiarity with JavaScript build tools and modern development workflows.<\/li><li>Fluency in English; Arabic is a strong advantage.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Why Join PulseMedia?<br><br>Career Growth<br><br><ul><li>Learn from experienced developers, designers, and digital marketers.<\/li><li>Clear progression toward mid-level and full-stack development roles.<\/li><li>Work on meaningful healthcare and wellness projects with international clients.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Remote-First Environment<br><br><ul><li>Fully remote position for candidates based in the MENA region.<\/li><li>Flexible working hours that support work-life balance.<\/li><li>Collaborative, supportive, and remote-friendly culture.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Competitive Benefits<br><br><ul><li>Competitive salary based on experience and skills.<\/li><li>Paid annual leave and public holidays according to your country of residence.<\/li><li>Opportunities for ongoing learning and professional development.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Make an Impact<br><br>At PulseMedia, you'll help create digital experiences that support healthcare providers, medical organizations, and Their digital imaging platforms are used by healthcare sites worldwide and serve as the foundation for next-generation imaging and therapy-guiding applications, combining advanced hardware design with proprietary software and algorithms to deliver imaging at exceptional speed, low radiation dose, and superior image quality.<\/p><p>The company operates with a remote-first US team supported by an international headquarters, offering the opportunity to work in a fast-paced, innovative medtech environment.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><br><\/p><p>Requirement<\/p><ul><li><strong>Experience<\/strong>: 3+ years in an HR Generalist, People Operations, or HR Business Partner role, with a strong focus on full-cycle recruitment<\/li><li><strong>Knowledge<\/strong>: Solid understanding of US federal and state labor laws, payroll basics, and benefits administration<\/li><li><strong>Systems<\/strong>: Familiarity with HRIS platforms<\/li><li><strong>Communication<\/strong>: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with the ability to build trust across all levels<\/li><li><strong>Education<\/strong>: Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field<\/li><li><strong>Global Mindset<\/strong>: Experience working with a remote international headquarters<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p>Responsibilities<\/p><p>Talent Acquisition (Recruitment)<\/p><ul><li><strong>Full-Cycle Recruitin<\/strong>g: Manage the end-to-end recruitment process for various departments, including intake meetings, sourcing, screening, scheduling, interviewing, and offer negotiation<\/li><li><strong>Candidate Experienc<\/strong>e: Ensure a smooth, professional, and positive experience for all candidates throughout the interview process<\/li><li><strong>Pipeline &amp; Sourcin<\/strong>g: Proactively build talent pipelines and source candidates through various channels (LinkedIn, job boards, networking)<\/li><\/ul><p>People Operations &amp; Employee Experience<\/p><ul><li><strong>Onboarding &amp; Offboardin<\/strong>g: Lead the US new-hire orientation process to ensure a welcoming and informative experience. Manage the offboarding procedure<\/li><li><strong>HRIS Managemen<\/strong>t: Maintain and update the HR Information System (HRIS) and electronic personnel records to ensure data integrity and confidentiality<\/li><li><strong>Performance Managemen<\/strong>t: Support and administer the company's performance review cycles, goal setting, and continuous feedback processes<\/li><li><strong>Culture &amp; Engagemen<\/strong>t: Act as a champion of company culture, organizing team events, initiatives, and programs that foster employee engagement and retention<\/li><\/ul><p>Benefits, Compensation &amp; Compliance<\/p><ul><li><strong>Benefits Administratio<\/strong>n: Manage US employee benefits programs (health, 401k, PTO, etc.), including open enrollment and acting as the main point of contact for employee inquiries<\/li><li><strong>Compensatio<\/strong>n: Assist in administering compensation plans and ensuring they remain competitive in the market<\/li><li><strong>HR Complianc<\/strong>e: Maintain deep knowledge of U.S. federal, State, and local employment laws. Ensure company policies, employee handbook, and HR practices are fully compliant and up to date<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **ADVOCATED** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). A holistic financial health company helping everyday Americans build a brighter financial future. With a business model that is aligned with our customers, we create transparent, fair, and simple financial products that put money back in the hands of our members, help them spend wisely, avoid unfair fees and build their credit quickly. If autonomy, ownership, and having meaningful input at the company you work for is important to you, come join our growing team!<\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Brigit is doing innovative and exciting work, but don\u00e2\u0080\u0099t just take our word for it, our work is being recognized by others:<\/p><ul style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><a target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer nofollow\" href=\"https:\/\/builtin.com\/awards\/new-york-city\/2026\/best-midsize-places-to-work#brigit\">Built In's 2026 Best Midsize Companies to Work For in New York City<\/a><\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><a target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer nofollow\" href=\"https:\/\/builtin.com\/awards\/new-york-city\/2025\/best-places-to-work#brigit\"><u>Built In's 2025 Best Places to Work For In New York City<\/u><\/a><\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><a target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer nofollow\" href=\"https:\/\/builtin.com\/awards\/us\/2025\/best-startup-places-to-work#brigit\"><u>Built In\u00e2\u0080\u0099s 2024 &amp; 2025 Best Startups to Work For In the U.S.<\/u><\/a><\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><a target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer nofollow\" href=\"https:\/\/builtin.com\/awards\/new-york-city\/2025\/best-startup-places-to-work#brigit\"><u>Built In\u00e2\u0080\u0099s 2023 - 2025 Best Startups to Work For In New York City<\/u><\/a><\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><a target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer nofollow\" href=\"https:\/\/www.fastcompany.com\/90724459\/most-innovative-companies-personal-finance-2022\"><u>Fast Company\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Most Innovative Companies of 2022<\/u><\/a><\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><a target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer nofollow\" href=\"https:\/\/www.businessinsider.com\/most-promising-consumer-tech-startups-of-2022-8#brigit-a-automated-money-lender-5\"><u>Business Insider\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Most Promising Consumer Startups 2022<\/u><\/a><\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><a target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer nofollow\" href=\"https:\/\/www.forbes.com\/sites\/isabelcontreras\/2022\/06\/07\/the-future-of-personal-finance-fintech-50-2022\/?sh=1fbbd36d5235\"><u>Forbes Fintech 50 2022<\/u><\/a><\/p><\/li><\/ul><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><strong>Role Overview:<\/strong><\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">At Brigit we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re focused on giving the 100M Americans who live paycheck to paycheck access to more affordable financial services and getting them on the path to better financial wellness. As a Data Scientist on our team you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll be responsible for building, improving and maintaining the key ML models that enable our services. The key problem spaces we are focused on are:<\/p><ul style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Identifying credit risk of customers so that we can help more people in need when they need it<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Identify fraud early, so we can focus on customers that rely on us for support<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Optimizing our transaction timing so we aren\u00e2\u0080\u0099t causing our customers to overdraw their accounts.<\/p><\/li><\/ul><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">We have access to rich, structured data that we can use to derive insights and build complex models. In addition to supporting new use cases when needed, you will also have the opportunity to help us stand-up best practices and collaborate across Data Science. Analytics, Product and Engineering teams.<\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><strong>What you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll be doing:<\/strong><\/p><ul style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Build, test and roll out new underwriting and risk models to better predict risk<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll have ownership of the full modeling lifecycle from conception through to production and realize every bit of impact along the way.<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Build, test and roll out new or improved models related to fraud and payments.<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Contribute to building best practices for feature development, model training and model testing and monitoring.<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Analyze how our customer base is shifting as we grow and pinpoint areas we can improve.<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Help our existing engineering and business teams achieve our cross-functional goals.<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Mentor more junior data scientists or aspiring data scientists across the data team.<\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><\/p><\/li><\/ul><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><strong>What you have:<\/strong><\/p><ul style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">6+ years of experience doing data science (modeling + analysis)<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Advanced degree in data science, statistics, computer science, or related field.<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Proven expertise in machine learning principles and techniques<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Experience in Python, using industry-standard modeling toolkits like sklearn, JupyterLab, pandas, matplotlib, statsmodels, etc.<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Experience in writing complex SQL queries and the ability to put together multiple data sources<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Experience creating training data sets, training models, tuning hyperparameters, performing validation, running A\/B tests in production, creating and owning performance and model monitoring<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Experience building classification and prediction models, testing them in a startup environment and iterating to improve their models.<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Ability to work effectively and communicate ideas\/code clearly in a cross functional team environment (Engineering, Product and Business teams)<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Experience building end-to-end data science solutions to address business needs:  from ideation to deployment &amp; AB testing<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain complex concepts to various audiences<\/p><\/li><\/ul><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><strong>Who You Are<\/strong><\/p><ul style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Passionate self-starter who is always looking for ways to optimize, test, and improve<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Ability to operate through ambiguity by asking questions and learning quickly<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Always willing to collaborate and help your colleagues to do their best work.<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Passionate about making a difference in people's lives through your work<\/p><\/li><\/ul><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">The anticipated annual base salary for this position is $185,000 - $215,000 with a 10% annual bonus opportunity. This range does not include any other compensation components or other benefits for which an individual may be eligible. The actual base salary offered depends on a variety of factors, which may include as applicable, the qualifications of the individual applicant for the position, years of relevant experience, specific and unique skills, level of education attained, certifications or other professional licenses held, and the location in which the applicant lives and\/or from which they will be performing the job.<\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><strong>Our Benefits &amp; Team<\/strong><\/p><ul style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Medical, dental, and vision insurance<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Flexible PTO Policy<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">401k plan<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Paid Parental Leave<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Physical and mental wellbeing benefits including Wellhub for access to virtual workouts and discounted gym memberships, and Headspace for covered virtual therapy sessions and unlimited on demand health support<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Monthly reimbursements to use against wifi and cell phone bills<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Annual reimbursement for Learning &amp; Development<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Help hard working Americans build a brighter financial future<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">High-growth company<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">A dynamic, flexible and collaborative start-up work environment with a highly talented team<\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><\/p><\/li><\/ul><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Brigit is committed to providing equal employment opportunities for all applicants and employees without regard to race, religion, color, sex, pregnancy (including breast feeding and related medical conditions), national origin, citizenship status, uniform service member status, age, genetic information, disability, or any other protected status in accordance with all applicable federal, state and local laws. We are proud to be an equal opportunity workplace.<\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">If you require reasonable accommodation in completing an application, interviewing, completing any pre-employment testing, or otherwise participating in the employee selection process, please email accommodations@hellobrigit.com.<\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><\/p><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Disclosures:<\/p><ul style=\"min-height:1.5em\"><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">For information on our data privacy policies, see the <a target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer nofollow\" href=\"https:\/\/www.hellobrigit.com\/careers\/personnel-privacy-policy\">Brigit California Personnel Privacy Policy<\/a>.<\/p><\/li><li><p style=\"min-height:1.5em\">Brigit uses E-Verify for employment authorization. We provide fractional, embedded, human-led support across the functions that quietly keep growing businesses moving. EA and executive support, admin, customer support, operations, bookkeeping and HR.<br><br>We're not a recruitment agency, a consultancy or a software product. We sit in the gap between all three, and that gap is where the real work happens.<br><br>We work alongside founder and operator-led businesses at the moments when they need more capacity, more structure, or more support than they currently have. Our people embed into client businesses and take genuine ownership of the work. No task-ticking, no arm's-length delivery. Just real judgement and follow-through.<br><br>W<strong>hat it's like to work here<br><br><\/strong>We value autonomy and accountability. We are human-first in how we treat our clients, our candidates, and each other. We don't chase growth at the expense of quality, and we don't treat people like resources.<br><br>We are a small, growing team building something we genuinely believe in, and we are looking for people who want to be part of that.<br><br><strong>What We Care About<br><br><\/strong>Good work. Honest relationships. Doing things properly. We use technology and AI intentionally and we never let it replace the human judgement that actually makes the difference. We value calm over chaos, clarity over comfort, and ownership over excuses.<br><br><strong>The Client<br><br><\/strong>Our Client is a growing joinery business that needs virtual admin support to handle the day-to-day volume that comes with expansion.<br><br>This is a hands-on, customer-facing admin role <strong>covering approximately 40 hours per month<\/strong>. You'll be the first point of contact for customers by phone and email, and the person keeping quotes, invoices, and scheduling moving without anything slipping through the cracks.<br><br><strong>What You'll Be Doing<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Managing emails and the general inbox<\/li><li> Handling inbound customer calls and enquiries<\/li><li> Booking appointments and managing scheduling<\/li><li> Preparing and sending out quotes<\/li><li> Raising and sending invoices<\/li><li> General admin support as the business grows<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> UK based, with English as a first language<\/li><li> Experienced in small business admin \u00e2\u0080\u0094 ideally with a background supporting trade, construction, or services businesses where the pace is practical and the work is varied<\/li><li> Comfortable picking up the phone and speaking with customers confidently and professionally<\/li><li> Able to turn around quotes and invoices accurately, without being chased<\/li><li> Organised and reliable \u00e2\u0080\u0094 genuine ownership of a varied workload<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benefits<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> A varied, hands-on role at the centre of a growing business<\/li><li> Practical work with a direct, visible impact day to day<\/li><li> Flexible, remote working within GMT hours<\/li><li> 40 hours per month<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **STEADIEST** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Greater London, ","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-administrative-assistant-pickle-1134486","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-administrative-assistant-pickle-1134486"},{"slug":"remote-founder-ghostwriter-for-a-u-s-based-google-ads-agency-paired-1134487","id":"1134487","epoch":1783175070,"date":"2026-07-04T14:24:30+00:00","company":"Paired","company_logo":"","position":"Founder Ghostwriter for a U.S. based Google Ads Agency","tags":["virtual assistant","embedded","hr","consulting","exec","customer support","dev","marketing","accounting","admin","ops","recruiter","digital nomad","writer","speech","video","ads","content writing","senior","ecommerce"],"description":"Paired is a global staffing and recruiting agency that pairs remote work with top-tier talent. We admire the importance of innovative social media strategies and are committed to connecting talented individuals with great companies that need their unique skills. Our mission is to provide great jobs to gifted people, regardless of location.<br><br><strong>About The Client<br><br><\/strong>Our client is the fastest-growing Google Ads agency in the world. Led by founder and CEO Jem, the agency manages nine figures in annual ad spend across more than 180 eCommerce and DTC brands, powered by direct relationships with Google's product teams and access to alpha and beta features that most agencies never touch. Their strategies aren't public, their standards are exceptionally high, and their results speak for themselves.<br><br>The agency has grown rapidly because of the quality of its work while intentionally maintaining a senior, highly selective team. Their average client retention extends well beyond a year\u00e2\u0080\u0094an uncommon achievement in the industry. Joining the team means working alongside some of the best operators in performance marketing and collaborating directly with a founder whose personal brand is quickly becoming one of the most influential voices in the space.<br><br><strong>About The Role<br><br><\/strong>The voice already exists. It is defined, documented, and unmistakable. Your core focus is scripting LinkedIn and Twitter across every content pillar, at volume, without it ever reading like a content calendar and without it ever reading like AI. From there you will write Instagram video scripts and help shape where the personal brand goes next. This is not a role for someone who needs a brief for every post. It is for a writer who reads the founder's world, catches what is worth saying before anyone else does, helps steer the direction, and says it in his voice better than he would have.<br><br>Key Responsibilities<br><br><ul><li>Script LinkedIn and Twitter in the founder's voice across every content pillar: Google Ads and direct response thought leadership, the ecommerce operator perspective, agency building, business philosophy, and personal brand.<\/li><li>Write Instagram video scripts, and grow into other formats over time.<\/li><li>Help shape the direction and content pillars of the personal brand alongside the founder.<\/li><li>Research what is moving across DTC, direct response, and the wider space, and turn it into timely content before the feed catches up.<\/li><li>Work alongside the content team to keep voice and calendar tight.<\/li><li>Use Claude to produce at volume while knowing the difference between AI leverage and AI slop.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Proven experience ghostwriting for a founder, executive, or personal brand. Portfolio required, this one is non negotiable.<\/li><li>Comfortable writing across platforms and shaping the voice to each: LinkedIn, Twitter, and Instagram video scripts.<\/li><li>Able to help direct a personal brand, not just take orders, and to write confidently across every content pillar.<\/li><li>A real grasp of direct response and what makes a person stop and read.<\/li><li>Native level English is essential. German is a bonus, not a requirement. Content is English only for now.<\/li><li>Daily, fluent use of Claude, already built into how you work.<\/li><li>Strong research instincts. You find the angle before the feed does.<\/li><li>Speed, plus the discipline to kill your own weak drafts before anyone sees them.<\/li><li>Hunger to learn the DTC and Google Ads world if you do not already live in it.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benefits<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Fully remote. Work from anywhere, with flexible hours.<\/li><li>A seat inside a premium agency managing nine figures in ad spend, working a voice most writers will never get access to.<\/li><li>A small, senior, global team with no bureaucracy and no busywork.<\/li><li>Direct access to the founder and to work that actually stretches you.<\/li><li>Weekly personal mentoring directly from the founder himself.<\/li><li>Paid time off.<\/li><li>A wellness bonus.<\/li><li>Team retreats and workations.<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **RESPECTFULLY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Greater London, ","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-founder-ghostwriter-for-a-u-s-based-google-ads-agency-paired-1134487","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-founder-ghostwriter-for-a-u-s-based-google-ads-agency-paired-1134487"},{"slug":"remote-customer-support-recruitlytics-hiring-1134472","id":"1134472","epoch":1783153276,"date":"2026-07-04T08:21:16+00:00","company":"Recruitlytics Hiring","company_logo":"","position":"Customer Support","tags":["design","vfx","designer","technical","dev","marketing","exec","medical","engineer","digital nomad","virtual assistant","education","customer support","video","microsoft","ops","excel","sys admin"],"description":"<p><strong>Customer Support Specialist (Arabic) | Remote<\/strong><\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p>We are actively seeking a detail-oriented <strong>Remote Customer Support (Arabic) Specialist<\/strong> to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for delivering professional and timely support to Arabic-speaking customers through various communication channels.<\/p> <p>You will handle customer inquiries, resolve issues efficiently, and ensure a positive customer experience at every interaction. Strong communication skills in Arabic, excellent problem-solving ability, and attention to detail are essential for success in this remote position. Your contribution will play a key role in maintaining customer satisfaction and supporting the overall growth of our organization.<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Key Responsibilities<\/strong><\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>1) Customer Communication<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Respond to customer inquiries via email, chat, or phone in Arabic (and English if required) <\/li><li>Provide accurate information about products, services, and processes <\/li><li>Maintain clear, professional, and empathetic communication <\/li><br><\/ul> <p><strong>2) Issue Resolution<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Assist customers with troubleshooting and resolving common issues <\/li><li>Identify root causes and guide customers through solutions <\/li><li>Escalate complex or sensitive cases to appropriate teams <\/li><br><\/ul> <p><strong>3) Case Management<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Document all customer interactions in CRM or support systems <\/li><li>Track open cases and follow up to ensure timely resolution <\/li><li>Maintain accurate and up-to-date customer records <\/li><br><\/ul> <p><strong>4) Quality and Service Standards<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Ensure all responses meet company quality and communication standards <\/li><li>Handle complaints with professionalism and empathy <\/li><li>Support continuous improvement by identifying recurring issues <\/li><li>Stay updated on product changes, policies, and procedures <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Required Skills and Qualifications<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Fluency in Arabic multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment <\/li><li>Basic computer skills and familiarity with digital tools <\/li><li>Problem-solving skills and attention to detail <\/li><li>Ability to work independently in a remote setting <\/li><li>Previous customer support experience is a plus <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Technical Requirements<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Reliable systems (preferred) <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>What We Offer<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Competitive compensation <\/li><li>Flexible remote working schedule <\/li><li>Training and
