In this role, you will assist with organizing, updating, and maintaining accurate company records and databases while ensuring information is handled efficiently and correctly.<\/p> <p>You will also provide general administrative support across teams, helping to improve workflow and streamline internal processes. Strong computer skills, a willingness to learn, and a keen eye for detail are essential for success in this position.<\/p> <p>This remote opportunity offers flexible working arrangements and the chance to grow within a supportive and dynamic work environment.<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>What You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Be Doing:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Perform data entry and maintain accurate records across internal systems <\/li><li>Update spreadsheets, trackers, and documentation regularly <\/li><li>Organize digital files and ensure information is easy to access <\/li><li>Assist with scheduling, task coordination, and administrative workflows <\/li><li>Monitor and follow up on assigned tasks to ensure completion <\/li><li>Support internal teams by maintaining structured and up-to-date information <\/li><li>Identify and flag missing or inconsistent data for correction <\/li><li>Maintain clear and professional written communication <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>What We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re Looking For:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Strong attention to detail and accuracy <\/li><li>Good organizational and time management skills <\/li><li>Ability to follow instructions and structured workflows <\/li><li>Basic familiarity with tools like Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel <\/li><li>Clear written communication skills <\/li><li>Ability to manage repetitive tasks with consistency <\/li><li>Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment <\/li><li>No prior experience required \u00e2\u0080\u0094 training will be provided <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Tools &amp; Work Environment:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Spreadsheets (Google Sheets \/ Excel) <\/li><li>Internal tracking and documentation systems <\/li><li>Email and communication platforms <\/li><li>Remote collaboration tools (chat and video calls) <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Benefits:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Competitive entry-level compensation <\/li><li>Flexible remote working schedule <\/li><li>Structured onboarding and training support <\/li><li>Opportunities for career growth in administration and operations <\/li><li>Performance-based incentives <\/li><li>Supportive and collaborative remote team environment <\/li><li>Access to learning resources and skill development tools <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Why Join?<\/strong><\/p> <p>This role offers a strong foundation in administrative support and digital operations. You will gain practical experience in data management, task coordination, and workflow organization\u00e2\u0080\u0094skills that are highly transferable across various career paths.<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Keywords:<br><\/strong><br>Administrative assistant \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Entry-level \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Remote role \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Data entry \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Office support \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Task coordination \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Digital organization \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Spreadsheet skills \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Work from home \u00e2\u0080\u00a2 Career development<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **BRAVERY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"\u00d8\u00a7\u00d9\u0084\u00d9\u0085\u00d8\u00af\u00d9\u008a\u00d9\u0086\u00d8\u00a9, \u00d8\u00a7\u00d9\u0084\u00d9\u0085\u00d8\u00af\u00d9\u008a\u00d9\u0086\u00d8\u00a9 \u00d8\u00a7\u00d9\u0084\u00d9\u0085\u00d8\u00af\u00d9\u008a\u00d9\u0086\u00d8\u00a9 \u00d8\u00a7\u00d9\u0084\u00d8\u00b3\u00d8\u00b9\u00d9\u0088\u00d8\u00af\u00d9\u008a\u00d8\u00a9","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-entry-level-administrative-assistant-recruitlytics-hiring-1134471","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-entry-level-administrative-assistant-recruitlytics-hiring-1134471"},{"slug":"remote-administrative-data-entry-file-clerk-recruitlytics-hiring-1134498","id":"1134498","epoch":1783152432,"date":"2026-07-04T08:07:12+00:00","company":"Recruitlytics Hiring","company_logo":"","position":"Administrative Data Entry File Clerk","tags":["design","saas","embedded","customer support","marketing","analyst","quality assurance","finance","ops","stats","sales","sys admin","medical","engineer","backend","exec","digital nomad","data entry","jira","hr","cloud","admin","excel","legal"],"description":"<p>Dedicated to delivering exceptional service and maintaining organized business operations, our company is seeking a detail-oriented Administrative Data Entry File Clerk to join our team. If you excel at managing records, entering data accurately, and working independently in a remote environment, this opportunity may be the perfect fit for you.<\/p> <p>In this role, you will be responsible for maintaining digital files, updating databases, organizing administrative records, and ensuring information is entered accurately and efficiently. Your attention to detail, reliability, and commitment to data accuracy will play an important role in supporting daily operations and helping our team stay organized and productive.<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Key responsibilities:<\/strong><\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Intake &amp; indexing.<\/strong><\/p> <ul> <li>Receive files from shared inboxes, portals, internal ticketing tools, and cloud folders.<\/li> <li>Confirm document type, required fields, signatures, and attachments.<\/li> <li>Index each record using standard metadata (client\/project ID, date, document category, version, region).<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Document organization.<\/strong><\/p> <ul> <li>Apply standardized naming conventions and folder structures.<\/li> <li>Convert formats when needed (PDF merge\/split, image-to-PDF, compressing, version labeling).<\/li> <li>Maintain controlled libraries (final vs draft vs archived), including retention tags.<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Quality control<\/strong><\/p> <ul> <li>Perform daily spot checks for duplicates, misfiles, missing pages, and unreadable scans.<\/li> <li>Flag exceptions and route them to the correct owner with clear notes.<\/li> <li>Maintain error logs and contribute to process improvements that reduce rework.<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Records governance &amp; compliance<\/strong><\/p> <ul> <li>Handle sensitive records with strict access controls and confidentiality.<\/li> <li>Follow retention schedules, legal hold instructions, and deletion\/archival rules.<\/li> <li>Support audits by pulling records quickly and documenting chain-of-custody steps.<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Collaboration &amp; communication.<\/strong><\/p> <p>Coordinate with HR, Finance, Operations, Legal, or Customer teams to clarify file requirements.<\/p> <p>Provide status updates on backlog, turnaround time, and issues found during processing.<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Tools you may use:<\/strong><\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <ul> <li>Cloud storage (Google Drive\/SharePoint\/Dropbox), document tools (Adobe Acrobat or equivalents), spreadsheets, ticketing (Jira\/Asana\/ServiceNow), e-signature platforms, and basic office productivity tools.<\/li><li><strong>Success metrics (examples):<\/strong><\/li> <li>Accuracy rate (misfile\/metadata error rate)<\/li> <li>Turnaround time from receipt to filed<\/li> <li>Backlog size and daily throughput<\/li> <li>Audit retrieval speed and completeness<\/li> <li>Compliance adherence (access control, retention tagging)<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Qualifications:<\/strong><\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <ul> <li>Experience in records management, admin support, clerical work, or document control (preferred).<\/li> <li>Strong attention to detail; able to follow naming\/filing rules consistently.<\/li> <li>Comfortable handling confidential information and following strict procedures.<\/li> <li>Basic computer proficiency: file systems, spreadsheets, PDFs, and collaboration tools.<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **PINNACLE** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Alberta, Alberta, Canada","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-administrative-data-entry-file-clerk-recruitlytics-hiring-1134498","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-administrative-data-entry-file-clerk-recruitlytics-hiring-1134498"},{"slug":"remote-file-clerk-recruitlytics-hiring-1134495","id":"1134495","epoch":1783152118,"date":"2026-07-04T08:01:58+00:00","company":"Recruitlytics Hiring","company_logo":"","position":"File Clerk","tags":["jira","hr","customer support","finance","cloud","admin","exec","ops","legal"],"description":"<p>As a Remote File Clerk, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll keep digital and scanned records accurate, organized, searchable, and compliant. You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll support multiple teams by receiving documents, validating completeness, applying naming conventions, classifying files into the correct repositories, and maintaining an audit-ready trail of what was received, when it was processed, and where it lives. You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll work in a high-volume environment where speed matters, but accuracy and confidentiality matter more.<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Key responsibilities:<\/strong><\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Intake &amp; indexing:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Receive files from shared inboxes, portals, internal ticketing tools, and cloud folders.<\/li><li>Confirm document type, required fields, signatures, and attachments.<\/li><li>Index each record using standard metadata (client\/project ID, date, document category, version, region).<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Document organization:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Apply standardized naming conventions and folder structures.<\/li><li>Convert formats when needed (PDF merge\/split, image-to-PDF, compressing, version labeling).<\/li><li>Maintain controlled libraries (final vs draft vs archived), including retention tags.<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Quality control<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Perform daily spot checks for duplicates, misfiles, missing pages, and unreadable scans.<\/li><li>Flag exceptions and route them to the correct owner with clear notes.<\/li><li>Maintain error logs and contribute to process improvements that reduce rework.<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Records governance &amp; compliance:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Handle sensitive records with strict access controls and confidentiality.<\/li><li>Follow retention schedules, legal hold instructions, and deletion\/archival rules.<\/li><li>Support audits by pulling records quickly and documenting chain-of-custody steps.<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Collaboration &amp; communication:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Coordinate with HR, Finance, Operations, Legal, or Customer teams to clarify file requirements.<\/li><li>Provide status updates on backlog, turnaround time, and issues found during processing.<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Tools you may use:<\/strong><\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p>Cloud storage (Google Drive\/SharePoint\/Dropbox), document tools (Adobe Acrobat or equivalents), spreadsheets, ticketing (Jira\/Asana\/ServiceNow), e-signature platforms, and basic office productivity tools.<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Success metrics (examples):<\/strong><\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <ul><li>Accuracy rate (misfile\/metadata error rate)<\/li><li>Turnaround time from receipt to filed<\/li><li>Backlog size and daily throughput<\/li><li>Audit retrieval speed and completeness<\/li><li>Compliance adherence (access control, retention tagging)<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Qualifications:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Experience in records management, admin support, clerical work, or document control (preferred).<\/li><li>Strong attention to detail; able to follow naming\/filing rules consistently.<\/li><li>Comfortable handling confidential information and following strict procedures.<\/li><li>Basic computer proficiency: file systems, spreadsheets, PDFs, and collaboration tools.<\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **ELATION** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This flexible, short-term contract offers an opportunity to earn at least $1,000 for about 20 hours of testing, with a minimum of $25\/hour and a $100 onboarding bonus. No prior experience is needed; training is provided.<br><br>As a tester, you will participate in user experience testing on online casino platforms, follow instructions, report bugs, and provide feedback within deadlines. Requirements include being 21+, owning a computer, residing in one of the eligible states, and completing online training.<br><br>Enjoy the benefits of working from home, flexible hours, fast payments, and ongoing support. Our mission is to make support more accessible and help people change their lives in the ways they want.<br><br>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re building a world-class team by empowering individuals with the autonomy, flexibility, and support they need to do their best work. We dream big, iterate fast, and care deeply. If that sounds like you, we\u00e2\u0080\u0099d love to hear from you.<br><br>Our team spans machine learning, product, engineering, conversational design, clinical, growth, and operations, with offices in both New York City and London.<br><br>We're a well-funded Series A company, having raised $93M from Andreessen Horowitz, Radical Ventures, Forerunner Ventures, plus top-tier tech investors involved in ElevenLabs, Captions, Shopify, Plaid, Notion, Canva, Twitch, Airtable, and many others.<br><br><strong>The Role<br><br><\/strong>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re looking for someone to invent new ways for people to discover Ash. Ash is going from 0 to 1, and how we show up online will shape whether people trust us with something as personal as their mental health. We're looking for someone who lives at the intersection of content, social, and growth \u00e2\u0080\u0094 a builder who can create things people want to share, and read the data to know what's actually working.<br><br>This is a hands-on role. One day you're writing and shipping a social campaign; the next you're spinning up a growth experiment, testing a new channel, or turning a product moment into content that travels. You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ve built things people care about. Maybe that\u00e2\u0080\u0099s a social audience. Maybe it\u00e2\u0080\u0099s a community, a newsletter, a creative project, or a brand. Whatever it is, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ve learned what earns attention and trust.<br><br>A note on how we work: we love doing the work ourselves, so we can get good at it. You'll be hands-on across everything: making the content, running the experiment, pulling the numbers. A true jill (or jack) of all trades. You'll partner closely with our marketing team, our Head of Marketing, and our founders. You won't have a big team or a big playbook. We value moving quickly, learning fast, and out-of-the-box thinking. The right person comes up with an idea today and ships it today.<br><br><strong>What You'll Do<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Create content that travels. Make social-first content across channels that earns attention and connects to how Ash shows up in the world. You know what works on each platform and why.<\/li><li>Grow and test channels. Design fast experiments across social, organic, referral, and emerging channels. Use data to decide what deserves more investment.<\/li><li>Connect brand to growth. Translate Ash's positioning and messaging into content and campaigns that both feel right and drive results.<\/li><li>Turn moments into momentum. Take product launches and cultural moments and turn them into content and campaigns that build audience and demand.<\/li><li>Read the numbers. Live in the analytics enough to know which content, channels, and experiments are actually moving the needle, and act on it fast.<\/li><li>Build the audience. Grow Ash's presence across social from the ground up, with a feel for community, tone, and what makes people want to follow along.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What We're Looking For<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>3 to 5 years across social, content, growth, or creator-led marketing, ideally at an early-stage startup where you did everything with limited resources<\/li><li>You have strong creative judgment. You know when something feels original versus derivative, and you make work people remember (the creators I like really had that capability)<\/li><li>You've grown an audience yourself; on your own channels or a brand's, and understand what makes content spread<\/li><li>Strong content and social instincts: you know what works on each platform and can make it yourself<\/li><li>Growth-minded: you design clean experiments, read the data honestly, and kill what isn't working<\/li><li>Brand-fluent: you understand positioning and messaging, and keep your work consistent with how Ash shows up in the world<\/li><li>Builder, not delegator: you've made the work yourself rather than managing agencies, and you prefer it that way<\/li><li>Scrappy and self-directed: you run with ambiguity and ship with incomplete information<\/li><li>Consumer experience strongly preferred (consumer app, CPG, or consumer health); creator or culture-native backgrounds welcome<\/li><li>Excited to build in mental health, with the judgment and care the category demands<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Why This Role<br><br><\/strong>You'll shape how a new kind of brand shows up in culture; grounded in how people actually feel, not just what they do or buy. You'll get the creative canvas of a true 0 to 1 and the data to know what's working, with the resources of a well-funded company behind you.<br><br><strong>What We Offer<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>A chance to join a passionate tight-knit team working on something to change the world<\/li><li>Competitive compensation (top of personal market)<\/li><li>Travel between our NYC \/ London offices<\/li><li>Usual startup perks like free lunch and coffee in office + generous learning budget<\/li><li>We cover your personal therapy<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **SPEEDY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. We're also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture that's built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun \u00e2\u0080\u0093 where everyone can succeed.<br><br><\/p><p>Join us to transform the way the world works.<br><br><br><br><\/p><strong>Job Description<br><br><\/strong><p>At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. This role may be remote or hybrid. At LinkedIn, hybrid roles are performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team. Remote roles are performed from the designated home work location upon time of hire, and any changes to this home work location requires a review of remote status and approval. <br><br><\/p><p>This role can be based in San Francisco, Mountain View, Chicago or New York.<br><br><\/p><p>The Senior\u00e2\u0080\u00afManager, HRBP Consulting and Solutions (C&amp;S) Behavior Management role, will lead a team of HR Business Partners responsible for advising and consulting people leaders on employee conduct, workplace behavior, and disciplinary and sensitive employee matters. The role ensures consistent, fair, and compliant resolution of employee concerns while enabling people leaders to make confident, timely people decisions.  <br><br><\/p><p>The Senior Manager serves as a trusted partner to HR, Legal, Employee Relations, Compliance, and business leaders, driving operational excellence, risk mitigation, manager capability, and a positive employee experience. This leader balances sound judgment with business pragmatism, helping scale a high-quality HR partnership model across regions and functions.  <br><br><\/p><p>The Senior Manager will report to the Sr Director, Consulting &amp; Solutions and lead a team of HRBPs focused on behavior management. The successful candidate will\u00e2\u0080\u00afhave\u00e2\u0080\u00afstrong HR business partnering experience, be driven and self-directed,\u00e2\u0080\u00afhave strong\u00e2\u0080\u00afmanagement\u00e2\u0080\u00afcapability,\u00e2\u0080\u00afand\u00e2\u0080\u00afdemonstrate operational excellence.\u00e2\u0080\u00af\u00e2\u0080\u00af <br><br><\/p><p> <br><br><\/p><p>Responsibilities:\u00e2\u0080\u00af\u00e2\u0080\u00af <br><br><\/p><p>Lead and Develop a Team of HR Business Partners <br><br><\/p><ul><li>Hire, coach, develop, and support a team of HR Business Partners specializing in behavior management. <\/li><li>Establish a culture of accountability, inclusion, collaboration, and continuous learning. <\/li><li>Provide guidance on complex and sensitive employee situations requiring escalated judgment. <\/li><li>Drive consistency in decision-making, documentation, and case management practices across the team. <\/li><li>Calibrate recommendations and outcomes to ensure fair, consistent, and equitable treatment. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><p>Provide Strategic Consultation on Behavior and Conduct Matters <br><br><\/p><ul><li>Serve as the escalation point for high-risk or complex behavior, conduct, and disciplinary cases. <\/li><li>Ensure team is appropriately partnering with leaders to address concerns related to workplace behavior, policy adherence, interpersonal conflict, and team effectiveness. <\/li><li>Ensure alignment between business needs, company values, risk mitigation, and employee experience considerations. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><p>Drive Manager Effectiveness <br><br><\/p><ul><li>Build manager capability through team\u00e2\u0080\u0099s coaching, consultation, and scalable guidance. <\/li><li>Identify patterns and recurring challenges impacting manager effectiveness and organizational health. <\/li><li>Develop frameworks, training, and best practices that improve leadership decision-making. <\/li><li>Enable leaders to navigate employee issues with confidence while maintaining fairness and consistency. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><p>Risk Management and Compliance <br><br><\/p><ul><li>Ensure all employee matters are handled in accordance with company policy, employment law, and regional requirements. <\/li><li>Partner closely with Legal, Employee Relations, Compliance, and Functional HRBPs on sensitive matters. <\/li><li>Monitor risk trends and proactively recommend actions to mitigate organizational exposure. <\/li><li>Maintain high standards of confidentiality and professionalism. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><p>Operational Excellence <br><br><\/p><ul><li>Establish and continuously improve case management processes, service delivery standards, and team operating rhythms. <\/li><li>Leverage data and reporting to identify trends, drive insights, influence HR initiatives, and improve outcomes. <\/li><li>Monitor team capacity, service levels, and quality standards. <\/li><li>Drive consistency across regions while balancing local employment law and cultural considerations. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><p>Cross-Functional Partnership <br><br><\/p><ul><li>Build strong, collaborative partnerships with HRBPs, Legal, Employee Relations, Compliance, and HR Operations teams. <\/li><li>Contribute expertise to organization-wide talent, culture, and workforce initiatives. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><p><strong>Basic Qualifications:\u00e2\u0080\u00af <br><br><\/strong><\/p><ul><li>10+ years of progressive Human Resources experience\u00e2\u0080\u00afrequired\u00e2\u0080\u00afwith significant focus on manager consulting and performance and behavior management. <\/li><li>3+ years experience supporting global organizations in a centralized HRBP or shared services model <br><br><\/li><\/ul><p><strong>Preferred Qualifications:\u00e2\u0080\u00af <br><br><\/strong><\/p><ul><li>3+\u00e2\u0080\u00afyears of direct people management experience\u00e2\u0080\u00afor equivalent\u00e2\u0080\u00af\u00e2\u0080\u00af <\/li><li>Strong knowledge of employment law and HR practices across multiple geographies <\/li><li>Ability to exercise sound judgment in ambiguous and sensitive situations. <\/li><li>Ability to manage, coach, mentor and motivate a diverse global team while ensuring team and individual accountability and performance standards are\u00e2\u0080\u00afmet\u00e2\u0080\u00af\u00e2\u0080\u00af <\/li><li>Experience implementing HR and operational programs and\u00e2\u0080\u00afstrategies <\/li><li>Background and familiarity with HR functional areas\u00e2\u0080\u00af <\/li><li>Ability to prioritize, multitask and manage multiple projects successfully in a fast-paced and dynamic\u00e2\u0080\u00afenvironment\u00e2\u0080\u00af <\/li><li>Strong attention to detail and commitment to delivery of quality\/accurate work products\u00e2\u0080\u00af <\/li><li>Logical reasoning, analytical, and problem-solving skills to troubleshoot and overcome\u00e2\u0080\u00afchallenges\u00e2\u0080\u00af <\/li><li>Experience working in a highly-matrix and global organization and knows how to collaborate effectively with multiple stakeholders <\/li><li>Proven leadership experience, with the maturity and ability to influence stakeholders and gain buy-in <\/li><li>Outstanding interpersonal and communication skills, both verbal and written  <br><br><\/li><\/ul><p><strong>Suggested Skills:<br><br><\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Behavior Management<\/li><li>People Leadership<\/li><li>Cross Functional Collaboration<\/li><li>Risk Mitigation<\/li><li>Strategic HR Partnership<br><br> <br><br><\/li><\/ul><p>LinkedIn is committed to fair and equitable compensation practices.<br><br><\/p><p>The pay range for this role is $144,000 to $234,000. Actual compensation packages are based on several factors that are unique to each candidate, including but not limited to skill set, depth of experience, certifications, and specific work location. This may be different in other locations due to differences in the cost of labor.<br><br> <br><br><\/p><p>The total compensation package for this position may also include annual performance bonus, stock, benefits and\/or other applicable incentive compensation plans. For more information, visit https:\/\/careers.linkedin.com\/benefits.<br><br><br><br><\/p><strong>Additional Information<br><br><\/strong><p><strong>Equal Opportunity Statement <br><br><\/strong><\/p><p>We seek candidates with a wide range of perspectives and backgrounds and we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. LinkedIn considers qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, creed, gender, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, sex, gender expression or identity, sexual orientation, citizenship, or any other legally protected class.<br><br><\/p><p>LinkedIn is committed to offering an inclusive and accessible experience for all job seekers, including individuals with disabilities. Our goal is to foster an inclusive and accessible workplace where everyone has the opportunity to be successful.<br><br><\/p><p>If you need a Reasonable Accommodation to search for a job opening, apply for a position, or participate in the interview process, connect with us and describe the specific Accommodation requested for a disability-related limitation.<br><br>Fill out an Accommodation request here: https:\/\/app.smartsheet.com\/b\/form\/b660a0327d044969abfd7a4e73d15c36<br><br><\/p><p>Reasonable accommodations are modifications or adjustments to the application or hiring process that would enable you to fully participate in that process. Examples of reasonable accommodations include but are not limited to:<br><br><\/p><ul><li>Documents in alternate formats or read aloud to you<\/li><li>Having interviews in an accessible location<\/li><li>Being accompanied by a service dog<\/li><li>Having a sign language interpreter present for the interview<br><br><\/li><\/ul><p>A request for an accommodation will be responded to within three business days. However, non-disability related requests, such as following up on an application, will not receive a response.<br><br><\/p><p>LinkedIn will not discharge or in any other manner discriminate against employees or applicants because they have inquired about, discussed, or disclosed their own pay or the pay of another employee or applicant. However, employees who have access to the compensation information of other employees or applicants as a part of their essential job functions cannot disclose the pay of other employees or applicants to individuals who do not otherwise have access to compensation information, unless the disclosure is (a) in response to a formal complaint or charge, (b) in furtherance of an investigation, proceeding, hearing, or action, including an investigation conducted by LinkedIn, or (c) consistent with LinkedIn's legal duty to furnish information.<br><br><\/p><p><strong>San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance <br><br><\/strong><\/p><p>Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, LinkedIn will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.<br><br><\/p><br><p><strong>Pay Transparency Policy Statement <br><br><\/strong><\/p><p>As a federal contractor, LinkedIn follows the Pay Transparency and non-discrimination provisions described at this link: https:\/\/lnkd.in\/paytransparency.<br><br><\/p><br><p><strong>Global Data Privacy Notice and Compliance Posters for Job Candidates <br><br><\/strong><\/p><p>Please use this link to access documents that provide information about how LinkedIn handles the personal data of employees and job applicants, as well as the E-Verify Participation Notice and the Department of Justice Immigrant and Employee Rights Section Right to Work posters: https:\/\/www.linkedin.com\/legal\/candidate-portal.<br><br><\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **SPLENDIDLY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Mountain View, Mountain View, California, United States","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-manager-hr-business-partner-linkedin-1134451","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-manager-hr-business-partner-linkedin-1134451"},{"slug":"remote-business-analyst-blockchain-com-1134457","id":"1134457","epoch":1783112015,"date":"2026-07-03T20:53:35+00:00","company":"Blockchain.com","company_logo":"","position":"Business Analyst","tags":["design","consulting","exec","customer support","testing","marketing","web dev","video","education","seo","content writing","senior","ops","sales","golang","medical","digital nomad","travel","finance","stats","engineer","shopify","speech","full time","part time","hr","c","legal","coordinator","dev","cloud","excel","sys admin","game dev","english teacher","teaching","linguistics","analyst","crypto","controller","recruiter"],"description":"<strong>Blockchain<\/strong> is connecting the world to the future of finance. As the most trusted and fastest-growing global crypto company, it helps millions of people worldwide safely access cryptocurrency. Since its inception in 2011, Blockchain has earned the trust of over 90 million wallet holders and more than 40 million verified users, facilitating over $1 trillion in crypto transactions.<br><br>Blockchain.com is looking for a <strong>Business Analyst<\/strong> to support strategic products, markets, and customer segments within the Consumer business.<br><br>This is a high-impact analytical and product-oriented role focused on business performance, growth opportunities, customer insights, product execution, and operational excellence. You will work closely with Business Leads, Product, Engineering, Trading, Risk, Compliance, Marketing, Finance, and Regional teams to help identify opportunities, shape product priorities, build business cases, track performance, and support the launch of new initiatives.<br><br><strong>WHAT YOU WILL DO<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Support the strategy, roadmap, and commercial performance of key business areas within Consumer.<\/li><li>Analyze business performance across users, activity, revenue, margin, retention, volume, conversion, and P&amp;L.<\/li><li>Work with Business Leads and Product Managers to identify product opportunities, define problem statements, and support prioritization.<\/li><li>Translate business goals, customer insights, and data analysis into clear product recommendations.<\/li><li>Build dashboards, reports, and analysis to help teams understand performance, diagnose issues, and identify opportunities.<\/li><li>Support business cases for new products, features, markets, or customer propositions, including market size, customer demand, economics, operational requirements, and risk.<\/li><li>Partner with Product and Engineering to help define requirements, clarify trade-offs, and support delivery of customer-facing features.<\/li><li>Support product launches by coordinating inputs across Product, Engineering, Marketing, CRM, Growth, Compliance, Operations, and Regional teams.<\/li><li>Work with Trading, Treasury, Risk, Finance, and Compliance to analyze pricing, economics, risk controls, and profitability.<\/li><li>Track competitors, customer behavior, and market trends to identify opportunities to differentiate and win share.<\/li><li>Help establish a clear operating cadence around performance tracking, experimentation, launches, product reviews, and business reviews.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>WHAT YOU WILL NEED<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Experience in business analysis, product analytics, product operations, strategy, growth, fintech, crypto, payments, consulting, or consumer technology.<\/li><li>Strong analytical skills and comfort working with data, business modeling, funnels, unit economics, pricing, conversion, retention, and profitability.<\/li><li>Ability to turn data, customer insights, and business problems into clear product recommendations.<\/li><li>Strong product judgment and strong interest in building customer-facing products.<\/li><li>Ability to work closely with Product and Engineering teams, including helping define requirements, prioritize opportunities, and support execution.<\/li><li>Strong communication skills and ability to present findings clearly to cross-functional stakeholders.<\/li><li>Comfort operating in a fast-moving, ambiguous environment.<\/li><li>High ownership, attention to detail, and willingness to work across both strategic analysis and hands-on product execution.<\/li><li>Interest in crypto, fintech, consumer products, and high-growth businesses.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>COMPENSATION &amp; PERKS<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Full-time salary based on experience and meaningful equity in an industry-leading company<\/li><li>Hybrid model (remote &amp; on-site setup is mandatory) <\/li><li>Unlimited vacation policy; work hard and take time when you need it<\/li><li>Apple equipment<\/li><li>The opportunity to be a key player and build your career at a rapidly expanding, global technology company in an emerging field<\/li><li>Flexible work culture <br><br><\/li><\/ul><em>Blockchain is committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender expression, sex, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or any other characteristic protected by law. This policy applies to all employment practices within our organization, including hiring, recruiting, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, leave of absence, and apprenticeship. Blockchain makes hiring decisions based solely on qualifications, merit, and business needs at the time.<br><br><\/em><em>You may contact our Data Protection Officer by email at dpo@blockchain.com. Your personal data will be processed for the purposes of managing Controller\u00e2\u0080\u0099s recruitment related activities, which include setting up and conducting interviews and tests for applicants, evaluating and assessing the results thereto, and as is otherwise needed in the recruitment and hiring processes. Such processing is legally permissible under Art. 6(1)(f) of Regulation (EU) 2016\/679 (General Data Protection Regulation) as necessary for the purposes of the legitimate interests pursued by the Controller, which are the solicitation, evaluation, and selection of applicants for employment.<br><br><\/em><em>Your personal data will be shared with Greenhouse Software, Inc., a cloud services provider located in the United States of America and engaged by Controller to help manage its recruitment and hiring process on Controller\u00e2\u0080\u0099s behalf. Accordingly, if you are located outside of the United States, your personal data will be transferred to the United States once you submit it through this site. Because the European Union Commission has determined that United States data privacy laws do not ensure an adequate level of protection for personal data collected from EU data subjects, the transfer will be subject to appropriate additional safeguards under the standard contractual clauses. <br><br><\/em><em>Your personal data will be retained by Controller as long as Controller determines it is necessary to evaluate your application for employment. Under the GDPR, you have the right to request access to your personal data, to request that your personal data be rectified or erased, and to request that processing of your personal data be restricted. You also have the right to data portability. In addition, you may lodge a complaint with an EU supervisory authority.<\/em><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **FRUITFUL** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"New York, New York, United States","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-business-analyst-blockchain-com-1134457","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-business-analyst-blockchain-com-1134457"},{"slug":"remote-assistente-de-processos-sicoob-1134513","id":"1134513","epoch":1783108915,"date":"2026-07-03T20:01:55+00:00","company":"Sicoob","company_logo":"","position":"Assistente de Processos","tags":["dev","excel","non tech","digital nomad"],"description":"<strong>Sobre a Empresa<br><br><\/strong><strong>\u00c3\u0089 poss\u00c3\u00advel transformar o mundo? <br><br><\/strong>Com o Sicoob, Sistema de Cooperativas de Cr\u00c3\u00a9dito do Brasil, essa mudan\u00c3\u00a7a \u00c3\u00a9 di\u00c3\u00a1ria, real e tem explica\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o: o cooperativismo!<br><br>Afinal, ningu\u00c3\u00a9m muda o mundo sozinho, e aqui somos mais de 10 milh\u00c3\u00b5es de cooperados.<br><br>Somos uma cooperativa financeira que oferece tudo que um banco tem com melhores condi\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es e com mais de 4,6 mil pontos de atendimento distribu\u00c3\u00addos em todo o Brasil.<br><br><strong>Prop\u00c3\u00b3sito e Vis\u00c3\u00a3o <br><br><\/strong>Prop\u00c3\u00b3sito: Conectar pessoas para promover justi\u00c3\u00a7a financeira e prosperidade.<br><br>Vis\u00c3\u00a3o: Proporcionar a melhor experi\u00c3\u00aancia financeira aos cooperados.<br><br><strong>Aqui promovemos a diversidade, equidade, inclus\u00c3\u00a3o e valorizamos as diferen\u00c3\u00a7as. Por isso, nossas vagas est\u00c3\u00a3o abertas para todas as pessoas, independente de g\u00c3\u00aanero, orienta\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o sexual, cren\u00c3\u00a7as, ra\u00c3\u00a7a\/etnia, condi\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es f\u00c3\u00adsicas e mentais ou idade.<br><br><\/strong><strong>Hor\u00c3\u00a1rio:<\/strong> De segunda \u00c3\u00a0 sexta, das 9h \u00c3\u00a0s 18h com 1h de almo\u00c3\u00a7o<br><br><strong>Contrata\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o:<\/strong> Tenured - CLT labor code<br><br><strong>N\u00c3\u00advel:<\/strong> Professional<br><br><strong>Descri\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e Responsabilidades<br><br><\/strong>A \u00c3\u00a1rea de Solu\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es e Suporte a Processos Empresariais tem como miss\u00c3\u00a3o oferecer suporte e manuten\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o ao Sistema de An\u00c3\u00a1lise de Produtividade do Neg\u00c3\u00b3cio (APN), al\u00c3\u00a9m de estabelecer suas regras de funcionamento. \u00c3\u0089 respons\u00c3\u00a1vel pelo desenvolvimento cont\u00c3\u00adnuo do Sistema de Gest\u00c3\u00a3o Empresarial e pelo acompanhamento de publica\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es de normativos do Banco Central do Brasil (BCB) e da Receita Federal do Brasil (RFB), com foco na correta parametriza\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o dos sistemas e na comunica\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o dessas atualiza\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es \u00c3\u00a0s cooperativas. Tamb\u00c3\u00a9m realizar estudos e pesquisas de normativos, defini\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o cont\u00c3\u00a1bil, consultoria, treinamentos, suporte e atendimento de chamados conforme SLA.<br><br><strong>Atividades<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Apoiar o mapeamento, a documenta\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e a atualiza\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o de fluxos e procedimentos operacionais, contribuindo para a padroniza\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e melhoria cont\u00c3\u00adnua dos processos; <\/li><li>Auxiliar no monitoramento de indicadores de desempenho (KPIs) e n\u00c3\u00adveis de servi\u00c3\u00a7o (SLAs), apoiando a an\u00c3\u00a1lise de resultados e a identifica\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o de oportunidades de melhoria; <\/li><li>Auxiliar na elabora\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e revis\u00c3\u00a3o manuais, relat\u00c3\u00b3rios gerenciais, apresenta\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es e demais documentos relacionados aos processos da \u00c3\u00a1rea; <\/li><li>Realizar controles e registros associados \u00c3\u00a0 gest\u00c3\u00a3o da qualidade e \u00c3\u00a0 conformidade dos processos, garantindo a integridade das informa\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es; <\/li><li>Apoiar a execu\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o de auditorias internas e acompanhar a implementa\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o de planos de a\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o decorrentes de apontamentos e oportunidades identificadas; <\/li><li>Contribuir com a proposi\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e implementa\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o de melhorias nos processos, visando aumento da efici\u00c3\u00aancia, qualidade e mitiga\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o de riscos; <\/li><li>Organizar, controlar e manter atualizada a documenta\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o relacionada ao Sistema de Gest\u00c3\u00a3o da Qualidade e aos processos sob responsabilidade da \u00c3\u00a1rea; <\/li><li>Prestar suporte \u00c3\u00a0s \u00c3\u00a1reas atendidas pelo Centro de Servi\u00c3\u00a7os Compartilhados (CSC), promovendo a aplica\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o das melhores pr\u00c3\u00a1ticas e o cumprimento dos procedimentos estabelecidos; <\/li><li>Participar de iniciativas voltadas \u00c3\u00a0 padroniza\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o, governan\u00c3\u00a7a e melhoria cont\u00c3\u00adnua dos processos organizacionais.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requisitos<br><br><\/strong><strong>Requisitos obrigat\u00c3\u00b3rios<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Ensino superior completo em Administra\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o, Engenharia, Economia ou \u00c3\u00a1reas correlatas; <\/li><li>Conhecimento em modelagem e gest\u00c3\u00a3o de processos utilizando BPMN; <\/li><li>Viv\u00c3\u00aancia em gest\u00c3\u00a3o da qualidade, melhoria cont\u00c3\u00adnua ou processos corporativos; <\/li><li>Conhecimento em auditorias internas, controles e gest\u00c3\u00a3o de indicadores <\/li><li>Conhecimento intermedi\u00c3\u00a1rio no Pacote Office, com \u00c3\u00aanfase em Excel e PowerPoint; <\/li><li>Boa capacidade de reda\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e elabora\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o de documentos t\u00c3\u00a9cnicos; <\/li><li>Habilidade para an\u00c3\u00a1lise de dados e acompanhamento de indicadores. <\/li><li>Familiaridade com metodologias Lean, PDCA ou similares.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benef\u00c3\u00adcios:<\/strong> Aux\u00c3\u00adlio-Creche\/ Bab\u00c3\u00a1, Bolsa de Estudos para Gradua\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e P\u00c3\u00b3s-Gradua\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o, Cesta Natalina, Day off - fim de ano, Licen\u00c3\u00a7a maternidade estendida, Licen\u00c3\u00a7a paternidade estendida, Participa\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o nos Resultados (anual), Plano de Sa\u00c3\u00bade, Plano Odontol\u00c3\u00b3gico, Previd\u00c3\u00aancia Privada Multipatrocinada, Programa de Desenvolvimento de Soft e Hard Skills, Programa de Mobilidade Interna - Match Oportunidades Internas, Programa Viver Bem, Seguro de Vida, Universidade Corporativa Sicoob, Vale-alimenta\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o, Vale-refei\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o, Vale-transporte (opcional), Wellhub<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **ENTHUSIASTIC** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This position can be done remotely from anywhere within Canada - candidates must currently live in Canada. The role requires working one to three shifts a week, primarily evenings (sometimes until 12:30 a.m. ET) and regular Saturday and Sunday shifts.<br><br>As the successful candidate, you have:<br><br><ul><li>Solid experience copy editing, designing and proofreading print newspaper pages<\/li><li>Solid experience writing strong and accurate headlines and other display copy<\/li><li>Strong news judgment<\/li><li>The ability to get the details right while meeting daily deadlines<\/li><li>Superior customer service orientation<\/li><li>Excellent oral and written communication skills<\/li><li>A background in journalism<\/li><li>Experience editing sports-related content would be an asset<br><br><\/li><\/ul>If you have an eye for detail and a passion for news and print journalism, apply with a resume and short cover letter by end of day\u00e2\u0080\u00afWednesday, July 15 stating why you would be a good fit for this role.<br><br>Details:<br><br><ul><li>A wage grid ranging from about $21 to $25 per hour<\/li><li>Matching pension contribution plan<\/li><li>Three paid sick days annually for part-timers<\/li><li>$25-a-month reimbursement for internet<\/li><li>Shift premium for leadership shifts<br><br><\/li><\/ul>For more information, check out our staff's collective agreement via the Canadian Media Guild.<br><br><strong>About Pagemasters North America<br><br><\/strong>PMNA is a subsidiary of The Canadian Press, but operates independently. PMNA handles production journalism for clients around North America, such as The Globe and Mail, Boston Globe and Hearst. The work includes newspaper page layout, copy editing, headline writing, packaging and optimizing online stories, video production, sports and financial agate and more.<br><br><strong>Diversity &amp; Inclusion<br><br><\/strong>PMNA is committed to fostering an inclusive, barrier-free and accessible environment. As an equal-opportunity employer, we support the goals of employment equity and believe that everyone should be able to contribute to the Company's success in accordance with their abilities. We welcome applications from all diverse groups, including but not limited to women, Indigenous Peoples, members of visible minorities and people with disabilities. If you require an accommodation due to disability to participate in the interview process, please advise us of your needs.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **OPENLY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). With a focus on innovation, ease of use, and delivering measurable results, our strategy is rooted in creating tools that outperform other messaging solutions while fostering trust and value for our customers and stakeholders.<br><br>At TextUs, every team member is empowered to make a difference. Our collaborative and data-driven culture, combined with the guidance of a proven leadership team, ensures you have the resources and support to excel. Together, we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re building the future of mobile-first, conversational engagement and redefining what\u00e2\u0080\u0099s possible for businesses and their stakeholders.<br><br>As our Business Operations Analyst, you'll play a key role in supporting the systems and processes that keep our business running smoothly. Reporting to the Revenue Operations Manager, you'll partner with teams across Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, Finance, and Operations to improve workflows, maintain business systems, and ensure our teams have the tools and data they need to be successful.<br><br>You enjoy solving operational challenges through technology, process improvement, and data. You're naturally curious, embrace new tools, and are excited to explore how automation and AI can help teams work smarter and scale more efficiently.<br><br><strong>CORE RESPONSIBILITIES<br><br><\/strong><strong>Business Operations &amp; Systems Support<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Partner with cross-functional teams to optimize business processes and improve operational efficiency across the organization.<\/li><li>Support the day-to-day administration and continuous improvement of our business systems, including CRM, ERP, marketing automation, and internal tools.<\/li><li>Troubleshoot system issues, manage enhancement requests, and recommend process improvements that improve the employee experience.<\/li><li>Help evaluate and implement new technologies and workflows as the company grows.<\/li><li>Leverage AI-powered tools to improve documentation, reporting, workflow automation, or operational efficiency.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Reporting &amp; Data Management<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Build, maintain, and improve dashboards and reporting for Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, and leadership teams.<\/li><li>Ensure business data remains accurate, organized, and actionable through ongoing data quality initiatives.<\/li><li>Generate recurring and ad hoc reports that support business planning and decision-making.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Business Systems &amp; Integrations<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Support our CRM (Salesforce), ERP (NetSuite), marketing automation platform (HubSpot), and other business applications.<\/li><li>Assist in maintaining integrations between core business systems to ensure reliable data flow and operational efficiency.<\/li><li>Collaborate with internal stakeholders and external vendors to troubleshoot issues and identify opportunities for automation.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Employee Enablement<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Support onboarding and offboarding by ensuring employees have access to the appropriate business systems and documentation.<\/li><li>Maintain internal documentation, process guides, and knowledge base resources.<\/li><li>Deliver training and ongoing support to help employees effectively use business applications.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>WHO YOU ARE<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>3+ years of experience supporting business systems, revenue operations, sales operations, or business operations within a SaaS or technology company.<\/li><li>Experience working with CRM platforms such as Salesforce; administrator experience is helpful but not the primary focus of the role.<\/li><li>Familiarity with business applications such as HubSpot, NetSuite, or similar platforms.<\/li><li>Exposure to system integrations or automation tools (Celigo, Zapier, Informatica, etc.) is a plus.<\/li><li>Strong analytical skills with the ability to identify opportunities for process improvement.<\/li><li>Comfortable working cross-functionally and translating business needs into practical solutions.<\/li><li>Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.<\/li><li>Curious, proactive, and excited to learn new systems and technologies.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>EMPLOYMENT DETAILS:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Job Type: Full time<\/li><li>Compensation Range: $70,000 - $85,000<\/li><li>Location: Remote \/ Denver HQ<\/li><li># of hires for this role: 1<\/li><li>Target Start Date: 3 weeks from offer date<\/li><li>Reporting to: Manager, Revenue Operations<\/li><li>By submitting your resume for this role - you consent to communication via text and email<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>INTERVIEW PROCESS:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Initial video call w. Recruiter - Topics: Culture, logistics<\/li><li>Interview w. Hiring manager (Zoom video) - Topics: Culture, skills, role overview<\/li><li>Salesforce Assignment<\/li><li>Interviews w. Cross Functional team (Zoom video) - Topics: Culture, leadership, skills, role overview<\/li><li>Rembrandt Assessment - allows TextUs to assess how your personality fits within the role and the TextUs culture<\/li><li>Q&amp;A w. CEO (Zoom video) - You will come prepared with questions about the role, team, product to ensure this role is the best fit for you.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>WHY SHOULD SOMEONE CHOOSE THIS ROLE AT TEXTUS?<br><br><\/strong>Information Systems are very important here at TextUs. From tracking our company's high level KPIs down to individual case queues for our support team, we get to work with just about every team. We are a small team, so that means you will have the opportunity to learn about various aspects of Information Systems and see the impact of your work on a regular basis. We like to promote from within, so as the company grows, there is opportunity for advancement as well as continuing to help out our fellow team members.<br><br><strong>TEXTUS BENEFITS INCLUDE:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Competitive pay<\/li><li>Equity<\/li><li>Health\/Dental\/Vision\/Insurance<\/li><li>401K with company match<\/li><li>Flex vacation policy<\/li><li>Phone + Internet stipend<\/li><li>Work from home stipend<\/li><li>U.S remote first and headquartered in Colorado<br><br><\/li><\/ul>TextUs does not discriminate based on race, color, religion (creed), gender, gender expression, age, national origin (ancestry), disability, marital status, sexual orientation, or military status, in any of its activities or operations. We are committed to providing an inclusive and welcoming environment for all members of our staff, volunteers, subcontractors, vendors, and clients.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **HANDILY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Denver, Denver, Colorado, United States","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-business-operations-analyst-textus-1134500","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-business-operations-analyst-textus-1134500"},{"slug":"remote-senior-quality-engineer-tellent-1134436","id":"1134436","epoch":1783094413,"date":"2026-07-03T16:00:13+00:00","company":"Tellent","company_logo":"","position":"Senior Quality Engineer","tags":["design","graphql","hr","sys admin","technical","customer support","dev","testing","web dev","quality assurance","api","exec","senior","medical","engineer","recruiter","backend","digital nomad"],"description":"<h4><strong>About the Role<\/strong><\/h4><p>As a Senior Quality Engineer you'll own and grow the quality of Tellent HR alongside our existing QE team. You'll drive our test automation strategy, expand end-to-end coverage in Playwright, and raise the bar for backend testing. This is a hands-on collaborative role with genuine ownership, direct impact on product development and the experience of our customers.<\/p><p><\/p><h4><strong>Your 12-Month Journey<\/strong><\/h4><ul><li><p><strong>During your first 3 months:<\/strong> You'll get to know Tellent HR, our engineering practices, and our quality standards. You'll learn our testing framework and development workflow while gradually contributing to automated and exploratory testing.<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>Within 6 months:<\/strong> You'll take ownership of quality for parts of the product, expand our Playwright test coverage and work closely with engineers to build quality into every stage of development.<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>After 1 year:<\/strong> You'll be a trusted quality partner within the team, driving improvements to our testing strategy, raising the bar for automation, and helping shape how we approach quality as Tellent HR continues to grow.<\/p><\/li><\/ul><p><\/p><h4><strong>What You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Be Doing<\/strong><\/h4><ul><li><p>Work closely with our other QE\u00e2\u0080\u0099s to help bring our test automation strategy to life across Tellent HR, taking joint ownership and maintaining a significant part of it as it grows.<\/p><\/li><li><p>Partner with developers and fellow QE\u00e2\u0080\u0099s to embed quality early, sharing domain knowledge in both directions and shaping testing practices collaboratively.<\/p><\/li><li><p>Design and execute comprehensive test plans, test cases, and test scripts to ensure software accuracy and functionality<\/p><\/li><li><p>Develop into a product domain expert using that understanding to test, spot risks earlier and guide quality decisions across Tellent HR<\/p><\/li><\/ul><p><\/p><h4><strong>What You Bring<\/strong><\/h4><ul><li><p><strong>Strong QA experience:<\/strong> Several years of hands-on quality engineering, with senior-level ownership of testing for complex web applications.<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>E2E automation:<\/strong> Experience building and maintaining end-to-end test suites in Playwright<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>API &amp; backend testing skills:<\/strong> Proficiency testing GraphQL APIs and backend services<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>Balance of product and technical thinking:<\/strong> Equally at home discussing product behaviour and digging into technical detail.<\/p><\/li><li><p><strong>Communication:<\/strong> Fluent English and Polish for daily collaboration.<\/p><\/li><\/ul><p><\/p><h4><strong>What We Offer<\/strong><\/h4><ul><li><p>Primarily remote working with flexibility and opportunities to connect with the team<\/p><\/li><li><p>Diverse and international team environment<\/p><\/li><li><p>Annual compensation range: 200000-225000 PLN\/year (+ VAT where applicable)<\/p><\/li><li><p>Time off based on contract type:<\/p><ul><li><p>B2B: 30 paid break days<\/p><\/li><li><p>Employment contract: 26 paid holiday days + 2 wellbeing days<\/p><\/li><\/ul><\/li><li><p>\u00e2\u0082\u00ac1500 annual learning budget<\/p><\/li><li><p>Wellness perks including Multisport and private healthcare (LuxMed)<\/p><\/li><li><p>Work from anywhere for up to 4 weeks per year<\/p><\/li><li><p>Apple MacBook, displays, and all the tools you need to succeed<\/p><\/li><li><p>\u00e2\u0082\u00ac200 home office budget + work-from-home allowance<\/p><\/li><\/ul><p><\/p><h4><strong>About Tellent<\/strong><\/h4><p>Tellent is a leading Talent Management Suite designed to empower HR &amp; People teams across the entire employee journey. Our all-in-one platform combines an Applicant Tracking System (<strong>Tellent Recruitee<\/strong>), an intuitive HRIS (<strong>Tellent HR<\/strong>), and powerful Performance Management software (<strong>Tellent Grow<\/strong>).<\/p><p>With 250+ team members globally, 7,000+ customers in 100+ countries, and a growing ecosystem of 500+ partners, we help organizations attract, grow, and retain top talent \u00e2\u0080\u0094 and we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re just getting started.<\/p><p><\/p><h4><strong>AI in our recruitment process<\/strong><\/h4><p>We use our internally developed AI tools to help streamline our recruitment process. However, technology never makes a decision. Every candidate is personally reviewed by our team. Your journey with us is guided by people, supported by tech. Curious about how it works? Read our\u00c2\u00a0<a href=\"https:\/\/recruitee.com\/ai-statement\">AI Statement<\/a>, check our\u00c2\u00a0<a href=\"https:\/\/recruitee.com\/privacy-policy\">Privacy Policy<\/a>, or chat with us at\u00c2\u00a0<a href=\"mailto:hr@tellent.com\">hr@tellent.com<\/a>.<\/p><p><\/p><p><em>If you require accommodations or support during the recruitment process, please let us know \u00e2\u0080\u0094 we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re happy to help.<\/em><\/p><br \/><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **LUCID** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"","salary_min":200000,"salary_max":225000,"apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-senior-quality-engineer-tellent-1134436","logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-senior-quality-engineer-tellent-1134436"},{"slug":"remote-buyer-i-jabil-1134489","id":"1134489","epoch":1783087831,"date":"2026-07-03T14:10:31+00:00","company":"Jabil","company_logo":"","position":"Buyer I","tags":["sys admin","infosec","education","supervisor","customer support","dev","finance","exec","medical","digital nomad"],"description":"<strong>Job Summary<br><br><\/strong>Procure all components necessary to support production or prototype builds. In conjunction, responsibilities include; accomplishing the best possible pricing, lead time agreements, resolution of quality issues, delivery and inventory levels.<br><br><strong>Essential Duties And Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Participate in decision making of MPS loading through proper materials sizing. <\/li><li> Analyze, maintain, and execute Materials Requirement Plan (MRP). Continuously monitor and verify materials pipeline to ensure it meets the MRP requirements. Identify and appropriately address materials supply issues. <\/li><li> Ensure materials availability to support production per the Master Production Schedule through MRP execution, on-time delivery, and coordination of materials movement through receiving to production. <\/li><li> Proactively eliminate materials liabilities for Jabil by clearly understanding the ownership (supplier \/ customer). Track and provide supporting data to BUM in order to clearly define customer liable materials. Execute and maximize Jabil negotiated terms with suppliers to reduce materials liability. <\/li><li> Issue Purchase Orders to pricing, terms &amp; conditions that are negotiated and agreed to by Jabil Commodity Managers and Buyers. Ensure suppliers\u00e2\u0080\u0099 adherence to established agreements. <\/li><li> Optimize order management process to ensure effective communication with suppliers. <\/li><li> Maintain integrity of master data and purchasing planning parameters in order to minimize material liability and to balance the cost of procurement with inventory investment levels. <\/li><li> Monitor and continuously improve supplier\u00e2\u0080\u0099s delivery and quality performance. Address and resolve recurring or critical issues by utilizing corrective action tools and additional resources. <\/li><li> Support Accounts Payable in resolving invoice discrepancies. <\/li><li> Provide inputs to drive and execute Jabil\u00e2\u0080\u0099s commodity and pricing strategy. Work closely with Buyers, Commodity Managers, &amp; SCM. Provide feedback on supplier performance and Jabil\u00e2\u0080\u0099s strategies. <\/li><li> Minimize materials freight expenses for Jabil. <\/li><li> Monitor, track, and provide feedback on suppliers\u00e2\u0080\u0099 performance on delivery, quality, and service. <\/li><li> Adhere to all safety and health rules and regulations associated with this position and as directed by supervisor. <\/li><li> Comply and follow all procedures within the company security policy. <\/li><li> May perform other duties and responsibilities as assigned. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Job Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><strong>KNOWLEDGE REQUIREMENTS<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Ability to calculate figures and amounts such as discounts, interest, commissions, proportions, percentages, area, circumference, and volume. <\/li><li> Ability to apply concepts of basic algebra and geometry. <\/li><li> Ability to effectively present information and respond to questions from groups of managers, clients, customers, and the general public. <\/li><li> Ability to define problems, collect data, establish facts, and draw valid conclusions. <\/li><li> Ability to operate a personal computer including using a Windows based operating system and related software. <\/li><li> Advanced PC skills, including training and knowledge of Jabil\u00e2\u0080\u0099s software packages. <\/li><li> Ability to write simple correspondence. Read and understand visual aid. <\/li><li> Ability to apply common sense understanding to carry out simple one- or two-step instructions. <\/li><li> Ability to deal with standardized situations with only occasional or no variables. <\/li><li> Ability to read and comprehend simple instructions, short correspondence, and memos. <\/li><li> Ability to add, subtract, multiply, and divide in all units of measure, using whole numbers, common fractions, and decimals. <\/li><li> Ability to compute rate, ratio, and percent and to draw and interpret graphs. <br><br><\/li><\/ul>, BE AWARE OF FRAUD: When applying for a job at Jabil you will be contacted via correspondence through our official job portal with a jabil.com e-mail address; direct phone call from a member of the Jabil team; or direct e-mail with a jabil.com e-mail address. Jabil does not request payments for interviews or at any other point during the hiring process. Jabil will not ask for your personal identifying information such as a social security number, birth certificate, financial institution, driver\u00e2\u0080\u0099s license number or passport information over the phone or via e-mail. If you believe you are a victim of identity theft, contact your local police department. business needs<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>About the Company<\/strong><\/p><p>Novaris Search is partnered with a growing business within the <strong>personal care and beauty manufacturing<\/strong> space that is looking to appoint a <strong>Supply Chain Director<\/strong> to lead and strengthen its end-to-end supply chain function.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>This is a key leadership role for a commercially aware supply chain professional who can build structure, improve performance, and support the business through its next phase of growth.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Position Overview<\/strong><\/p><p>The Supply Chain Director will be responsible for overseeing the full supply chain operation, including <strong>planning, procurement, inventory, logistics, and cross-functional coordination<\/strong> across the business.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>The successful candidate will lead efforts to improve service levels, optimise inventory, strengthen supplier performance, and ensure the supply chain function is aligned with operational and commercial objectives.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>This role would suit someone with strong leadership skills, a hands-on approach, and experience operating in a fast-paced <strong>manufacturing environment<\/strong>, ideally within <strong>personal care, cosmetics, beauty, or a related category<\/strong>.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Lead the end-to-end supply chain strategy across planning, procurement, inventory, warehousing, and logistics<\/li><li>Develop and improve supply chain processes to support service, cost, and efficiency targets<\/li><li>Partner with operations, manufacturing, commercial, and finance teams to align supply chain activities with business needs<\/li><li>Drive S&amp;OP and demand planning processes to improve forecasting accuracy and supply continuity<\/li><li>Manage supplier performance and support procurement strategies to reduce risk and improve reliability<\/li><li>Oversee inventory strategy to balance working capital with customer service requirements<\/li><li>Identify and implement continuous improvement initiatives across the supply chain function<\/li><li>Build, lead, and develop a high-performing supply chain team<\/li><li>Provide reporting, analysis, and leadership insight on supply chain performance, risks, and opportunities<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Candidate Requirements<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Proven experience in a senior supply chain leadership role within <strong>manufacturing<\/strong><\/li><li>Strong background across <strong>planning, procurement, inventory, logistics, and supply chain strategy<\/strong><\/li><li>Experience in <strong>personal care, beauty, cosmetics, OTC, or related consumer manufacturing<\/strong> would be preferred<\/li><li>Demonstrated ability to lead teams and improve supply chain performance in a fast-paced environment<\/li><li>Strong understanding of S&amp;OP, forecasting, supplier management, and inventory optimisation<\/li><li>Commercially minded with the ability to work cross-functionally across operations and business leadership<\/li><li>Strong problem-solving skills, leadership capability, and communication skills<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Why Join?<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Opportunity to join a growing business in a key leadership role<\/li><li>High level of visibility and influence across the organisation<\/li><li>Chance to shape supply chain strategy and drive meaningful operational improvement<\/li><li>Work within a dynamic manufacturing environment supporting growth and transformation<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p>Application Process<\/p><p>This search is being It has created a world class logistics and utility infrastructure portfolio that has a pan-India presence. Adani Group is headquartered in Ahmedabad, in the state of Gujarat, India. Over the years, Adani Group has positioned itself to be the market leader in its logistics and energy businesses focusing on large scale infrastructure development in India with O &amp; M practices benchmarked to global standards. With four IG rated businesses, it is the only Infrastructure Investment Grade issuer in India.<br><br><strong>Adani Airports Holding Limited<\/strong>: Adani Airports Holding Limited is reshaping the aviation landscape, transforming airports into dynamic hubs of connectivity, innovation, and service excellence. By prioritizing passenger experience, leveraging state-of-the-art technology, and enhancing operational efficiency, we are redefining airport infrastructure across India. Our vision is to create world-class airports that serve as gateways to regional development and global connectivity, positioning Adani Airports as a leader in the aviation sector with a focus on sustainable growth and community impact.<br><br><strong>Job Purpose:<\/strong> Firefighter is responsible for responding to aircraft and structural fire emergencies, medical emergencies, hazardous material incidents, and other emergencies within the airport premises. This role involves ensuring the safety and security of passengers, crew, and airport personnel by performing firefighting, rescue and emergency medical services.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><strong>Emergency Response:<br><br><\/strong>Respond promptly to aircraft incidents, structural fires, medical emergencies, hazardous materials incidents, and other emergency situations on airport property.<br><br>Perform firefighting, rescue, and emergency medical services to ensure the safety of individuals and property.<br><br><strong>Fire Suppression<br><br><\/strong>Extinguish fires using various firefighting techniques, including the use of water, foam, dry chemicals, and other firefighting agents.<br><br>Conduct search and rescue operations in smoke-filled and hazardous environments.<br><br><strong>Emergency Medical Services<br><br><\/strong>Provide first aid and basic life support (BLS) to injured or ill individuals until advanced medical personnel arrive.<br><br>Assist in the transportation of patients to medical facilities as needed.<br><br><strong>Operational Readiness<br><br><\/strong>Perform daily inspections and maintenance of firefighting vehicles, extinguishers, and personal protective equipment (PPE).<br><br>Maintain inventory of firefighting supplies and equipment and ensure their readiness for use.<br><br>Participate in routine emergency response simulations, ICAO-mandated training, and fire drills.<br><br>Maintain detailed incident reports, training records, and shift logs for regulatory audits.<br><br><strong>Compliance And Reporting<br><br><\/strong>Adhere to all local, state, and federal regulations and guidelines related to firefighting and emergency response and ensure all tasks are performed following Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).<br><br>Identify potential hazards during patrols and inspections, ensuring immediate corrective action.<br><br>Prepare and submit accurate incident reports, equipment logs, and other required documentation.<br><br><strong>Collaboration And Coordination<br><br><\/strong>Collaborate with airport operations, medical services, and external emergency agencies during incidents.<br><br>Coordinate with the Duty Manager, ATC, and airport authorities during emergency operations and drills.<br><br><strong>Key Stakeholders - Internal<br><br><\/strong>Duty Manager - ARFF<br><br>Airport Operations Team<br><br>Airport Security<br><br>Emergency Medical Services<br><br>ARFF Crew Members<br><br>Engineering &amp; Maintenance Team<br><br>Health, Safety &amp; Environment (HSE) Team<br><br><strong>Key Stakeholders - Qualification:<br><br><\/strong>Diploma in Fire Fighting Technology or equivalent qualification.<br><br>Certification from an accredited firefighting academy is required.<br><br><strong>Work By combining advanced technology with a global network of talented experts, we make unusable data usable and inference reliable and trustworthy, driving real-world business value at scale.<br><br>More than just a workplace, we're a global community founded on strong relationships and the belief that meaningful work transforms lives. Our commitment to earning, learning, and serving fuels everything we do, as we strive to connect one million people to meaningful work and build leaders worth following.<br><br><strong>Our culture<br><br><\/strong>At CloudFactory, we believe in building a workplace where everyone feels empowered, valued, and inspired to bring their authentic selves to work. We are:<br><br><ul><li>Mission-driven: we focus on creating economic and social impact<\/li><li>People-centric: we care deeply about our team's growth, well-being, and sense of belonging<\/li><li>Innovative: we embrace change and find better ways to do things, together<\/li><li>Globally connected: we foster collaboration between diverse cultures and perspectives<br><br><\/li><\/ul>If you're ready to earn, learn, serve, and be part of a vibrant global community, CloudFactory is your place.<br><br><strong>What You'll Do<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Review trial lesson feedback and score it for pedagogical relevance, shaping what learners see next<\/li><li>Evaluate grammar exercises for content quality and pedagogical alignment<\/li><li>Connect lesson insights back to core grammar concepts so learning content builds logically<\/li><li>Use learner data to drive continuous improvement of English learning content<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Bachelor's degree or higher in education, TESOL\/TEFL, applied linguistics, or a related field<\/li><li>Solid grounding in pedagogy and language teaching methodology, ideally with curriculum or lesson design experience<\/li><li>Experience evaluating, annotating, or quality-reviewing educational content \u00e2\u0080\u0094 EdTech or AI-assisted learning experience is a strong plus<\/li><li>Advanced English proficiency (CEFR C1 or higher)<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Engagement details<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Type: Contract<\/li><li>Time commitment: 10-20 hours per week<\/li><li>Project duration: 4 weeks, potential extension<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **EXUBERANT** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=).
