Our mission is to improve patient health globally by revitalising niche, tried-and-trusted medicines. Since its inception in 2013, Pharmanovia has grown consistently year on year, focusing on delivering high-quality branded prescription medicines to patients, prescribers, and healthcare providers worldwide. Our growth has enabled the company to reinvest in its products, brands, people, and communities. Today, Pharmanovia employs more than 300 colleagues representing 29 nationalities and operates across Europe, the Middle East, Asia-Pacific, and Latin America. Our core therapeutic areas include Cardiovascular, Oncology, Endocrinology, and Neurology. We are an agile, entrepreneurial, and innovative speciality pharmaceutical company committed to maximising the value of established and speciality medicines while improving patient access worldwide<br><br><strong>About The Role<br><br><\/strong>As a Supply Chain Executive, you will be the first point of contact for external and internal stakeholders regarding the portfolio you manage, and you will report directly to the Supply Chain Manager for External Manufacturing. Your role involves managing the \u00e2\u0080\u009cProcure to Pay\u00e2\u0080\u009d cycle of pharmaceutical products from third-party Contract Manufacturing Organizations (CMOs) located across the globe.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Reporting: Support demand forecasting and customer services, warehousing, and distribution teams by producing various daily, weekly, and monthly reports.<\/li><li>KPI Management: Understand and interrogate Supply Chain Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and data flows to support continuous improvement.<\/li><li>Project Coordination: Develop and implement the supply chain component of acquisition projects to meet business goals within designated time frames and budgets.<\/li><li>Transition Management: Collaborate with teams to ensure a smooth transition of Market Authorisation (MA) ownership and plan for new stock in Pharmanovia-approved trade dress.<\/li><li>Master Data Management: Set up and validate master data in the ERP system, ensuring timely input into the CMO\u00e2\u0080\u0099s planning system to meet company KPIs.<\/li><li>Troubleshooting: Address supply chain issues related to bridging stock, serialisation, and temperature evidence while maintaining high standards of Good Distribution Practice (GDP).<\/li><li>Inventory Analysis: Provide inventory and buying support analysis, drawing insights from data to make recommendations to the business.<\/li><li>Collaboration: Work closely with CMOs, distributors, regulatory, artwork, and IT teams to resolve artwork or packaging supply issues and implement process improvements.<\/li><li>Process Improvement: Identify areas for improvement, develop business cases, and engage relevant stakeholders to secure buy-in for developing new tools and action plans.<\/li><li>Issue Resolution: Resolve challenges concerning transportation, logistics, imports\/exports, customs clearance, or customer issues.<\/li><li>Proactive Communication: Provide early warnings of impending product or stock problems to internal colleagues.<\/li><li>Data Issue Management: Identify and resolve complex supply chain data issues.<\/li><li>Regulatory Knowledge: Understand regulations related to the procurement of medicinal products, including controlled drugs, dangerous goods, and devices.<\/li><li>Data Integrity: Ensure data integrity and adhere to Pharmanovia\u00e2\u0080\u0099s work ethics and culture.<\/li><li>Training Compliance: Follow Pharmanovia\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and approval procedures relevant to the supply chain role.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Bachelor\u00e2\u0080\u0099s degree in science, CSCP\/MBA certification<\/li><li>Minimum five years in a pharmaceutical company managing acquisition and integration, supply planning and procurement of medicinal products, including controlled drugs, dangerous goods and devices, with an understanding of different HA regulations\/norms<\/li><li>Experience managing a team of high-energy individuals, with the ability to work collaboratively across global teams.<\/li><li>Strong understanding of SAP S4H supply planning and ordering processes within the pharmaceutical industry, along with advanced Excel skills.<\/li><li>Strong verbal and written communication abilities.<\/li><li>A proven track record of leading discussions with divestment partners and proposing solutions to ensure supply continuity.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Equal Opportunity Statement<br><br><\/strong>At Pharmanovia, we are committed to diversity and inclusivity in our workforce.<br><br><strong>Why Join Us?<br><br><\/strong>At Pharmanovia, you will be part of a global speciality pharma business that values quality and supports a collaborative work culture. If you are passionate about supply chain dynamics and eager to drive improvements, we encourage you to apply!<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **JUDICIOUS** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). In this role, you will assist with organizing, updating, and maintaining accurate company records and databases while ensuring information is handled efficiently and correctly.<\/p> <p>You will also provide general administrative support across teams, helping to improve workflow and streamline internal processes. Strong computer skills, a willingness to learn, and a keen eye for detail are essential for success in this position.<\/p> <p>This remote opportunity offers flexible working arrangements and the chance to grow within a supportive and dynamic work environment.<\/p> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>What You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Be Doing:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Perform data entry and maintain accurate records across internal systems <\/li><li>Update spreadsheets, trackers, and documentation regularly <\/li><li>Organize digital files and ensure information is easy to access <\/li><li>Assist with scheduling, task coordination, and administrative workflows <\/li><li>Monitor and follow up on assigned tasks to ensure completion <\/li><li>Support internal teams by maintaining structured and up-to-date information <\/li><li>Identify and flag missing or inconsistent data for correction <\/li><li>Maintain clear and professional written communication <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>What We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re Looking For:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Strong attention to detail and accuracy <\/li><li>Good organizational and time management skills <\/li><li>Ability to follow instructions and structured workflows <\/li><li>Basic familiarity with tools like Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel <\/li><li>Clear written communication skills <\/li><li>Ability to manage repetitive tasks with consistency <\/li><li>Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment <\/li><li>No prior experience required \u00e2\u0080\u0094 training will be provided <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Tools &amp; Work Environment:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Spreadsheets (Google Sheets \/ Excel) <\/li><li>Internal tracking and documentation systems <\/li><li>Email and communication platforms <\/li><li>Remote collaboration tools (chat and video calls) <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Benefits:<\/strong><\/p> <ul><li>Competitive entry-level compensation <\/li><li>Flexible remote working schedule <\/li><li>Structured onboarding and training support <\/li><li>Opportunities for career growth in administration and operations <\/li><li>Performance-based incentives <\/li><li>Supportive and collaborative remote team environment <\/li><li>Access to learning resources and skill development tools <\/li><br><\/ul> <p>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p> <p><strong>Why Join?<\/strong><\/p> <p>This role offers a strong foundation in administrative support and digital operations. We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re Numa, a forward-thinking hospitality brand redefining how people discover cities. As part of our team, you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll experience a dynamic and supportive environment where creativity thrives, and your contributions make a real impact. We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace where every voice is valued, and different perspectives fuel our innovation.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>ABOUT THE ROLE<\/strong><\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Extract and analyse data from multiple large-scale data warehouses, supporting the setup, maintenance, and integration of data sources.<\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Develop dashboards and reporting to generate commercial insights across revenue functions, including Revenue Management, Marketing, Strategy, and other business teams.<\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Proactively identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in data, and translate findings into actionable recommendations and process improvements.<\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Collaborate with stakeholders to identify strategic opportunities and answer key business questions through data analysis.<\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Present analyses and insights to a wide range of business stakeholders in a clear and compelling way.<\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Enable stakeholders to independently leverage data by developing self-service dashboards and tools (e.g., Looker).<\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Support the development, standardization, and rollout of internal reporting across the organization.<\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Contribute to improving data quality, definitions, and governance within the Revenue Analytics domain.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>ABOUT YOU<\/strong><\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Proficiency in SQL and experience with Looker (or similar BI tools such as Tableau, Power BI, etc.).<\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Advanced knowledge of Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel.<\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Bachelor\u00e2\u0080\u0099s or Master\u00e2\u0080\u0099s degree in a relevant field (e.g., Data Analytics, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science), or Business Administration with a strong analytical focus.<\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f Interest in data analysis, visualization, statistics, and data storytelling.<\/p><p>\u00e2\u0097\u008f AI-first mindset with a strong curiosity for emerging You will play a vital role in maintaining clean, safe, and efficient environments on-site, with a strong focus on teamwork and attention to detail.<br><br>This is more than just a job! It is a pathway to grow your experience, enhance your skills, and build a rewarding career in the facilities services industry.<br><br><strong>Job Description<br><br><\/strong>As part of your daily routine as a <strong>Utility All-Rounder at Cater Care<\/strong>; You will be responsible for a diverse range of tasks, including:<br><br><ul><li>Setting up, maintaining, and clearing dining areas<\/li><li>Operating dishwashing equipment and ensuring the cleanliness of kitchen facilities, utensils, and dining spaces<\/li><li>Adhering to all legislated food safety and hygiene standards<\/li><li>Providing efficient and friendly service during high-demand periods<\/li><li>Supporting team members across departments as needed<\/li><li>Dining Room Duties: maintaining cleanliness, replenishing stock, and ensuring crib food levels are sufficient<\/li><li>Housekeeping: cleaning guest rooms and ensuites, making beds as required<\/li><li>General Cleaning: managing waste, sweeping, mopping, and other cleaning duties in communal areas<\/li><li>Mine Site Cleaning: maintaining cleanliness in site offices, crib huts, and bathhouses<br><br><\/li><\/ul>This diverse role offers the opportunity to contribute to multiple aspects of site operations while building valuable experience in a fast-paced environment.<br><br><strong>Desired Skills And Experience<br><br><\/strong><strong>The Ideal Applicant Will Have:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Experience working as a Utility\/ Utility All Rounder\/Cleaner\/Housekeeper\/Kitchen Hand 12 months +<\/li><li>A commitment to genuine, friendly customer service<\/li><li>A motivated, enthusiastic and positive \u00e2\u0080\u0098can-do\u00e2\u0080\u0099 attitude<\/li><li>Ability to work in a fast-paced time-sensitive environment<\/li><li>Pride in personal appearance &amp; hygiene<\/li><li>Drivers License (Auto or Man)<\/li><li>Australian Citizen or Australian Permanent Resident<\/li><li>Forklift Licence preferred <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>To apply: <\/strong>If you are seeking a professional career and great working conditions, please send your resume and cover letter by clicking the<em> \"Apply for this job\" <\/em>tab or via our website www.catercare.com.au.<br><br><strong>Note: <\/strong>Successful applicants will need to have or be willing to obtain a police clearance and undertake a pre-employment medical assessment. <strong> ONLY SUCCESSFUL APPLICANTS <\/strong> will be contacted.<br><br><strong>Employee Benefits Program Includes<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Corporate Health Fund Rates <\/li><li>Travel Club Getaways <\/li><li>Discounted Car Hire <\/li><li>Discounted Gift Cards <\/li><li>JB HiFi Corporate Discounts <\/li><li>Access to EAP services with Acacia Connection<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **LUXURY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). We're bringing title search into the 21st century.<br><br>Pippin is headquartered in New York City. With a remote-first culture, we look to hire the best talent wherever they are located across the country.<br><br><strong>How We Do It<br><br><\/strong>We work with title insurance companies, property developers, and financial institutions to quickly and easily produce title documents to make the real estate closing process faster and more efficient.<br><br>Our proprietary cloud-based software allows our customers to manage their workflows efficiently, saving them time, money, and hassle. Having just closed a recent financing round, we are rapidly scaling our business - and our team!<br><br><strong>Who You Are<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>You're ambitious and results-driven with a drive to succeed in this company.<\/li><li>You believe in continuous learning culture to stay relevant and reinvent yourself to deal with lots of moving pieces.<\/li><li>You are diligent about deadlines, project milestones and quality standards\u00e2\u0080\u0094while also staying on top of them as they evolve.<\/li><li>You are a do'er who is good at leading, innovating, motivating, growing, developing, evaluating, communicating, and risking. That's a lot of 'ing'. Can you keep up? If yes, join us!<\/li><li>You've got positive energy. You're optimistic about the future and determined to get there.<\/li><li>You appreciate direct communication. You're both an active communicator and an eager listener - because let's face it, you can't have one without the other. You're cool with candid feedback and see every setback as an opportunity to grow.<\/li><li>You want to be part of a winning team. We're stronger together, and you're a person who embraces being pushed out of your comfort zone.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What You Will Do<br><br><\/strong>As a Residential Real Estate Title Search Quality Control, you will work with our search team to produce and review searches and title reports, determine the legal conditions of properties, and ensure the quality of the final product prior to delivery to our clients.<br><br>You are also be expected to support our Customer Service team on a regular basis by communicating with customers regarding important updates or clarifications, along with receiving and responding to order-related inquiries.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Analyze completed title searches from our internal searching team for accuracy, completeness and adherence to client specific SOP's.<\/li><li>Examine, analyze, and evaluate documentation such as deeds, mortgages, property taxes, federal and state inheritance\/estate taxes, deeds of trust, liens, judgments, easements, restrictions, bankruptcy filings, foreclosures, chancery proceedings, and plats\/maps and other records to be read into the title binder or informational report to determine ownership and encumbrances, and to verify legal descriptions of property.<\/li><li>Analyze and understand chain of title, and defects in the chain of title, and prepare reports outlining title-related matters.<\/li><li>Examine title records from outside abstractors and seek additional information from ground abstractors when necessary for complete and proper examination.<\/li><li>Synthesize all title search information and prepare property reports and title commitments.<\/li><li>Strong attention to detail as you read and extract information from the documents, then enter that information into a report or software.<\/li><li>This is a full time remote position. The successful candidate will be expected to work a full 8 hr day 5 days a week. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What You Bring<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>1-4 years as a title abstractor\/examiner is required including online search experience.<\/li><li>Familiarity with various state guidelines and searching state, city, county, and school property tax jurisdictions online.<\/li><li>Attention to detail in reviewing and entering information and data from source documents resulting in accurate, clear, and professionally formatted title reports.<\/li><li>Proficiency in various MS Office tools such as Word and Excel.<\/li><li>Familiarity with various title search platforms is helpful but not necessary. ( Softpro, Qualia, Datatrace, etc )<\/li><li>Good judgment related to access to confidential borrower data.<\/li><li>Ability to collaborate effectively and work as part of a team.<\/li><li>Ability to work independently.<\/li><li>Ability to work under pressure in a fast-moving, deadline-driven environment.<\/li><li>Ability to work overtime, as necessary, to support and fulfill client timeline requirements.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Who We Are As An Employer<br><br><\/strong>Pippin's culture is rooted in our core values, which promote an innovative and inclusive environment where diverse perspectives and new ideas are celebrated. At Pippin, we believe that people who give their best deserve the best in return.<br><br>We offer a competitive compensation package including paid vacation, holidays, and 100% contribution to health insurance. Our compensation for this position is flexible based on experience. It is more important to us that we find the right candidate who will fit in with our culture and share our service values of pride, consistency, adaptability, and appreciation. If you are passionate about title search and quality, give us a chance to meet you.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **AFFECTATION** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is an opportunity to shape the future of community health, strengthen healthcare access, and drive meaningful impact across North Dakota and South Dakota.<\/span><\/p><br><p><span>As the voice of community health centers throughout the Dakotas, CHAD supports organizations serving rural and underserved communities through advocacy, innovation, workforce development, and strategic partnerships.<\/span><\/p><br><span>The Opportunity<\/span><br><p><span>Reporting to the Board of Directors, the CEO will lead CHAD's strategy, operations, advocacy efforts, and organizational growth while ensuring the long-term success of the association and its members. The CEO serves as CHAD's chief ambassador, building relationships that advance healthcare access and improve community health outcomes throughout the region.<\/span><\/p><br><span>What You'll Do<\/span><br><ul><br><li><span>Provide visionary leadership for CHAD, the Health Center Controlled Network (HCCN), and the Clinically Integrated Network (CIN).<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Partner with the Board to advance strategic priorities and support effective governance.<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Creates and maintains a high-performance organizational culture focused on collaboration, accountability, innovation, and service excellence<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Provides leadership development opportunities for staff and future organizational leaders.<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Lead advocacy initiatives and represent CHAD with policymakers, funders, and healthcare leaders.<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Strengthen member engagement and cultivate strategic partnerships across the Dakotas.<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Ensure strong fiscal management, compliance, grant oversight, and organizational sustainability.<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Advance workforce development and support data-driven decision-making across member organizations.<\/span><\/li><br><\/ul><br><span>What You'll Bring<\/span><br><ul><br><li><span>Bachelor's degree in healthcare administration, public health, business, public policy, or related field; master's degree preferred.<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Five or more years of progressive leadership experience in community health, healthcare, public health, or a related sector.<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Proven success in strategic leadership, stakeholder engagement, advocacy, and financial stewardship.<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Experience leading complex organizations, programs, or multi-site operations.<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Knowledge of healthcare systems, financing, and community-based care in the Dakotas.<\/span><\/li><br><\/ul><br><span>Why CHAD?<\/span><br><p><span>For more than 35 years, CHAD has championed access to affordable, high-quality healthcare across North and South Dakota. Joining CHAD means joining a mission-driven organization dedicated to healthier communities and stronger healthcare systems.<\/span><\/p><br><p><span>Exceptional Benefits<\/span><\/p><br><ul><br><li><span>100% employer-paid health, dental, vision, disability, and life insurance<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Retirement plan with up to a 6% employer match<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Generous paid leave and 11 paid holidays<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Remote work environment<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Wellness time and office stipend<\/span><\/li><br><li><span>Meaningful work that improves healthcare access across The Dakotas!<\/span><\/li><br><\/ul><br><span>Location &amp; Travel<\/span><br><p><span>This remote position must be based in North Dakota or South Dakota and includes regular travel throughout the Dakotas, along with occasional regional and national travel to meetings and conferences. Some evening and weekend work may be required.<\/span><\/p><br><span>Hiring Range<\/span><br><p><span>The anticipated starting hiring range for this position is $130,000 - 150,000 annually, dependent on experience and qualifications. Candidates whose experience, skills, and credentials exceed the requirements of the role are encouraged to apply. Compensation above the stated hiring range may be considered for exceptionally qualified candidates.<\/span><\/p><br><span>Apply Today<\/span><br><p><span>If you are a visionary leader ready to shape the future of community health, strengthen healthcare access, and drive meaningful, lasting impact across North Dakota and South Dakota, we invite you to consider this exceptional opportunity, and Apply Today!<\/span><\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **FAVE** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). From pumps to scaffolding to general construction tools, we aim to be the only call needed to outfit a job site with the proper equipment. Not only do we offer a vast fleet that ranks among the best in the industry, we pair it all with a friendly and knowledgeable staff. Our employees are our greatest asset, and although we present a comprehensive equipment offering, our expertise and service are what truly distinguish us from the competition.<br><br>We pride ourselves on investing in our workforce and offer competitive benefits, as well as extensive on-the-job training for all eligible employees.<br><br>As a highly successful national company, we are constantly looking for talented individuals to support our growth. If you are interested in pursuing a rewarding career, we invite you to review our opportunities!<br><br><strong>Job Description Summary<br><br><\/strong>Technician<br><br>Are you seeking an entrepreneurial, empowering workplace that allows you to:<br><br><ul><li> Build skills by working on a variety of makes, models &amp; equipment<\/li><li> Develop new skills for a career track in service or operation management<\/li><li> Work with an incredible team of people in a safety-focused environment<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Sunbelt Rentals--the fastest growing rental business in North America--is seeking a Technician.<br><br>This Technician role performs preventive maintenance, perform advanced diagnostics, and make<br><br>complex repairs on equipment in the safest, most effective way possible to avoid downtime. Our fleet varies by location but primarily include Aerial Work Platforms, general construction tools and<br><br>equipment. Our specialty lines locations may have a fleet of large-scale power-generators, pumps,<br><br>HVAC systems and oil\/gas related equipment.<br><br>Education or experience that prepares you for success:<br><br><ul><li> High school diploma or GED required, some trade school or equivalent training desired<\/li><li> 5 +years of Technician experience with similar diesel equipment and\/or heavy equipment or specialty lines equipment (large-scale generators, pumps, HVAC or Oil &amp; Gas equipment) strongly preferred<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Knowledge\/Skills\/Abilities you may rely on:<br><br><ul><li> May need to provide tools of the trade<\/li><li> Advanced knowledge of hydraulic systems &amp; troubleshooting skills<\/li><li> Advanced knowledge of electrical systems &amp; troubleshooting skills<\/li><li> Ability to be flexible with changing priorities in a fast-paced environment<br><br><\/li><\/ul>The physical demands of this role require bending, squatting, crouching, reaching, lifting 50 pounds or more, and working indoors\/outdoors when required by the job. This role supports payroll processing for regular employees, retirees, flight attendants, expatriates, employees with disability-related payroll needs, and global mobility payments, while also managing garnishment processing, tax-related activities, and banking data updates. Success in this role requires strong attention to detail, sound judgment, payroll knowledge, and the ability to handle sensitive information with accuracy and care. The successful candidate will be responsible for maintaining a high-speed internet connection and safe working environment in the event this role is required to be performed remotely.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Process payroll accurately and on time for regular employees, retirees, flight attendants, expatriates, disability-related payroll cases, and global mobility-related payments<\/li><li>Review payroll inputs and outputs to identify discrepancies, validate data, and resolve issues before payroll completion<\/li><li>Maintain and update payroll records, including banking data updates and other employee payroll changes<\/li><li>Process disability-related payroll transactions in alignment with established procedures, timelines, and requirements<\/li><li>Process garnishments in accordance with applicable requirements, deadlines, and established procedures<\/li><li>Support tax-related payroll activities, including review, validation, issue resolution, and compliance-related processing<\/li><li>Research and resolve payroll issues related to pay, deductions, taxes, garnishments, direct deposit, disability cases, and employee data<\/li><li>Partner with HR, Benefits, Tax, Finance, and other internal stakeholders to gather information and resolve payroll questions or issues<\/li><li>Ensure payroll activities are completed in alignment with company policy, internal controls, and applicable regulatory requirements<\/li><li>Support payroll reconciliations, audits, reporting, and year-end activities to maintain accuracy and audit readiness<\/li><li>Monitor recurring issues and process gaps and contribute to continuous improvement efforts that strengthen payroll quality and efficiency<\/li><li>Communicate clearly and professionally with employees, managers, and business partners regarding payroll questions and issue resolution<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What Success Looks Like<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Payroll is processed accurately and on time across all assigned populations and activities<\/li><li>Banking data updates, disability cases, garnishments, and tax-related activities are completed with strong control awareness<\/li><li>Payroll issues are resolved efficiently with clear follow-through<\/li><li>Records and documentation remain accurate, complete, and audit-ready<\/li><li>Stakeholders receive responsive, professional support<\/li><li>Process improvements strengthen payroll consistency, compliance, and service quality<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What You Need To Succeed (Minimum Qualifications)<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Must possess authorization to work and live in Jamaica at the time of application. Delta does not sponsor.<\/li><li>Experience in payroll processing, payroll operations, or a related function.<\/li><li>Knowledge of payroll processes, controls, and issue resolution practices.<\/li><li>Must be able to travel to and from the United States and other countries as required for training and business meetings.<\/li><li>Strong attention to detail and commitment to accuracy.<\/li><li>Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills.<\/li><li>Ability to manage sensitive and confidential information appropriately.<\/li><li>Strong written and verbal communication skills.<\/li><li>Ability to manage multiple priorities in a deadline-driven environment.<\/li><li>Consistently prioritizes safety and security of self, others, and personal data.<\/li><li>Embraces diverse people, thinking, and styles.<\/li><li>Possesses a high school diploma, GED, or high school equivalency.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What Will Give You a Competitive Edge (Preferred Qualifications)<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Experience supporting multiple employee populations or complex payroll workstreams<\/li><li>Experience with expatriate payroll, disability payroll processing, global mobility payments, garnishments, and payroll tax activities<\/li><li>Experience supporting payroll reconciliations, audits, or year-end processing<\/li><li>Knowledge of payroll compliance requirements and internal control practices<\/li><li>Experience working with payroll systems, reporting tools, and data management processes<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **COMPLIANT** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Group","company_logo":"","position":"Auxiliar financeiro","tags":["dev","excel","non tech","digital nomad","exec"],"description":"<p><strong>Sobre a Hiflex<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><p>A Hiflex Group surgiu em 2013 da experi\u00c3\u00aancia profissional dos seus executivos na \u00c3\u00a1rea de Gest\u00c3\u00a3o de Projetos e Change Management.<\/p><p>Nossa especialidade \u00c3\u00a9 o apoio para empresas que buscam por transforma\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es organizacionais e Business Agility, atrav\u00c3\u00a9s dos servi\u00c3\u00a7os prestados pela nossa equipe de Hiflexers: treinamentos, mentorias, certifica\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o, diagn\u00c3\u00b3sticos e Agile Coaching Nossa equipe multidisciplinar de Hiflexers possui grande expertise em: m\u00c3\u00a9todos \u00c3\u00a1geis, m\u00c3\u00a9todos h\u00c3\u00adbridos, PMO, Gest\u00c3\u00a3o de Projetos, Gest\u00c3\u00a3o de Produtos, OKRs, Lean, Business Agility e Change Management.<\/p><p>Nossa miss\u00c3\u00a3o \u00c3\u00a9 ajudar pessoas e organiza\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es a atingir melhores resultados atrav\u00c3\u00a9s de abordagens enxutas, \u00c3\u00a1geis e colaborativas de gest\u00c3\u00a3o.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Sobre a vaga<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Cargo:<\/strong> Auxiliar Financeiro<\/p><p><strong>Tempo de contrato:<\/strong> Indeterminado<\/p><p><strong>Modalidade de contrata\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o:<\/strong> PJ<\/p><p><strong>Modalidade de trabalho:<\/strong> 100% remoto - (1 a 2x presencial ao m\u00c3\u00aas)<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>O que voc\u00c3\u00aa precisa ter:<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Perfil organizado e gosto por rotinas bem estruturadas.<\/li><li>Aten\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o aos detalhes, prezando pela qualidade e precis\u00c3\u00a3o nas entregas.<\/li><li>Habilidade para dar visibilidade \u00c3\u00a0s atividades em andamento, mantendo uma comunica\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o clara e transparente sobre o andamento das demandas.<\/li><li>Facilidade para trabalhar em equipe, promovendo colabora\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e alinhamento entre as \u00c3\u00a1reas.<\/li><li>Abertura para receber feedbacks, utilizando-os como ferramenta de aprendizado e desenvolvimento cont\u00c3\u00adnuo.<\/li><li>Disciplina no cumprimento de prazos, com bom senso de prioriza\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o e organiza\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o das atividades de acordo com as necessidades do neg\u00c3\u00b3cio.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Atividades a serem desenvolvidas<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Apoiar no preenchimento e na confer\u00c3\u00aancia da planilha de faturamento mensal.<\/li><li>Auxiliar no cadastramento de novos colaboradores nos sistemas internos.<\/li><li>Apoiar a concilia\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o banc\u00c3\u00a1ria, verificando a conformidade entre saldos e extratos.<\/li><li>Organizar e realizar o lan\u00c3\u00a7amento de notas fiscais e demais documentos nos sistemas financeiros.<\/li><li>Apoiar o controle e a organiza\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o da documenta\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o da \u00c3\u00a1rea.<\/li><li>Acompanhar os prazos de pagamentos, recebimentos e renova\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es contratuais, contribuindo para o cumprimento dos SLAs da \u00c3\u00a1rea.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p>Desej\u00c3\u00a1veis<\/p><ul><li>Estar cursando <strong>Administra\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o, Ci\u00c3\u00aancias Cont\u00c3\u00a1beis, Gest\u00c3\u00a3o Financeira<\/strong> ou \u00c3\u00a1reas correlatas.<\/li><li>Estar a partir do <strong>2\u00c2\u00ba semestre<\/strong> da gradua\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00a3o.<\/li><li>Ter conhecimento em <strong>Excel b\u00c3\u00a1sico\/intermedi\u00c3\u00a1rio<\/strong>, incluindo f\u00c3\u00b3rmulas como <strong>SOMA, M\u00c3\u0089DIA e SOMASES<\/strong>.<\/li><li>Interesse em desenvolver carreira nas \u00c3\u00a1reas <strong>Administrativa, Financeira ou Opera\u00c3\u00a7\u00c3\u00b5es<\/strong>.<\/li><li>Perfil proativo, com vontade de aprender e crescer profissionalmente.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p>Tratamos os seus dados de acordo com a LGPD, Lei n\u00c2\u00ba 13.709\/2018 e respeitamos a sua privacidade. Reporting directly to the CEO, this individual will oversee the agency's entire Creative Services product, balancing long-term innovation with exceptional day-to-day execution across every partner engagement.<\/span><\/p><p><span>This is a leadership role for someone who is equally energized by big ideas and operational excellence. You'll shape integrated brand campaigns, performance marketing creative, website experiences, commercial productions, and emerging creative capabilities while building and developing a high-performing creative organization. You'll partner directly with college and university presidents, CMOs, executive leadership teams, and boards while helping define where creative and the agency is headed next.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Role Responsibilities<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Own Creative Services as a Product<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Serve as the executive owner of Kanahoma's Creative Services product, defining its long-term vision, strategy, and continued evolution<\/span><\/li><li><span>Champion the intersection of creativity, brand strategy, performance marketing, AI, and emerging technology to ensure Kanahoma remains ahead of where the market is going<\/span><\/li><li><span>Develop new creative capabilities, services, frameworks, and best practices that strengthen the agency's competitive advantage<\/span><\/li><li><span>Partner closely with executive leadership on agency strategy, product development, and long-term growth<\/span><\/li><li><span>Collaborate with Sales on scopes of work and growth opportunities while supporting strategic partner presentations and new business development<\/span><\/li><li><span>Partner with account services and executive leadership on project scoping, budget estimation, and resource planning to ensure creative engagements are staffed appropriately and delivered profitably<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Build &amp; Lead a Best-in-Class Creative Organization<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Lead and develop a multidisciplinary Creative organization of 10+ professionals across Copy, Design, and Video through a leadership structure of Associate Creative Directors<\/span><\/li><li><span>Recruit, mentor, and retain exceptional creative talent while fostering a culture of accountability, curiosity, collaboration, innovation, and continuous improvement<\/span><\/li><li><span>Develop leaders who can scale their respective disciplines while maintaining consistently exceptional creative quality<\/span><\/li><li><span>Build systems, workflows, and operational processes that allow creative excellence to scale without sacrificing speed or craftsmanship<\/span><\/li><li><span>Serve as the executive leader responsible for the overall performance, health, and continued development of the Creative organization<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Lead Creative Strategy Across Every Channel<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Provide executive creative leadership across integrated marketing campaigns spanning awareness through enrollment<\/span><\/li><li><span>Lead creative strategy across brand campaigns, paid social, paid search, websites, landing pages, digital experiences, video, photography, email, and organic content<\/span><\/li><li><span>Partner closely with Strategy, Paid Media, SEO, Web, and Account Services teams to deliver integrated marketing solutions that drive enrollment growth<\/span><\/li><li><span>Help partners uncover and communicate what makes their institution uniquely competitive in an increasingly crowded higher education landscape<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Elevate Creative Performance<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Apply a deep understanding of performance marketing to improve conversion across every stage of the enrollment funnel, from inquiry through enrollment<\/span><\/li><li><span>Ensure creative decisions are informed by strategy, audience insights, testing, and performance data, not simply subjective opinion<\/span><\/li><li><span>Continually evolve creative best practices based on campaign performance, market trends, and emerging consumer behavior<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Lead Kanahoma Productions<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Provide executive creative leadership for Kanahoma Productions, the agency's in-house production company<\/span><\/li><li><span>Lead six-figure productions with meaningful on-set creative direction and collaboration alongside producers, directors, production crews, photographers, and editors<\/span><\/li><li><span>Ensure every production reflects exceptional creative quality while supporting strategic marketing objectives and partner goals<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Own Kanahoma Casting Deliverables<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Play a consultative role in pitching new Casting projects<\/span><\/li><li><span>Develop bespoke Casting approaches for existing partner upsells<\/span><\/li><li><span>Lead all partner-facing Casting presentations<\/span><\/li><li><span>Work closely with the partner to determine audience pool<\/span><\/li><li><span>Develop email and survey content<\/span><\/li><li><span>With needed assistance from Agency Producer, coordinate interviews and follow-ups with respondents<\/span><\/li><li><span>Build out final casting book and, if a production is involved, consult with the wider team on best-fit cast members<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Shape the Future of Creative<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Maintain a strong point of view on emerging trends across AI, organic content, digital platforms, search behavior, creative technology, and the future of marketing<\/span><\/li><li><span>Explore and implement thoughtful applications of AI that elevate creative thinking, improve workflows, and strengthen outcomes without replacing creativity<\/span><\/li><li><span>Encourage experimentation, learning, and innovation throughout the Creative organization<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Serve as a Strategic Agency Leader<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Represent Kanahoma's Creative organization with confidence and credibility in executive presentations, partner meetings, pitches, and strategic consulting engagements<\/span><\/li><li><span>Present creative strategy to CMOs, university presidents, executive leadership teams, and boards of trustees<\/span><\/li><li><span>Serve as a trusted strategic advisor to partners, helping connect institutional objectives with creative solutions that drive measurable growth<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Role Qualifications<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>10+ years of progressive creative leadership experience, including meaningful time within an agency environment<\/span><\/li><li><span>Demonstrated success leading multidisciplinary creative organizations spanning copy, design, video, web, and digital experiences<\/span><\/li><li><span>Proven experience managing and developing creative leaders while building high-performing teams and strong creative cultures<\/span><\/li><li><span>Significant experience concepting and leading integrated marketing campaigns that successfully combine brand storytelling with measurable performance marketing<\/span><\/li><li><span>Deep understanding of paid media creative, paid search, paid social, websites, landing pages, conversion optimization, and full-funnel customer journeys<\/span><\/li><li><span>Meaningful experience developing creative strategies that support complex, multi-step consideration cycles rather than simple awareness campaigns<\/span><\/li><li><span>Demonstrated experience leading website redesigns, digital experience initiatives, and cross-channel creative strategy<\/span><\/li><li><span>Significant experience leading six-figure commercial productions, including meaningful on-set creative leadership<\/span><\/li><li><span>Confidence presenting creative strategy and campaign recommendations to executive leadership, clients, university presidents, and boards<\/span><\/li><li><span>A passion for emerging technology, AI, and the future of marketing, with demonstrated experience leveraging AI to elevate creative thinking, workflows, and outcomes, not replace them<\/span><\/li><li><span>Meaningful higher education marketing experience is strongly preferred; experience in other highly competitive industries is equally valuable, and candidates who bring both perspectives are especially encouraged to apply<\/span><\/li><li><span>A creative portfolio demonstrating candidate experience is required<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Kanahoma's Mission<\/strong><\/p><p><span>Our mission is to build a better agency for organizations building a better world. Whether we're building a brand or driving the bottom line, we pride ourselves on being progressive performance marketers called to serve and support mission-driven organizations across the education and nonprofit industries.<\/span><\/p><p><span>By joining Kanahoma, you are committing to core values that define our (and your) success, and shape how we approach everything we do, every day:<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>We Find A Better Way<\/strong><\/p><p><span>At Kanahoma, we are relentless in our pursuit of building a better agency. So when a solution isn't satisfactory we make our own.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Results Aren't Our Goal, They're Our Engine<\/strong><\/p><p><span>At Kanahoma, winning is a prerequisite. We are constantly pushing to evolve and iterate our work to exceed expectations and ensure our partners get the results they deserve.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Just A-Players<\/strong><\/p><p><span>We play and win as a team. We don't believe that confident, superior work should come at the expense of company culture.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>We Seek to Serve<\/strong><\/p><p><span>We embrace our role as a service business and seek opportunities to go above and beyond for our partners.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>We execute on the above core values by balancing the four pillars of advocacy:<\/strong><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Self Advocacy:<\/strong><span> Asserting and clearly communicating your needs and interests while taking responsibility for personal well-being and decisions<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Team Advocacy:<\/strong><span> Championing your team's needs, addressing their challenges and highlighting their achievements to ensure they have the resources and recognition to succeed<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Business Advocacy:<\/strong><span> Supporting and promoting Kanahoma's goals, securing and\/or requesting the necessary resources to make strategic decisions to drive growth and exceed goals<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Partner Advocacy:<\/strong><span> Representing the partner's needs, goals, and best interests by ensuring their concerns are heard, providing solutions that align with their objectives, and delivering value to build trust and satisfaction<\/span><\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **REVERENCE** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"San Diego, San Diego, California, United States","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-vp-creative-kanahoma-1134447","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-vp-creative-kanahoma-1134447"},{"slug":"remote-temp-hr-coordinator-people-operations-headspace-1134475","id":"1134475","epoch":1783029399,"date":"2026-07-02T21:56:39+00:00","company":"Headspace","company_logo":"","position":"Temp HR Coordinator People Operations","tags":["hr","education","coordinator","customer support","exec","content writing","ops","medical"],"description":"<p><strong>About the Temp HR Coordinator, People Operations<\/strong><strong>\u00c2\u00a0at Headspace:<\/strong><\/p><p>The Temp HR Coordinator is a foundational member of the People Operations team, providing tactical and operational support across the employee lifecycle. This role works closely with and directly supports the Lead HR Generalist, helping to execute day-to-day HR activities with accuracy, care, and a strong sense of ownership. You're someone who has seen enough to hit the ground running, knows how to figure things out when you don't have all the answers, and takes pride in delivering a great employee experience through the details.<\/p><p>This is a great fit for someone early in their HR career who is proactive, resourceful, and eager to grow within a mission-driven health tech company.<\/p><p><em>This is a 3-month US-based, remote Temp role, with an expected schedule of 40 hours per week.\u00c2\u00a0<\/em><\/p><p><strong>What you will do:<\/strong><\/p><p><strong>Support the Employee Lifecycle<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Assist the Lead HR Generalist with employee and contractor lifecycle activities, including onboarding, contract extensions, offboarding, role changes, and internal transfers.<\/li><li>Coordinate and complete HR administrative tasks that support accurate, timely execution across the employee experience<\/li><li>Maintain employee records and ensure data integrity across People systems<\/li><li>Serve as the primary HR Operations point of contact supporting Provider Activation team for Care hiring<\/li><\/ul><p><strong>People Ops Inbox &amp; Employee Support<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Serve as a first-line responder for People Ops inquiries, triaging questions and resolving routine requests with speed and accuracy<\/li><li>Escalate complex or sensitive issues to the Lead HR Generalist with appropriate context and documentation<\/li><li>Help maintain and improve self-service resources so employees can find answers quickly<\/li><\/ul><p><strong>Operational Support &amp; Documentation<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Support the development and maintenance of SOPs, process guides, and internal documentation for employee &amp; manager training of HR Operations processes<\/li><li>Assist in tracking and following up on open HR tasks, compliance items, and employee change workflows<\/li><li>Identify patterns in recurring questions or requests and surface them to the Lead Generalist to inform process improvements<\/li><\/ul><p><strong>What you will bring<\/strong>:<\/p><p><strong>Required Skills:<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>At least 2 years of HR experience, with exposure to HR operations, generalist work<\/li><li>Comfortable operating in a fast-paced environment where not everything is defined. You know how to find the answer or ask the right person<\/li><li>Strong attention to detail and follow-through; people count on you to close the loop<\/li><li>Clear, professional communicator, both written and verbal, across all levels of the organization<\/li><li>Experience with HRIS systems (ChartHop &amp; ADP experience a plus) and comfortable \u00c2\u00a0learning new tools<\/li><li>Genuine curiosity about people programs, process, and what makes HR work well at scale<\/li><li>High degree of discretion and judgment when handling sensitive employee information<\/li><\/ul><p><strong>Pay:<br><\/strong><em>This is a 3-month US-based, remote Temp role, with an expected schedule of 40 hours per week.<\/em><\/p><p>The anticipated hourly rate for this temporary position is $34.61-$43.27 per hour.<br>Our pay ranges are based on the role, level, and location, and reflect the lowest to highest geographic markets where we are hiring for this role within the United States. Within this range, individual pay is determined by a candidate's location as well as a range of factors including but not limited to: unique relevant experience, job-related skills, and education or training.<\/p><p>Our team will provide more details on the specific hourly rate for your location during the hiring process.<\/p><p><strong>About Headspace<\/strong><\/p><p>Headspace exists to provide every person access to lifelong mental health support. We combine evidence-based content, clinical care, and innovative technology to help millions of members around the world get support that\u00e2\u0080\u0099s effective, personalized, and truly accessible whenever and wherever they need it.<\/p><p>At Headspace, our values aren\u00e2\u0080\u0099t just what we believe, they\u00e2\u0080\u0099re how we work, grow, and make an impact together. We live them daily: <strong>Make the Mission Matter, Iterate to Great, Own the Outcome, and Connect with Courage.<\/strong> These values shape our decisions, guide our collaborations, and define our culture. They\u00e2\u0080\u0099re our shared commitment to building a more connected, human-centered team\u00e2\u0080\u0094one that\u00e2\u0080\u0099s redefining how mental health care supports people today and for generations to come.<\/p><p><strong>Why You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Love Working Here:<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>A mission that matters\u00e2\u0080\u0094with impact you can see and feel<\/li><li>A culture that\u00e2\u0080\u0099s collaborative, inclusive, and grounded in our values<\/li><li>The chance to shape what mental health care looks like next<\/li><li>Competitive pay and benefits that support your whole self<\/li><\/ul><p><strong>How we feel about Diversity, Equity, Inclusion and Belonging:<\/strong><\/p><p>Headspace is committed to bringing together humans from different backgrounds and perspectives, providing employees with a safe and welcoming work environment free of discrimination and harassment. We strive to create a diverse &amp; inclusive environment where everyone can thrive, feel a sense of belonging, and do impactful work together.\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><p>As an equal opportunity employer, we prohibit any unlawful discrimination against a job applicant on the basis of their race, color, religion, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, national origin, family or parental status, disability*, age, veteran status, or any other status protected by the laws or regulations in the locations where we operate. We respect the laws enforced by the EEOC and are dedicated to going above and beyond in fostering diversity across our workplace.\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><p><em>*Applicants with disabilities may be entitled to reasonable accommodation under the terms of the Americans with Disabilities Act and certain state or local laws. A reasonable accommodation is a change in the way things are normally done which will ensure an equal employment opportunity without imposing undue hardship on Headspace.\u00c2\u00a0<\/em><strong><em>Please inform our Talent Acquisition team by filling out\u00c2\u00a0<\/em><\/strong><strong><em>this form<\/em><\/strong><strong><em> if you need any assistance completing any forms or to otherwise participate in the application or interview process.<\/em><\/strong><\/p><p><em>Headspace participates in the <\/em><em>E-Verify Program<\/em><em>.<\/em><\/p><p><strong><em>Privacy Statement<\/em><\/strong><\/p><p><em><span>All member records are protected according to our<\/span><span> <\/span><span>Privacy Policy<\/span><span>. Further, while employees of Headspace (formerly Ginger) cannot access Headspace products\/services, they will be offered benefits according to the company's benefit plan. To ensure we are adhering to best practice and ethical guidelines in the field of mental health, we take care to avoid dual relationships. A dual relationship occurs when a mental health care provider has a second, significantly different relationship with their client in addition to the traditional client-therapist relationship\u00e2\u0080\u0094including, for example, a managerial relationship.\u00c2\u00a0\u00c2\u00a0<\/span><\/em><\/p><p><em><span>As such, Headspace requests that individuals who have received coaching or clinical services at Headspace wait until their care with Headspace is complete before applying for a position. If someone with a Headspace account is hired for a position, please note their account will be deactivated and they will not be able to use Headspace services for the duration of their employment.\u00c2\u00a0<\/span><\/em><\/p><p><em><span>Further, if Headspace cannot find a role that fails to resolve an ethical issue associated with a dual relationship, Headspace may need to take steps to ensure ethical obligations are being adhered to, including a delayed start date or a potential leave of absence. Such steps would be taken to protect both the former member, as well as any relevant individuals from their care team, from impairment, risk of exploitation, or harm.<\/span><\/em><\/p><p>For how how we will use the personal information you provide as part of the application process, please see:\u00c2\u00a0https:\/\/www.headspace.com\/applicant-notice<\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **MERRINESS** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Austin, Austin, Texas, United States","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-temp-hr-coordinator-people-operations-headspace-1134475","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-temp-hr-coordinator-people-operations-headspace-1134475"},{"slug":"remote-vp-paid-media-kanahoma-1134459","id":"1134459","epoch":1783027554,"date":"2026-07-02T21:25:54+00:00","company":"Kanahoma","company_logo":"","position":"VP Paid Media","tags":["design","consulting","exec","customer support","testing","marketing","web dev","video","education","seo","content writing","senior","ops","sales","golang","medical","digital nomad","travel","finance","stats","engineer","shopify","speech","full time","part time","hr","c","legal","coordinator","dev","cloud","excel","sys admin","game dev","english teacher","teaching","linguistics","analyst","crypto","controller","recruiter","project manager","infosec","adult","ecommerce"],"description":"<p><strong>Role Description<\/strong><\/p><p><span>The Vice President, Paid Media, is the senior-most Paid Media leader at Kanahoma, responsible for the strategic direction, performance, and continuous evolution of the agency\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Paid Media practice. Reporting directly to the SVP, Marketing, the VP, Paid Media fully owns the Paid Media product, from strategy and team leadership to execution quality and partner outcomes.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><span>This leader, who will define what Kanahoma's paid media product and team become, bringing a strong point of view on will define what it becomes, bringing a strong point of view on attribution, the future of search, and creative strategy in a world where paid media will look fundamentally different in five years. This individual directly manages the Paid Media team, drives year-over-year enrollment growth across the partner portfolio, actively contributes to agency operations and new business development, and leads the integration of AI tools and emerging technologies to keep Kanahoma at the forefront of performance marketing.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Role Responsibilities<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Own Paid Media as a <\/span><strong>Product<\/strong><\/li><li><span>Serve as the Paid Media product owner, defining and evolving product strategy, standards, and vision in collaboration with the SVP, Marketing<\/span><\/li><li><span>Translate agency-level strategy into actionable paid media frameworks, processes, and playbooks, leveraging AI tools to accelerate development and improve consistency<\/span><\/li><li><span>Partner with the Accounts team on upsells and partner renewals, identifying and championing opportunities to expand Paid Media scope<\/span><\/li><li><span>Represent the Paid Media team in partner pitches and AOR conversations<\/span><\/li><li><span>Collaborate with the SVP, Marketing on SOW development, resource planning, and new business pipeline<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><ul><li><span>Build &amp; Lead A Best-in-Class <\/span><strong>Paid Media Team<\/strong><\/li><li><span>Directly manage Sr. Directors and Directors of Paid Media, serving as the primary leadership layer for the full Paid Media team<\/span><\/li><li><span>Lead by example; take ownership and execute with a sense of urgency<\/span><\/li><li><span>\u00e2\u0080\u009cYes, but\u00e2\u0080\u009d Culture \u00e2\u0080\u0094 always presenting solutions when tasked with an opportunity<\/span><\/li><li><span>Recruit, develop, and retain top paid media talent; actively support hiring and onboarding across all levels of the team<\/span><\/li><li><span>Champion AI fluency across the team, ensuring all Paid Media team members are trained on and actively utilizing approved AI tools in their day-to-day workflows<\/span><\/li><li><span>Conduct weekly one-on-ones with direct reports<\/span><\/li><li><span>Hold quarterly skip-level meetings with all Paid Media team members who are not direct reports<\/span><\/li><li><span>Set, track, and evaluate direct reports\u00e2\u0080\u0099 annual and bi-annual goals, aligned with performance reviews<\/span><\/li><li><span>Execute bi-annual performance reviews for all direct reports<\/span><\/li><li><span>Escalate team concerns to the SVP, Marketing or through L10 discussions<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><ul><li><span>Own Paid Media <\/span><strong>Performance<\/strong><\/li><li><span>Meet or exceed partner inquiry, application, and start goals across all Paid Media books of business<\/span><\/li><li><span>Ensure all Paid Media campaigns come within 5% of planned spend goals<\/span><\/li><li><span>Maintain a thorough understanding of partner portfolio performance for L10 weekly meetings, including budget pacing and performance metrics<\/span><\/li><li><span>Identify and implement AI-powered optimization strategies to improve campaign performance, reduce inefficiencies, and drive stronger partner outcomes<\/span><\/li><li><span>Ensure all deadlines are delivered on time; communicate early and often when delays arise<\/span><\/li><li><span>Serve as the senior escalation point for all Paid Media account service interruptions, ensuring timely resolution and proactive partner communication<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><ul><li><span>Own Kanahoma\u00e2\u0080\u0099s <\/span><strong>Forward-Looking Paid Media POV<\/strong><\/li><li><span>Serve as Kanahoma\u00e2\u0080\u0099s primary voice on where paid media is headed, across attribution, search evolution, and creative strategy, and translate that POV into a concrete roadmap for the practice<\/span><\/li><li><span>Bring a strong perspective on cross-channel attribution: what\u00e2\u0080\u0099s working, what\u00e2\u0080\u0099s broken, and how to build measurement frameworks that reflect real business outcomes in a multi-step acquisition model<\/span><\/li><li><span>Maintain an informed, opinionated view on the future of paid search\u00e2\u0080\u0094including AI-driven bidding, the evolution of match types, and the shift in how intent is captured and monetized<\/span><\/li><li><span>Drive creative strategy thinking across the paid team, with a clear POV on how creative will evolve as generative AI matures and platform automation increases<\/span><\/li><li><span>Regularly share POV with agency leadership and partners; represent Kanahoma\u00e2\u0080\u0099s perspective in industry conversations and new business contexts<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><br><\/p><ul><li><span>Develop, own and execute a recurring Paid Media <\/span><strong>Testing<\/strong><span> process<\/span><\/li><li><span>Drive a culture of innovation across the Paid Media team, ensuring Kanahoma remains a leader in the performance marketing landscape<\/span><\/li><li><span>Own the annual and quarterly paid media testing roadmap; oversee performance readouts shared with partners and internal teams<\/span><\/li><li><span>Identify and evaluate new channels, platforms, and ad units to test across the portfolio, including AI-native and AI-enhanced media opportunities<\/span><\/li><li><span>Work with existing vendors to identify new ad units and AI-powered targeting or bidding capabilities to test<\/span><\/li><li><span>Build and standardize the creative testing process; leverage AI tools to accelerate creative iteration and analysis<\/span><\/li><li><span>Own landing page testing as a core component of the paid media testing program; partner closely with the Web team on conversion rate optimization (CRO) initiatives to ensure a cohesive experience from ad click to lead generation and applications<\/span><\/li><li><span>Ensure quarterly creative refresh requests are made for every partner based on prior quarter testing results<\/span><\/li><li><span>Deliver quarterly creative performance results to the Creative Services team<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><ul><li><span>Own Paid Media Performance<\/span><strong> Reporting and Planning<\/strong><\/li><li><span>Partner with key accounts to define client reporting metrics and cadence; ensure deliverables meet or exceed partner expectations<\/span><\/li><li><span>Collaborate with the Data and Analytics team to ensure Daily Trackers and performance reports leverage partner CRM and platform data accurately<\/span><\/li><li><span>Identify opportunities to leverage AI for automated reporting, anomaly detection, and predictive insights that improve decision-making speed and accuracy<\/span><\/li><li><span>Own Paid Media data accuracy and reporting integrity across the full portfolio<\/span><\/li><li><span>Own the annual, quarterly, and monthly Paid Media planning process, including:<\/span><\/li><li><span>Overall strategy<\/span><\/li><li><span>Forecasting<\/span><\/li><li><span>Plan execution<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><ul><li><span>Support Agency <\/span><strong>Operations<\/strong><\/li><li><span>Actively participate in the agency\u00e2\u0080\u0099s EOS process, including weekly L10 meetings and quarterly right person right seat (RPRS) exercises as directed by the SVP, Marketing<\/span><\/li><li><span>Collaborate with the SVP, Marketing to manage Paid Media team resource allocation, billability targets (80\u00e2\u0080\u009390% per employee), and coverage planning<\/span><\/li><li><span>Support the agency\u00e2\u0080\u0099s international staffing strategy as it relates to Paid Media capacity and margin improvement<\/span><\/li><li><span>Ensure all Paid Media projects are properly managed within the agency project management system; identify opportunities to leverage AI to streamline workflows and expand templated processes<\/span><\/li><li><span>Track and escalate paused jobs, red reports, change orders, and other flags to the SVP, Marketing as needed<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><ul><li><span>Lead Paid Media <\/span><strong>AI Enablement<\/strong><\/li><li><span>Serve as the Paid Media team\u00e2\u0080\u0099s primary champion for AI adoption, working closely with the SVP, Marketing and external consultants to identify, evaluate, and implement AI tools that create meaningful workflow improvements<\/span><\/li><li><span>Lead successful AI pilots within Paid Media, including scoping, execution, performance measurement, and socialization of results across the agency<\/span><\/li><li><span>Continuously assess the AI tool landscape \u00e2\u0080\u0094 including platform-native AI features across Google, Meta, and programmatic channels \u00e2\u0080\u0094 to ensure Kanahoma is leveraging best-in-class capabilities<\/span><\/li><li><span>Develop and maintain AI usage guidelines and best practices specific to Paid Media workflows, ensuring responsible, effective, and consistent adoption across the team<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><span>&nbsp;<\/span><strong>Role Qualifications<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>10\u00e2\u0080\u009312+ years of progressive performance marketing experience, including 5+ years managing Paid Media teams<\/span><\/li><li><span>Proven experience managing a paid book of business of $50M+ annually<\/span><\/li><li><span>Proven experience in a multi-step, lead-to-sale acquisition environment is required,&nbsp; industries such as education, insurance, financial services, considered D2C, or other high-volume lead-gen categories. Higher-ed experience, ideally in the adult\/online segment, is strongly preferred.<\/span><\/li><li><span>Cross-industry experience is a strong plus, we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re especially interested in candidates who can bring proven paid strategies from outside higher ed (e.g., insurance, financial services, e-commerce, or other lead-gen-driven categories) and adapt them to our multi-step acquisition model.<\/span><\/li><li><span>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re looking for someone who has built paid media solutions from the ground up, not just optimized a polished big-agency machine. Experience standing up teams, processes, channel strategies, and measurement frameworks in environments that didn\u00e2\u0080\u0099t have them is a meaningful differentiator.<\/span><\/li><li><span>A strong, opinionated POV on the future of paid media, including where attribution is headed, how search is evolving, and what creative strategy looks like as AI and automation reshape the channel mix.<\/span><\/li><li><span>Demonstrated experience building, managing, and developing teams of 5 or more across multiple levels<\/span><\/li><li><span>Exceptional communication, leadership, and strategic thinking skills<\/span><\/li><li><span>Comfort in a player-coach role, balancing team leadership with senior-level Paid Media contribution<\/span><\/li><li><span>Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate data into actionable strategy<\/span><\/li><li><span>Demonstrated success in partner-facing roles with a customer service focus<\/span><\/li><li><span>Previous leadership experience in an agency environment preferred<\/span><\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **BLISS** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"San Diego, San Diego, California, United States","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-vp-paid-media-kanahoma-1134459","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-vp-paid-media-kanahoma-1134459"},{"slug":"remote-procurement-coordinator-cxc-upstream-ltd-1134473","id":"1134473","epoch":1783022779,"date":"2026-07-02T20:06:19+00:00","company":"CXC Upstream Ltd","company_logo":"","position":"Procurement Coordinator","tags":["design","vfx","designer","technical","dev","marketing","exec","medical","engineer","digital nomad","virtual assistant","education","customer support","video","microsoft","ops","excel","sys admin","coordinator","finance"],"description":"<p><strong>The Company<\/strong><\/p><p>CXC Upstream is a vertically integrated mining group and one of the region\u00e2\u0080\u0099s leading gold producers, with a substantial operating footprint in Geita, one of Tanzania\u00e2\u0080\u0099s most prolific gold-producing regions.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>The Group owns and operates four mining sites, including a major mountain-based gold asset supported by more than 50 years of demonstrable gold reserves.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>Its operations extend across the entire mining value chain. Alongside its mining assets, the Group owns a dedicated precious metals processing facility, maintains its own fleet of specialist mining machinery and has dedicated private aviation capability to support the efficient movement of personnel, equipment and resources across its operations.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>Across the Group, governance, ESG oversight and operational transparency are aligned with the principles promoted by the International Council on Mining and Metals (ICMM).<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>About the Role<\/strong><\/p><p>As Procurement Coordinator, you will support the sourcing and procurement of goods, equipment and specialist services across CXC Upstream's mining operations. Working closely with operational teams and suppliers, you will help ensure the timely acquisition of materials and services that support safe, efficient and uninterrupted mining activities across the Group.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Assist with sourcing, evaluating and onboarding suppliers of mining equipment, consumables, engineering services and operational support.<\/li><li>Manage supplier documentation, compliance records and contractual information to ensure adherence to company policies and regulatory requirements.<\/li><li>Conduct market research to identify competitive suppliers, monitor pricing trends and evaluate alternative sourcing opportunities.<\/li><li>Maintain procurement systems and supplier databases, ensuring accurate record keeping and reporting.<\/li><li>Support supplier negotiations, purchase order administration and contract renewals.<\/li><li>Liaise with operational, engineering and finance teams to ensure procurement activities align with operational priorities.<\/li><li>Monitor supplier performance, delivery schedules and service quality, escalating issues where appropriate.<\/li><li>Support continuous improvement initiatives within the procurement function to drive efficiency and value.<\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>Requirements<\/strong><\/p><ul><li>Previous experience in procurement, purchasing or supply chain coordination, preferably within mining, construction, heavy industry or manufacturing.<\/li><li>Strong organisational and analytical skills with excellent attention to detail.<\/li><li>Experience working with supplier documentation, contracts and procurement systems.<\/li><li>Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.<\/li><li>Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced operational environment.<\/li><li>Proficient in Microsoft Office, with experience using ERP or procurement systems considered advantageous.<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **PERSONALIZED** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). If you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re also naturally curious and eager to keep learning, consider starting or growing your career with us at The Home Depot.<\/strong><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **HOORAY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Victoria, ","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-department-supervisor-the-home-depot-canada-1134409","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-department-supervisor-the-home-depot-canada-1134409"},{"slug":"remote-peer-specialist-maternal-health-canopie-1134450","id":"1134450","epoch":1783017071,"date":"2026-07-02T18:31:11+00:00","company":"Canopie","company_logo":"","position":"Peer Specialist Maternal Health","tags":["design","consulting","exec","customer support","testing","marketing","web dev","video","education","seo","content writing","senior","ops","sales","golang","medical","digital nomad","travel","finance","stats","engineer","shopify","speech","full time","part time"],"description":"Canopie is a digital maternal health company supporting pregnant and postpartum individuals through structured, evidence-based support, education, and care navigation. We meet members where they are offering fully virtual access to coaching, classes, and clinical resources across the perinatal journey.<br><br>We are building a more inclusive and responsive model of care; one that recognizes the value of lived experience alongside clinical expertise.<br><br><strong>Why This Role Matters<br><br><\/strong>Decisions that shape the pregnancy and postpartum experience are deeply personal. Individuals navigating this time benefit from support that reflects real, lived understanding, not just clinical guidance.<br><br>Maternal Health Peer Specialists play a critical role in the care continuum by offering empathetic, experience-informed support. This role helps ensure members feel seen, understood, and empowered to make decisions that align with their own values, needs, and circumstances.<br><br>Peer support is not about directing decisions\u00e2\u0080\u0094it's about creating space, sharing perspective when appropriate, and helping members navigate what feels right for them.<br><br><strong>What You'll Do<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Provide virtual peer support to members across pregnancy and postpartum, grounded in lived experience<\/li><li>Offer empathetic listening, validation, and encouragement through key perinatal transitions<\/li><li>Share personal insights when appropriate to normalize experiences and reduce isolation<\/li><li>Conduct outreach and engagement using structured workflows and communication tools<\/li><li>Support members in navigating common challenges (emotional wellbeing, identity shifts, recovery, feeding, sleep, returning to work)<\/li><li>Encourage connection to Canopie services (coaching, classes, clinical care) based on member needs<\/li><li>Recognize when additional or clinical support may be needed and follow defined escalation pathways<\/li><li>Document interactions clearly and consistently within Canopie's platform<\/li><li>Communicate with members via phone, video, and secure messaging<\/li><li>Participate in training, supervision, and peer support development<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Scope &amp; Boundaries<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>This is a non-clinical role and does not provide medical or mental health treatment<\/li><li>Peer Specialists do not diagnose or direct care decisions<\/li><li>The focus is on support, connection, and helping members navigate available resources<\/li><li>Clear escalation pathways are in place for clinical or higher-risk needs<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><strong>Who Thrives in This Role<br><br><\/strong><strong>Required<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Lived experience with pregnancy and\/or the postpartum period within the last :3-5 years<\/li><li>Ability to thoughtfully reflect on and use personal experience to support others in a balanced, appropriate way<\/li><li>Some experience in maternal health, peer support, community-based work, or caregiving roles<\/li><li>Comfortable providing virtual support and building connection in a digital environment<\/li><li>Strong interpersonal and communication skills with a warm, non-judgmental approach<\/li><li>Ability to follow structured workflows while maintaining authenticity in interactions<\/li><li>Strong digital literacy (video platforms, messaging tools, documentation systems)<\/li><li>Reliable, organized, and responsive in a remote setting<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Preferred<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Experience in peer support roles (formal or informal)<\/li><li>Exposure to perinatal mental health, coaching, or support groups<\/li><li>Background working with diverse or underserved populations<\/li><li>Bilingual (Spanish\/English)<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Schedule &amp; Commitment<br><br><ul><li>Part-time contractor role (approximately 20 hours\/week; varies by program needs)<\/li><li>Availability during business hours required; evening and weekend availability is a plus<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benefits<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Fully remote, digital-first care model<\/li><li>Ongoing clinical training, peer consultation, and supervision<\/li><li>Opportunity to help build equitable access to maternal health support at scale<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **ENTHUSIASTICALLY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=).
