Fresha is used by 140,000+ businesses and 450,000+ stylists and professionals worldwide, processing over 1 billion appointments to date.<br><br>The company is headquartered in London, United Kingdom, with 15 global offices located across North America, EMEA and APAC.<br><br>Fresha allows consumers to discover, book and pay for beauty and wellness appointments with local businesses via its marketplace, while beauty and wellness businesses and professionals use an all-in-one platform to manage their entire operations with an intuitive business software and financial technology solutions.<br><br>Fresha\u00e2\u0080\u0099s ecosystem gives merchants everything they need to run their business seamlessly by facilitating appointment bookings, point-of-sale, customer records management, marketing automation, loyalty, beauty products inventory and team management.<br><br>The consumer marketplace unlocks revenue potential for partner businesses by leveraging the power of online bookings and automated marketing through mobile apps and advanced integrations with major tech brands including Instagram, Facebook and Google.<br><br><strong>What You Will Be Doing<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>KPIs - Consistently achieve sales targets<\/li><li>Outreach - Calling key decision-makers using phone, email &amp; social touches with the goal of bringing on new business (there may be some in-person meetings as appropriate)<\/li><li>Selling - Present, promote and sell products and services through product demos to prospective and existing partners<\/li><li>Sales Cycle - Managing the entire sales process from prospecting to close<\/li><li>Partnering - Perform cost-benefit and needs analysis with existing\/potential partners in order to align our solutions to their needs and business objectives<\/li><li>Collaboration - Work closely with other departments to ensure a seamless partner experience<\/li><li>Market Trends - Provide feedback about ongoing trends in the industry<\/li><li>Leads - Contact 100% of qualified inbound leads in a timely manner, and document all call outcomes in the CRM<\/li><li>Business Partnering - Serve as a lead point of contact for partners on all commercial activities<\/li><li>This list is not exhaustive and there may be other activities you are required to deliver. <br><br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What We Are Looking For<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Experience - Minimum 1 years of solid B2B sales with a track record of success<\/li><li>Industry - SaaS, online marketplaces, or payment platforms is highly desirable<\/li><li>Relationship Building - You are a true hunter and relationship builder<\/li><li>Organised - You can multitask, prioritise and manage time effectively<\/li><li>Curiosity - You are naturally curious and have a desire to continually grow and develop<br><br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Added bonus <br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Bi-lingual - Fluency in Portuguese &amp; English<\/li><li>Any other another language is a bonus!<\/li><li>Beauty &amp; Wellness - Experience within the beauty and wellness industry<\/li><li>At Fresha, we value passion and potential as much as specific skills. If you&apos;re enthusiastic and eager to learn, we encourage you to apply, even if you don&apos;t meet every listed requirement. We believe in fostering growth and providing the support needed for you to excel in your role<br><br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Interview Process<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Screen Call - Video-call with a member from the Talent Team (30 mins)<\/li><li>Skills &amp; Experience - Video\/In-person interview with Head of Sales (Europe) (45 mins)<\/li><li>Presentation - Online Case Study for 60 minutes with Team Lead of Business Development &amp; General Manager of Spain<br><br><br><\/li><\/ul><em>We aim to finalise the entire interview process and deliver feedback within <\/em><strong><em>2 weeks.<br><br><\/em><\/strong><ul><li>Every job application received is reviewed manually by our talent team. While we strive to assess applications within 7 days, the sheer volume of talented individuals expressing interest may occasionally extend this timeframe<br><br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Inclusive workforce <br><br><\/strong>At Fresha, we are creating a culture where individuals of all backgrounds feel comfortable.<br><br>We want all Fresha people to feel included and truly empowered to contribute fully to our vision and goals. Everyone who applies will receive fair consideration for employment.<br><br>We do not discriminate based on race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, age, marital status, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other applicable legally protected characteristics in the location in which the candidate is applying.<br><br>If you have any accessibility requirements that would make you more comfortable during the interview process and\/or once you join, please let us know so that we can support you.<br><br>We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. Whether it's a fashion launch, tech activation, beauty pop-up, or anything in between, we craft memorable, high-impact brand moments. Our work cuts through the noise with creative, strategic activations that leave a lasting impact.<br><br><strong>About The Role<br><br><\/strong>We're are building out our Freelancer list with a focus on Producers based in LA, NYC, Miami and Austin. We are looking for detail-obsessed, hustle-friendly Experiential Producers to help plan and execute brand experiences, from pop-ups and campus tours to large-scale street activations. You'll own projects end to end, including: scoping, budgeting, vendor wrangling, timelines, permits, onsite ops, and post-event wrap. The right candidate breathes our values - Transcend, Innovate, Egoless and Present - in everything they do. Experience with mobile activations using vehicles is a plus.<br><br><strong>What You'll Do<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Pre-Production<\/li><ul><li>Build production timelines, runs of show, and checklists<\/li><li>Source and manage vendors <\/li><li>Build and maintain accurate production budgets<\/li><li>Support permitting and compliance<\/li><li>Coordinate creative deliverables<\/li><\/ul><li>Client &amp; Internal Coordination <\/li><ul><li>Act as the quarterback across teams and clients - keeping projects, systems and stakeholders aligned and ensuring unparalleled communication and follow-through<\/li><li>Partner with design, social\/content, and account teams to keep everything on-brand and on-point<\/li><\/ul><li>Onsite Execution<\/li><ul><li>Take the lead on event ops, making sure every detail comes together perfectly\u00e2\u0080\u0094curveballs included<\/li><\/ul><li>Post-Event<\/li><ul><li>Collect key event metrics, organize photo and video highlights, and turn insights into recap decks and actionable takeaways for future tours<br><br><\/li><\/ul><\/ul><strong>How We Work<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Fast-moving, highly collaborative team that values proactive problem-solving<\/li><li>Clear ownership with support from senior producers and check-in cadences<\/li><li>Safety-first mindset and respect for community\/venue rules<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Compensation<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>$60-100\/hr <\/li><li>$750-1k per day for on-site event management + travel and lodging<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><strong>You Have<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> 2-5 years in experiential\/events\/production, agency or brand side<\/li><li>Experience owning project coordination from start to finish<\/li><li>Strong organization and follow-through; you live in spreadsheets and checklists<\/li><li>Clear, professional communication with clients and vendors. <\/li><li>Willing to work early mornings, nights, weekends as needed<\/li><li>Proficiency with Google Workspace; familiarity with GSuite\/Monday\/Hubspot or similar<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Extra Points (Nice to Have)<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Hands-on experience with mobile\/vehicle activations (food trucks, step vans, trailers), including wraps, generator\/power, parking plans, and DOT basics<\/li><li>Knowledge of NYC\/major-market permitting<\/li><li>Basic Adobe\/Canva skills<\/li><li>Experience with generative Al<\/li><li>Experience staffing brand ambassadors and training teams onsite<\/li><li>Comfort with measurement tools (QR flows, foot-traffic counters, surveys)<\/li><li>A valid driver's license<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benefits<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Competitive Medical, Dental &amp; Vision insurance<\/li><li>Paid vacation &amp; sick time<\/li><li>401k matching<\/li><li>Professional Development support <\/li><li>Work from Home flexibility (up to 75 days per year)<\/li><li>Bonus potential in addition to base salary compensation<\/li><li>Weekend work stipend<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **SUCCESSES** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). dare<br><br><\/strong><\/strong><ul><li>Pianificare e realizzare la revisione della Classificazione Svizzera degli Interventi Chirurgici CHOP<\/li><li>Pianificare e realizzare la revisione della CHOP, compresa la gestione del progetto<\/li><li>Gestire attivamente gli stakeholder e i gruppi di interesse nonch\u00c3\u00a9 la comunicazioneesterna<\/li><li>Garantire la tracciabilit\u00c3\u00a0 del contraddistingue<br><br><\/strong><\/strong><ul><li>Diploma universitario in scienze dell'informazione con perfezionamento in campo medico o diploma universitario in ambito sanitario (medico, infermiere\/a FH, terapista o formazione equivalente) con formazione continua in scienze dell'informazione (biblioteconomia o documentazione) (SUP o titolare di una formazione equivalente) o formazione di base come documentalista medico\/a. In alternativa, un diploma universitario in informatica medica<\/li><li>Conoscenze e interesse per linguaggi d'indicizzazione documentale medica e sistemi di terminologia (classificazioni, nomenclature, terminologie, tesauri ecc.)<\/li><li>Buone competenze comunicative (scritte e orali)<\/li><li>Esperienza nella gestione di progetti<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong><strong>In sintesi<br><br><\/strong><\/strong>Sar\u00c3\u00a0 responsabile della pianificazione e della realizzazione della revisione della CHOP con il coinvolgimento degli stakeholder interessati del settore sanitario e far\u00c3\u00a0 parte del team del programma DigiSant\u00c3\u00a9 per la trasformazione digitale nel settore sanitario.<br><br><strong><strong>Che cosa offriamo<br><br><\/strong><\/strong><ul><li>Lavorare per la Svizzera Ci adoperiamo per il modello di successo svizzero e lavoriamo per il benessere della popolazione.<\/li><li>Vivere la diversit\u00c3\u00a0 La concretizzazione delle pari opportunit\u00c3\u00a0 ci consente di esprimere al meglio le nostre competenze e di contemplare punti di vista differenti.<\/li><li>In forma sul posto di lavoro Forniamo supporto e consulenza alle nostre collaboratrici e ai nostri collaboratori sulla tematica della salute fisica e mentale.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Tutti i benefit<br><br><strong><strong>La statistica conta. Anche per voi.<br><br><\/strong><\/strong>L'Ufficio federale di statistica (UST) \u00c3\u00a8 il centro di competenza nazionale della statistica pubblica e il fulcro dell'ecosistema dei dati svizzero. Produce informazioni statistiche, si impegna, attraverso la gestione dei dati a livello nazionale, a favore di dati armonizzati e utilizza metodi di scienza dei dati per estrarre ulteriori informazioni dai dati. In questo modo l'UST contribuisce a formare l'opinione pubblica fornendo un importante contributo alla moderna governance democratica.<br><br><strong><strong>Informazioni complementari<br><br><\/strong><\/strong><strong><strong>Domande sul posto di lavoro<br><br><\/strong><\/strong><strong>Markus Trutmann<\/strong> Responsabile di settore +41 58 46 30630<br><br><strong><strong>Domande sulla candidatura<br><br><\/strong><\/strong><strong>Marianne Zumbach<\/strong> Responsabile presso il Servizio del personale<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **TITILLATING** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Bluecore principals have owned and operated a multifamily portfolio totaling more than 16,000 units located in high-growth secondary markets. Bluecore's competitive advantage stems from its long-standing industry relationships and its fully integrated property management, asset management, and data analytics platform.<br><br>Since 2018, Bluecore principals have been investing preferred equity in multifamily assets on behalf of large institutional investors. In 2022, Bluecore principals were the largest seller of multifamily in the US and has consistently delivered exceptional results, with deal-level IRRs exceeding 30% annually since inception. Going forward, Bluecore is looking to acquire high-quality multifamily assets across the Sunbelt and continue to invest preferred equity in multifamily development projects.<br><br>Bluecore is adding an <strong>Asset Management<\/strong> <strong>Analyst<\/strong> to sit in the intersection of Operations and the Investment team. This role offers direct exposure to our Founders and they will working closely with senior leadership. Our Asset Management Analyst will support budgeting, underwriting analysis, and operational performance monitoring across our multifamily portfolio. This role is responsible for ensuring that asset-level operating performance is measured against underwriting assumptions and annual budgets \u00e2\u0080\u0094 and for explaining why it diverges when it does. This is a high-visibility seat with direct exposure to portfolio leadership and a strong pathway into asset management or acquisitions.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Asset Management<\/li><ul><li>Prepare monthly and quarterly variance-to-budget analyses, decomposing variances into operational drivers (occupancy, lease trade-outs, renewals, controllable expenses), market conditions (rent trends, concessions, supply), and comparable property performance<\/li><li>Maintain and enhance market comp sets; track submarket rent, occupancy, and concession data to contextualize asset performance<\/li><li>Partner with Property Management to identify performance gaps, validate budget assumptions, and track corrective action plans<\/li><li>Build and maintain Excel models and reporting tools for budget-vs-actual tracking, trend analysis, and portfolio rollups<\/li><li>Extract and analyze property management system data (Yardi or similar) to support recurring reporting and ad hoc analysis<\/li><\/ul><li>Analyze Underwriting<\/li><ul><li>Analyze underwriting budgets and operating assumptions for multifamily assets at acquisition and throughout the hold period<\/li><li>Support investment reporting materials, including memos, return analysis, and scenario modeling<\/li><li>Assist in due diligence processes, including review of third-party reports and financial data<\/li><\/ul><li>Budgeting<\/li><ul><li>Support the annual budgeting process: build, model, and stress-test property-level operating budgets in partnership with Asset Management and Property Management<\/li><\/ul><li>Investor Reporting<\/li><ul><li>Support investor reporting with asset-level performance narratives and supporting schedules<\/li><li>Assist Asset Management with hold\/sell analyses, refinancing support, and business plan updates<\/li><li>as needed<\/li><\/ul><li>AI &amp; Process Optimization<\/li><ul><li>Leverage AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, Excel integrations) to streamline analysis, underwriting, reporting, and workflows<\/li><li>Help develop and refine internal processes to improve efficiency and scalability<\/li><li>Identify opportunities to automate recurring analyses and enhance data quality<br><br><\/li><\/ul><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Accounting, Business, or a related field<\/li><li>You have 1-4 years of experience in multifamily or commercial real estate \u00e2\u0080\u0094 asset management, property accounting, acquisitions, FP&amp;A, or valuation\/appraisal backgrounds all considered<\/li><li>You have strong financial modeling skills in Excel, including the ability to build and audit models<\/li><li>You have familiarity with multifamily operating statements and key metrics, including NOI, economic occupancy, trade-outs, and expense ratios<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Preferred Requirements:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>You have exposure to AI tools for investment workflows<\/li><li>You have experience with Yardi, RealPage, Entrata, or comparable property management systems<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Benefits<br><br><\/strong><strong>Performance Bonuses<\/strong>- Our corporate team participates in performance-based bonuses.<br><br><strong>Paid Time Off<\/strong>- Unlimited DTO starting upon hire.<br><br><strong>Mentorship- <\/strong>Work with an experienced team of multifamily investment professionals.<br><br><strong>Holiday Pay<\/strong>- 10 full paid holidays.<br><br><strong>Paid Volunteer Hours<\/strong>- 8 hours of paid volunteer time you can use throughout the year.<br><br><strong>Housing Discounts<\/strong>- 25% off rent available for all employees off any unit.<br><br><strong>Comprehensive Insurance Benefits<\/strong>- Medical PPO, HDHP, FSA, HSA with employer match, Dental, Vision, STD, &amp; LTD.<br><br><strong>Retirement Plan<\/strong>- 401K with a 25% company match up to 6%.<br><br><strong>Travel &amp; Personal Discounts<\/strong>- Company rate National\/Enterprise rental cars for leisure travel, plus additional discounts with Verizon (18% discount) and Expedia (10% discount).<br><br><strong>Certification Reimbursement<\/strong>- Full reimbursement for approved industry related certifications, including CAM, CPO, EPA, and more!<br><br><strong>Tech Forward &amp; Transparent Culture<\/strong>- Innovative internal software to make your job easier!<br><br><strong>Cultural Appeal<\/strong>- We run on transparency and healthy debate (No Fear of Conflict); you are encouraged to appeal and share what is not working well. Your voice truly matters!<br><br>EOE<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **REASONABLE** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re a digital marketing agency that drives meaningful impact across the entire customer journey by integrating media, creative, analytics, influencer, and retail strategies into performance-driven campaigns.<br><br>Donut Studios is our in-house creative studio, purpose-built to craft high-performing, platform-native, and digital content for the world\u00e2\u0080\u0099s most ambitious brands. In this role, you'll partner closely with Account Strategists, Project Managers, and cross-functional teams to help keep projects organized, client communication flowing, and creative work moving from brief to delivery. This is an ideal opportunity for someone early in their career who's eager to build a strong foundation in account management while making an immediate impact.<br><br><strong>Support Strong Client Relationships<br><br><\/strong>Assist the Account Strategist with day-to-day client communication by preparing meeting materials, drafting status updates, tracking action items, and helping ensure Strategy, designers, copywriters, and production teams to keep communication clear, projects moving, and priorities aligned.<br><br><strong>Learn and Grow Every Day<br><br><\/strong>Build your knowledge of creative production, client services, and enterprise marketing while taking on increasing ownership and responsibility as you grow.<br><br><strong>What You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll As we continue to expand across the United States and internationally, we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re looking for an ambitious digital leader to build the next chapter of our digital growth.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><br><\/p><p>The Opportunity<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>We are seeking an experienced Digital Marketing Manager to lead the digital marketing strategy across our entire portfolio of ordering and guest acquisition.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll work alongside our Senior Marketing Manager, Social Media Manager, creative team, agency partners and restaurant leadership leadership role suited to someone who loves combining creativity, technology and data to build best-in-class hospitality brands.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><br><\/p><p>Key retention and lifetime value.<\/p><p>Build annual digital marketing plans aligned with business objectives.<\/p><p>Identify emerging digital trends, technologies and opportunities.<\/p><p>Develop scalable systems to support future openings and expansion.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>Paid Media<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>Lead all paid advertising including:<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>ROAS<\/p><p>CAC<\/p><p>CPM<\/p><p>CPC<\/p><p>Conversion Rate<\/p><p>Revenue Generated<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>Website &amp; SEO<\/p><p><br><\/p><p>Own the digital experience More than 25 million U.S. seniors can no longer safely care for their feet, contributing to over $38 billion in avoidable medical costs each year.<br><br>Belle trains and deploys a network of Community Health Workers \u00e2\u0080\u0094 known as Belle Technicians \u00e2\u0080\u0094 to deliver in-home foot exams, preventive care, and care management. Backed by advanced data science, our care model detects emerging health risks early, often before they escalate. When issues arise, our telehealth team and nurses coordinate follow-up care and take action.<br><br>The result? Belle delivers clinical outcomes on par with blockbuster drugs, without a single pill. Our model helps prevent complications, reduce hospital visits, and improve quality of life \u00e2\u0080\u0094 all with care that people genuinely love.<br><br>Our mission: Bring Joy to Healthcare. Join us if our cause inspires you!<br><br><strong>About This Role<br><br><\/strong>As an Operations Supervisor in Atlanta, Georgia, you'll drive growth, build a strong team, and create community impact in your designated market. This role blends recruitment, market development, and operational excellence, ensuring seniors receive life-changing in-home care.<br><br>You'll be actively engaged in technician development, field shadowing, performance reviews, and issue resolution. You'll also collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to ensure every appointment is delivered with consistency, professionalism, and warmth.<br><br>You will also serve as the local face of the company \u00e2\u0080\u0094 building trust with your team, ensuring quality standards are met, and collaborating cross-functionally to help Belle scale successfully. You'll work mainly remote but need to be available in the service area to shadow the field and provide support.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><strong>Team Leadership &amp; Development<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Lead technician hiring and onboarding in partnership with centralized recruiting and training teams<\/li><li>Conduct field-based shadowing and provide real-time coaching<\/li><li>Facilitate technician check-ins and performance reviews<\/li><li>Support technicians in meeting certification and compliance requirements<\/li><li>Foster a connected and motivated team culture with ongoing engagement initiatives<\/li><li>Provide proactive coaching on hospitality, documentation, attendance, and professionalism<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Operational Oversight<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Monitor KPI's such as attendance, appointment fulfillment, and CSAT<\/li><li>Ensure proper execution of Belle's care model and scope of practice<\/li><li>Manage documentation audits and follow up on quality concerns<\/li><li>Track technician availability and support schedule optimization<\/li><li>Report safety concerns, policy violations, or compliance issues as needed<\/li><li>Collaborate with HR, Compliance, and Member Experience teams on escalations<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements<br><br><\/strong>Qualifications<br><br><ul><li>Bachelor's degree in Business, Healthcare, or a related field preferred<\/li><li>Prior experience managing a field-based or remote team (healthcare, retail, or service industries ideal)<\/li><li>Strong people leadership and coaching abilities<\/li><li>Highly organized, tech-savvy, and action-oriented<\/li><li>Excellent communication skills \u00e2\u0080\u0094 clear, direct, and compassionate<\/li><li>Familiarity with scheduling, attendance, or workforce tools is a plus<\/li><li>Resides in Atlanta, Georgia and able to travel locally to support CHWs in the field (15-25% guidelines, epidemiology data, and value dossier development.<br><br><strong>Position Responsibilities<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Conduct general secondary research activities such as review of clinical Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"","salary_min":80000,"salary_max":190000,"apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-senior-ai-engineer-architect-lemon-io-1134396","original":true,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-senior-ai-engineer-architect-lemon-io-1134396"},{"slug":"remote-full-stack-developer-first-uk-better-futures-multi-academy-trust-1134395","id":"1134395","epoch":1782993174,"date":"2026-07-02T11:52:54+00:00","company":"Better Futures Multi Academy Trust","company_logo":"","position":"Full Stack Developer first UK","tags":["dev","ruby","full stack","react native","mobile"],"description":"<p>\u00c2\u00a325,200\u00e2\u0080\u0093\u00c2\u00a330,000 (3 days per week, pro-rata from \u00c2\u00a342,000\u00e2\u0080\u0093\u00c2\u00a350,000 FTE)<br \/><br \/><\/p><p>Remote with UK Midlands in-person days | Better Futures Multi-Academy Trust\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><p>Most developer roles give you a stack to maintain. This one gives you a product to shape.\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><p>We are Better Futures Multi-Academy Trust, a group of sixth form colleges based in the UK Midlands. Inside the Trust, we are building two products that we believe can change how leadership development and student feedback work in education \u00e2\u0080\u0094 and beyond.\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><p>ARC is a 360-degree leadership platform that turns feedback into genuine behavioural change. Swaya is a student feedback app for iOS and Android. Both are live, both have paying clients, and both are at the point where the right developer can help take them from promising to powerful.\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><p>We are not a startup in a co-working space. We are a startup inside a well-resourced, stable organisation \u00e2\u0080\u0094 which means you get the creative freedom and product ownership of early-stage work, alongside the security, benefits, and backing of a public sector employer. It is an unusual combination, and we think it is a genuinely good one.\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><p><strong>What you will be doing<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><p>Taking ownership of ARC and Swaya \u00e2\u0080\u0094 their development, their quality, their roadmap. Working directly with the founders on product direction. Inheriting a solid Rails and React codebase and making it better. Managing iOS and Android app updates. Solving real UX problems. Shipping things that real users notice.\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><p><strong>What we are looking for<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><ul><li><p>Strong Ruby on Rails experience \u00e2\u0080\u0094 production, not just tutorials\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><\/li><li><p>React frontend skills and genuine care for UI\/UX quality\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><\/li><li><p>Mobile app experience: iOS and Android (React Native, Flutter, or native)\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><\/li><li><p>Someone who thinks in products, not just tickets\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><\/li><li><p>Comfortable with ambiguity, honest about what they do not know, and quick to learn\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><\/li><li><p>UK-based, with the right to work without sponsorship\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><\/li><\/ul><p><strong>What we offer<\/strong>\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><p><br \/><\/p><ol><li><p>0.6 FTE to start, with a clear path to full-time as the products grow\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><\/li><li><p>Flexible, remote-first working with occasional in-person days in the Midlands\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><\/li><li><p>Public sector pension and holiday entitlement\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><\/li><li><p>CPD budget and genuine encouragement to develop your skills\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><\/li><li><p>A front-row seat on two products that are going somewhere \u00e2\u0080\u0094 and a role in deciding where\u00c2\u00a0<\/p><\/li><\/ol><p><br \/><\/p><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **GRACIOUS** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Verifies and processes system invoices as well as requests for payment.<\/li><li>Process payment run including check, EFT, ACH, wire transfers and other source payments<\/li><li>Reconciling processed work by verifying entries and comparing system reports<\/li><li>Follow company processes, controls and policies<\/li><li>Create and act on month-end accounts payable reports<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong> WHAT YOU'LL LOVE ABOUT WORKING HERE:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>We recognize the significance of flexible work arrangements to provide support. We are currently supporting a major organization based in Birmingham, and this role will help build the tools used to visualize their corporate governance structures. You will translate the logic of our senior partners into functional, professional user interfaces.<br>  <br><strong>About Arabian Private Holdings<br><\/strong> Arabian Private Holdings was founded on the principle that many critical business problems do not fit the traditional large firm consulting model. A board facing a succession question or a family group weighing a capital injection does not need a team of twelve associates and a hundred page methodology deck. They need experienced partners who can sit with a problem, form a rigorous view, and defend it. We take on a limited number of mandates to ensure that every client receives direct attention from the principals who are actually accountable for the outcome. Our work covers corporate strategy, governance, and operating model efficiency for significant family groups and government entities. We operate as a fully remote firm, choosing to prioritize the quality of our analysis and the strength of our relationships over traditional office overhead.<br>  <br><strong>What you will do<\/strong><ul> <li>Develop responsive and clean user interface components using modern web technologies.<\/li> <li>Collaborate with firm principals to understand the data requirements for our Birmingham based client projects.<\/li> <li>Maintain a consistent visual language across all digital reports and internal analytical tools.<\/li> <li>Build and refine dashboards that help clients achieve portfolio clarity and understand complex data sets.<\/li> <li>Write clean, documented code that adheres to our internal standards for simplicity and reliability.<\/li> <li>Debug front end issues and ensure that our tools perform reliably across different browsers and devices.<\/li> <li>Help transform static operating model diagrams into interactive digital components.<\/li> <li>Participate in internal reviews to ensure that our software tools align with the professional tone of the firm.<\/li> <br><br><\/ul><strong>What we are looking for<\/strong><ul> <li>Foundational knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.<\/li> <li>A basic understanding of modern front end libraries, such as React or Vue, gained through studies or personal projects.<\/li> <li>The ability to explain technical concepts clearly and concisely in writing.<\/li> <li>A logical mindset that prioritizes functional clarity over unnecessary visual complexity.<\/li> <li>Attention to detail in layout, typography, and the way information is structured on a screen.<\/li> <li>A willingness to learn about corporate governance and holding company structures.<\/li> <br><br><\/ul><strong>How we work<br><\/strong> We operate as a global remote firm, which means our effectiveness relies on written precision and individual accountability. Without the distractions of a physical office, we focus our energy on solving complex problems for our clients. Mentorship happens through direct interaction on active mandates, where junior team members work closely with principals to understand how to form a view and defend it. We value honesty and directness. If a solution is not working or a design is too complicated, we address it immediately. This environment requires a high level of self discipline and a genuine interest in the intersection of engineering and corporate strategy.<br>  <br><strong>What the role offers<\/strong><ul> <li>A permanent, full time position within a principal led strategy firm.<\/li> <li>The flexibility of a fully remote work arrangement.<\/li> <li>Direct exposure to high level corporate strategy and governance projects.<\/li> <li>Competitive pay that is attractive for an entry level position in today's market.<\/li> <li>A professional environment where your work has a visible impact on client outcomes.<\/li> <li>Clear mentorship and a path to grow your technical skills within a specialized sector.<\/li><\/ul><br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **POSITIVELY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Birmingham, Birmingham, England, United Kingdom","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-junior-ui-engineer-arabian-private-holdings-1134413","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-junior-ui-engineer-arabian-private-holdings-1134413"},{"slug":"remote-selezione-pubblica-per-titoli-ed-esami-per-lassunzione-a-tempo-determinato-di-2-funzionari-profilo-economista-dipartimento-della-funzione-pubblica-1134465","id":"1134465","epoch":1782976547,"date":"2026-07-02T07:15:47+00:00","company":"Dipartimento della Funzione Pubblica","company_logo":"","position":"SELEZIONE PUBBLICA PER TITOLI ED ESAMI PER L\u00e2\u0080\u0099ASSUNZIONE A TEMPO DETERMINATO DI 2 FUNZIONARI PROFILO ECONOMISTA","tags":[],"description":"\u00c3\u0088 indetta una selezione pubblica, per valutazione dei titoli e per esami, finalizzata all\u00e2\u0080\u0099assunzione a<br><br>tempo determinato della durata di ventiquattro mesi, ai sensi dell\u00e2\u0080\u0099art. 2, comma 30, della legge 14<br><br>novembre 1995, n. 481, e dell\u00e2\u0080\u0099art. 18 del Regolamento sul trattamento giuridico ed economico<br><br>dell\u00e2\u0080\u0099Autorit\u00c3\u00a0 di regolazione dei trasporti (di seguito: Autorit\u00c3\u00a0), di n. 2 posti nel profilo di economista (cod. FE-TD).<br><br>Il trattamento economico annuo lordo attribuito a ciascun posto messo a selezione \u00c3\u00a8 quello previsto<br><br>per la qualifica di Funzionario III, livello 6, dalle tabelle stipendiali contenute nel vigente<br><br>Regolamento sul trattamento giuridico ed economico dell\u00e2\u0080\u0099Autorit\u00c3\u00a0.<br><br>Il contratto di lavoro a tempo determinato ha durata di ventiquattro mesi decorrenti dalla data di<br><br>effettiva presa di servizio. $98,651 per year, plus super.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What You Will Do<br><br><\/strong>As industry officer, you will help prisoners build work skills in prison industry areas.<br><br>You will support safe daily operations while meeting production and training goals.<br><br><strong>You Will<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>train and supervise prisoners in commercial and service industry work areas<\/li><li>maintain safe workplaces by following security, safety and operational procedures<\/li><li>monitor production, stock, records and equipment to support daily operations<\/li><li>coach prisoners to build practical skills and improve future employment opportunities<\/li><li>work with your team to improve processes, complete reports and meet production goals.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>About You<br><br><\/strong>A trade qualification or relevant experience in cabinet making, joinery, timber or metal fabrication is highly desirable. A current forklift licence is preferred.<br><br><strong>You Should Also Have<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>experience working in a trade or industrial setting while meeting production targets<\/li><li>knowledge of prison industry procedures or the ability to learn them quickly<\/li><li>understanding of Lean manufacturing principles and safe work practices<\/li><li>strong teamwork, resilience and communication skills with a focus on continuous improvement.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>To learn even more about this role, please read the position description.<br><br>If you have any further questions, feel free to email Paul Donald at paul.donald@justice.vic.gov.au.<br><br><strong>Aboriginal and\/or Torres Strait Islander (Aboriginal) people are strongly encouraged to apply. Learn more about our Aboriginal workforce strategy.<br><br><\/strong><strong>How To Apply<br><br><\/strong>Please click the Apply button on this advertisement. Applications should include a resume and covering letter. Attachments can be uploaded in .doc, .docx, .pdf, .txt or .rtf formats.<br><br>The successful candidate will be required to undergo pre-employment checks which may include national police checks and misconduct screening.<br><br>If you require adjustments to the recruitment and selection process, or require an alternative format to any of the application material, please don't hesitate to get in touch with the contact person listed on this ad.<br><br><strong>Important Information<br><br><\/strong><strong>Child safe statement of commitment<br><br><\/strong>The Department of Justice and Community Safety is committed to the safety and wellbeing of children and young people. We seek to prevent harm of any kind impacting children and young people and have zero tolerance for racism, child abuse and inequality. Children and young people's rights, relationships, identity, and culture must be recognised and respected, their voices heard, and their concerns acted upon. We aim to foster a culturally safe, child safe and child friendly environment for all children and young people we have contact with, deliver services to, or are impacted by our work.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **INTERESTING** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.","location":"Geelong, ","apply_url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-industry-officer-department-of-justice-and-community-safety-victoria-1134377","salary_min":0,"salary_max":0,"logo":"","url":"https:\/\/remoteOK.com\/remote-jobs\/remote-industry-officer-department-of-justice-and-community-safety-victoria-1134377"},{"slug":"remote-creative-the-elites-1134415","id":"1134415","epoch":1782952553,"date":"2026-07-02T00:35:53+00:00","company":"The Elites","company_logo":"","position":"Creative","tags":["design","react","consulting","technical","dev","web dev","javascript","css","html","exec","senior","junior","sys admin","engineer","digital nomad","teaching","education","customer support","copywriting","ops","travel","speech","video","finance","content writing","excel","golang","medical"],"description":"<strong>We are Wiser, <\/strong>a global, award-winning Employer Brand agency.<br><br>We build employer brands to guide the best in the biz into their dream career with our clients.<br><br>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re a home for people who think big and expect more. We transform a company\u00e2\u0080\u0099s employer brand internally and externally and change cultures from the ground up.<br><br>With creative, strategic and early talent experts in-house, our clients have a single partnership with Wiser and we deliver end to end campaigns helping them to attract and retain the best talent globally.<br><br>We believe that people will do their best work when they're in a space that enables it. And that's what we've shaped at Wiser - a culture where everyone can be real and back themselves, surrounded by high performers who take ownership of their career and make moves, no matter what their background.<br><br>To find out more about us, take a look at our website wearewiser.com<br><br>or check us out on Instagram @wearewiser.<br><br><strong>WHAT'S THE CRAIC WITH THE TEAM?<br><br><\/strong>Our creative team sit at the heart of Wiser, a group of generalists that can ideate, copywrite and art direct as the brief requires. They come up with our biggest ideas, and support our tactical campaigns. Taking research backed brand strategy and insights and making them into campaign concepts, film scripts and more that move candidates and employees to action.<br><br><strong>WHAT WILL YOU SPEND YOUR TIME DOING?<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll be responsible for creative outputs across our largest account: a US based media, telecoms and entertainment business working directly with our CCO<\/li><li>You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll be responsible for creative ideation, coming up with concepts that span social, campaigns, films and copy<\/li><li>You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll create topical content tapping into global events working at speed to stay ahead of cultural moments and trends<\/li><li>You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll digest and understand existing brand guidelines and develop our client\u00e2\u0080\u0099s corporate and employer brand over time through creative thinking, delivering projects to a standard that ignores the ordinary<\/li><li>You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll be the creative voice in the room, advocating for smart and brave creative that drives measurable results<\/li><li>You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll be able to translate results of campaigns and social engagement into best practice that drive our work forward<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>WHAT ARE WE LOOKING FOR?<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>4+ years of experience in a creative role in-house or within an agency<\/li><li>Experience working on a US based account<\/li><li>Strong ideation and copywriting skills<\/li><li>An ability to express big ideas in a simple way, and showcase ideas end to end<\/li><li>An understanding of building brands - from insights through to measurement<\/li><li>An interest in how people behave and what drives them<\/li><li>Flexibility to adapt to US working hours when needed<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU?<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>A Happiness team whose role is to make Wiser the best place to work possible. Whether it\u00e2\u0080\u0099s keeping the office stocked up with snacks, sending you a care package when you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re poorly, or planning the next Wiser party, they make the office a much happier place<\/li><li>A culture calendar full of options - from black tie to sports day, book club or run club, there\u00e2\u0080\u0099s something for everyone.<\/li><li>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re pretty proud of the space we have here - from phone booths to walking pads, all the way to a rainforest for focus-time\u00e2\u0080\u00a6 whatever vibe you need, you can find it here.<\/li><li>The W breakfast - our Happiness team makes sure everyone starts the day right with a hotel-worthy breakfast spread. Fancy coffee tap and unlimited fizzies on offer too.<\/li><li>On top of your holiday allowance, the office also closes for up to 2 weeks over the festive period so we can all recharge before coming back in the new year.<\/li><li>Wiser Bank Holiday - a beloved Purple People tradition in the form of an extra day off in October each year to celebrate our first ever million-pound-month (Yep, it happened in 2022 and we still celebrate)<\/li><li>Moving House Day - one of life\u00e2\u0080\u0099s most stressful events made easier by an extra day off.<\/li><li>Work from Anywhere - everyone has a number of days to work from home or wherever they fancy. Whether it\u00e2\u0080\u0099s staying home to snuggle your cat or working from Greece for a week in the summer, WFA is the answer.<\/li><li>Learning &amp; development - our monthly \u00e2\u0080\u0098Wiser Way\u00e2\u0080\u0099 days give you the chance to choose from a selection of training modules taught by our leaders. Whether it\u00e2\u0080\u0099s how to craft the perfect deck with our Creative Director, how to speak confidently about commercials with our CFO, or get some tips on managing for the first time with our Head of People, the schedule has something for everyone<\/li><li>Therapy - with 5 therapists to choose from, each year you can get up to x3 therapy sessions subsidised through Wiser to take either here in our own secret Log Cabin, externally or online (you pay \u00c2\u00a320 a session and we cover the rest)<\/li><li>Vitality Health Insurance - full coverage once you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ve passed probation. From necessities like the dentist, doctors and opticians, to mega rewards like Champneys, gym and travel discounts, it\u00e2\u0080\u0099s a winner.<\/li><li>Gymbox - once passing probation, you can access our exclusive Wiser x Gymbox partnership where you can bag your Gymbox membership for less than half price.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>The Road to Wiser...<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Apply (Go on...do it)<\/li><li> Intro call w\/ George or Mez on our Talent Team<\/li><li> Video call w\/ the hiring manager<\/li><li> Task &amp; Tour of our gaff<\/li><li> High Performance Offer Deck (HiPOD) w\/ our COO, Anna.<br><br><\/li><\/ul>At Wiser, we\u00e2\u0080\u0099re committed to fostering a culture where everyone feels empowered to be themselves and inspired to excel. We know that true creativity and innovation thrive when diversity is celebrated and everyone is given equal access to opportunities. That\u00e2\u0080\u0099s why we welcome applicants from all backgrounds, regardless of race, ethnicity, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, religion, ability, or socioeconomic status.<br><br>We believe that everyone should feel comfortable and be able to back themselves in an inclusive environment where individuality is celebrated. We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re building a team as diverse as the brands we work with, and our aim is to change the way people think about work.<br><br>If you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re passionate about making meaningful moves in an environment that\u00e2\u0080\u0099s as inclusive as it is high-performing, we can\u00e2\u0080\u0099t wait to see what you\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll bring to Wiser. Feel free to reach out to our Talent Team if you need any adjustments to make our hiring process more accessible.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **TRIUMPHANTLY** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). This position involves reviewing clinical system events, collaborating with internal teams, and ensuring adherence to state and federal regulations while maintaining corporate branding standards.<br>&nbsp;<br>This position is a <strong>100% remote<\/strong> role. It is a 6-month contract with the potential for extension.&nbsp;<br>&nbsp;<br><br><strong><u>Clinical Writer\/Editor&nbsp;Key Responsibilities:<\/u><\/strong><ul><li>Complete assigned correspondence tasks promptly and within designated timeframes. <\/li><li>Identify gaps in processes and provide actionable feedback to reduce errors and improve overall quality. <\/li><li>Review member and provider communications to ensure consistency with the clinical system (TruCare) and compliance with regulatory guidelines. <\/li><li>Audit and analyze correspondence to confirm accuracy with TruCare records and ensure the appropriate templates are utilized correctly. <\/li><li>Work closely with care managers, leadership, and peer reviewers to maintain compliance with regulatory-mandated communications. <\/li><li>Assess correspondence for accurate medical terminology and adherence to departmental policies and applicable regulations. <\/li><li>Support the organization in managing the lifecycle of correspondence, including creation, storage, secure retrieval, and proper archiving. <\/li><li>Maintain consistency in all correspondence by adhering to corporate branding standards. <\/li><li>Take on other responsibilities as assigned. <\/li><\/ul>&nbsp;<br><strong><u>Clinical Writer\/Editor Qualifications:<\/u><\/strong><ul><li>Possession of a high school diploma or equivalent (GED). <\/li><li>Exceptional skills in both written and verbal communication. <\/li><li>Strong abilities in organization and time management. <\/li><li>Ability to meet production targets of 35 letters per day and 200 letters per week. <\/li><li>Proven critical thinking and creative problem-solving capabilities. <\/li><li>Relevant professional experience within the healthcare industry. <\/li><li>An associate degree in a healthcare-related field is preferred. <\/li><li>Working knowledge of MS SharePoint. <\/li><li>Hands-on experience with Utilization Management, government healthcare programs, and managed care processes, including organizational determinations, approvals, denials, appeals, and grievances. <\/li><li>Adept at performing moderately complex communication tasks, with experience in training others and collaborating across teams. <\/li><li>Demonstrated adaptability to evolving tasks and a professional, objective approach to collaboration. <\/li><\/ul>&nbsp;<br>&nbsp;<br><strong><u>Clinical Writer\/Editor Pay Rate: <\/u><\/strong><ul><li>Starting at $25+\/HR&nbsp;<\/li><\/ul>&nbsp;<br><strong><u>Clinical Writer\/Editor We believe that by applying the highest standards of business ethics and creative thinking, everything is within our reach \u00e2\u0080\u0093 and yours as a Lockheed Martin employee. Lockheed Martin values your skills, training and education. Come and experience your future!<br><br><strong>THE WORK<br><br><\/strong>The Event Coordinator is responsible for end\u00e2\u0080\u0091to\u00e2\u0080\u0091end planning, resource allocation, and scheduling of NCRC Events and Cyber Table Tops (CTTs). The incumbent will assign personnel, manage physical resources, monitor capacity, mitigate over\u00e2\u0080\u0091utilization, and provide timely status reporting and risk notifications to the government customer. This role requires strong attention to detail, proactive risk management, and the ability to present clear reports to leadership.<br><br><strong>Who We Are<br><br><\/strong>Our customers are world-wide and so is our reputation for creating original solutions with the latest technologies. Our products keep our customers safe and bring them home to their families at night.<br><br>We provide the resources, inspiration, and focus - if you have the resourcefulness and perseverance to work hard, then we want to create a better tomorrow with you.<br><br><strong>Who You Are<br><br><\/strong>You thrive in a collaborative, multidisciplinary engineering environment and are committed to delivering best-in-class products and solutions.<br><br><strong>WHY JOIN US<br><br><\/strong>We believe that owning your career and having the freedom to make critical business decisions is key to making a real impact.<br><br>With the autonomy to use your skills and expertise in innovative ways, you can take on exciting challenges and help solve some of the world's most pressing problems.<br><br>#RMSPM<br><br><strong>Desired Skills<br><br><\/strong><ul><li> Exceptional attention to detail and organizational ability.<\/li><li> Strong analytical skills; comfortable working with spreadsheets and basic data analysis.<\/li><li> Excellent written and verbal communication; confident presenting to senior leadership and government stakeholders.<\/li><li> Proactive problem\u00e2\u0080\u0091solving mindset; ability to work independently and make decisions that mitigate risk.<\/li><li> Familiarity with project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Saviom, SharePoint) and reporting platforms (e.g., PowerBI, Tableau) is a plus.<\/li><li> Ability to thrive in a fully remote work setting; self\u00e2\u0080\u0091discipline and reliable internet connectivity.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Other Important Information<br><br><\/strong>By applying to this job, you are expressing interest in this position and could be considered for other career opportunities where similar skills and requirements have been identified as a match. Should this match be identified you may be contacted for this and future openings.<br><br><strong>Ability to work remotely<br><br><\/strong>Part-time Remote Telework: The employee selected for this position will work part of their work schedule remotely and part of their work schedule at a designated Lockheed Martin facility. The specific weekly schedule will be discussed during the hiring process.<br\/><br\/>Please mention the word **INNOCUOUS** and tag RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNDMuMjQ5LjIyNy4xNzA=). We encourage interested candidates to apply as soon as possible, as applications may no longer be accepted after the closing date<\/em>.<br><br><strong>What We Can Achieve Together<br><br><\/strong>The Social Media Coordinator plays a critical role in supporting the day-to-day execution of The Nature Conservancy\u00e2\u0080\u0099s flagship social media presence, helping cultivate and engage a global community connected by a shared love of nature. This role is responsible for daily publishing, supports light-lift content creation and facilitates community engagement across TNC\u00e2\u0080\u0099s primary social media channels, ensuring content is timely, strategic and optimized for each platform.<br><br>This role uses performance insights and platform best practices to inform publishing decisions and collaborates closely with marketing colleagues across the organization to source and prioritize content. Through thoughtful community management, this role helps strengthen TNC\u00e2\u0080\u0099s relationship with social audiences and advance the organization\u00e2\u0080\u0099s mission by encouraging awareness, engagement and action.<br><br><strong>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re Looking For You<br><br><\/strong>The Social Media Coordinator supports and executes daily social media activities across TNC\u00e2\u0080\u0099s flagship channels, including Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, Threads, Bluesky, YouTube and emerging platforms. The role fosters dialogue, builds community and supports organizational priorities by publishing platform-appropriate content provided by internal partners and engaging directly with followers through comments, replies and direct messages.<br><br>This position serves as a key point of coordination for social content, supporting the intake, preparation, editing and scheduling of assets contributed by teams across the organization. In addition, the role supports light\u00e2\u0080\u0091lift content creation associated with publishing\u00e2\u0080\u0094such as drafting copy and sourcing assets for timely social posts tied to media coverage, web and blog content, leadership activity or campaign moments. In partnership with the Social Media Strategist, this role maintains and updates the social media content calendar and publishing tools, continually adjusting posting cadence, timing and format based on performance data. The Social Media Coordinator also plays a supporting role in reinforcing best practices across TNC\u00e2\u0080\u0099s broader social media network.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities And Scope<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Supports day\u00e2\u0080\u0091to\u00e2\u0080\u0091day planning, scheduling and publishing of content across TNC\u00e2\u0080\u0099s flagship social media channels.<\/li><li>Maintains and updates the social media calendar, making real\u00e2\u0080\u0091time publishing decisions to respond to shifting priorities, cultural moments and performance insights.<\/li><li>Sources, organizes and edits content from internal stakeholders, marketing partners and existing TNC assets; identifies opportunities to repurpose or resurface high\u00e2\u0080\u0091performing content.<\/li><li>Supports light\u00e2\u0080\u0091lift content preparation related to social publishing, including drafting copy and sourcing assets as needed.<\/li><li>Plays a key role in coordinating social content across teams, ensuring assets from across the organization are prepared for publishing, properly tagged, tracked and scheduled for optimal performance.<\/li><li>Executes daily community management, including monitoring and responding to comments, replies and direct messages in alignment with brand voice and engagement guidelines.<\/li><li>Collaborates cross\u00e2\u0080\u0091functionally with internal teams to support campaigns, editorial priorities and timely organizational messaging.<\/li><li>Stays current on emerging social media trends, formats, tools and platform updates to inform experimentation and continuous improvement.<\/li><li>Uses social media management tools (e.g., Sprout Social, Canva, Asana) to support efficient workflow and execution.<\/li><li>Coordinates projects and completes assigned work within agreed\u00e2\u0080\u0091upon timelines, exercising sound judgment and independent decision making within established guidelines.<\/li><li>Occasional travel is required for business meetings and events, trainings, and\/or team retreats and meetings.<\/li><li>Requires occasional evening and weekend hours.<\/li><li>Other duties as assigned.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>What You\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll Bring<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Bachelor\u00e2\u0080\u0099s degree in related field and a minimum of 2 years\u00e2\u0080\u0099 related experience or equivalent combination of education and experience.<\/li><li>Experience organizing and coordinating projects.<\/li><li>Experience proofreading and editing business documents.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Desired Qualifications<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Experience proofreading and editing communications materials.<\/li><li>Interest in social media platforms, digital culture, trends and audience behavior.<\/li><li>Experience using social media management and analytics tools.<\/li><li>Knowledge of social media performance metrics.<\/li><li>Ability to collaborate cross\u00e2\u0080\u0091functionally and explain social media best practices to non\u00e2\u0080\u0091social partners.<\/li><li>Experience developing social media content.<\/li><li>Practical understanding of marketing and communications concepts.<\/li><li>Experience managing customer\/colleague relationships.<\/li><li>Highly motivated with strong organizational skills and attention to detail.<\/li><li>Experience supporting mission\u00e2\u0080\u0091driven or values\u00e2\u0080\u0091based organizations.<\/li><li>Multi-cultural or cross-cultural experience preferred.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Salary Information<br><br><\/strong>The starting pay range for a candidate selected for this position is generally within the range of <strong>$27.88 - $40.42 per hour.<\/strong> This range only applies to candidates whose country of employment is the USA. Where a successful candidate\u00e2\u0080\u0099s actual pay will fall within this range will be based on a variety of factors, including, for example, the candidate's location, qualifications, specific skills, and experience. Please note countries outside the USA would have a different pay range in the local currency based on the local labor market, and not tied to USA pay or ranges. Your geographic location will be confirmed during the recruitment.<br><br><strong>Who We Are<br><br><\/strong>The Nature Conservancy\u00e2\u0080\u0099s mission is to protect the lands and waters upon which all life depends. As a science-based organization, we create innovative, on-the-ground solutions to our world\u00e2\u0080\u0099s toughest challenges so that we can create a world in which people and nature thrive. We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re rooted in our mission and guided by our values, which include respect for all people, communities, and cultures. Whether it\u00e2\u0080\u0099s career development, flexible schedules, or a rewarding mission, there\u00e2\u0080\u0099s many reasons to love life inside TNC. Want a better insight to TNC? Check out our TNC Talent playlist on YouTube to hear stories from staff or visit Glassdoor.<br><br>One goal is to cultivate an inclusive work environment so that all our colleagues around the globe feel a sense of belonging and that their unique contributions to our mission are valued. In addition to the requirements in our job postings, we recognize that people come with talent and experiences outside of a job and consider each applicant\u00e2\u0080\u0099s unique experience. Please apply \u00e2\u0080\u0093 we\u00e2\u0080\u0099d love to hear from you. To quote a popular saying at TNC, \u00e2\u0080\u009cyou\u00e2\u0080\u0099ll join for the mission, and stay for the people.\u00e2\u0080\u009d<br><br><strong>What We Bring<br><br><\/strong>Since 1951, TNC has been doing work you can believe in. Through grassroots action, we have grown from a small non-profit into one of the most effective and wide-reaching environmental organizations in the world. Thanks to more than 1 million members, over 400 scientists, and the dedicated efforts of our diverse staff and partners, we impact conservation around the world!<br><br>TNC offers a competitive, comprehensive benefits package including health care benefits, flexible spending accounts, a 401(k) plan with an 8% employer match, parental leave, accrued paid time off, life insurance, disability coverage, employee assistance program, other life and work well-being benefits. Learn more about our Benefits and Perks here.<br><br>We\u00e2\u0080\u0099re proud to offer a flexible work environment that supports of the health and well-being of the people we employ.<br><br>Our recruiting process includes a rolling interview process to ensure we engage applicants in a timely manner. This means we may review applications in the order in which they are received. Once a strong candidate pool is identified, the role will be unposted. The timeline may vary depending on the expressed interest in the role, so we highly encourage candidates to apply as soon as possible.<br><br><strong>Employees must submit their application by logging into Workday and applying via the Jobs Hub.<br><br><\/strong><strong>The Nature Conservancy is an Equal Opportunity Employer.<\/strong> Our commitment to equal employment opportunity includes the recognition that our conservation mission is best advanced by the leadership and contributions of people of all backgrounds, beliefs, and culture. Recruiting and mentoring staff to create an inclusive organization is a priority, and we encourage applicants from all cultures, races, colors, religions, sexes, national or regional origins, ages, disability status, sexual orientation, gender identity, military, protected veteran status or other status protected by law.<br><br>The successful applicant must meet the requirements of The Nature Conservancy's background screening process.<br><br>Do you have military experience? Visit our U.S. Military Skills Translator to match your military experience with our current job openings!<br><br>TNC is committed to offering accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application process. This is a full-time, remote role.<\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>WHO WE ARE<\/strong><\/p><p><span>Our client is a leading creative technology agency that builds what's next. Since 2008, they have partnered with the world's most ambitious brands to transform breakthrough technology into extraordinary human experiences, delivering end-to-end digital transformation for companies including Google, Amazon, and Meta.<\/span><\/p><ul><li><span>Enterprise Digital: Architecting seamless digital ecosystems that simplify complexity and drive measurable impact<\/span><\/li><li><span>Product Innovation: Building scalable platforms and products that identify and seize emerging technology opportunities<\/span><\/li><li><span>Experiential\/Immersive: Creating cross-media experiences that blend digital, social, AI, and physical spaces<\/span><\/li><li><span>Applied AI: Transforming AI from a tool into the infrastructure for business evolution, powering smarter decision-making and game-changing innovation<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>THE ROLE<\/strong><\/p><p><span>Our client is seeking a highly organized, proactive, and tech-savvy Executive Assistant to provide comprehensive support to their leadership team. This person will primarily serve as the right-hand partner to the COO, with calendar and travel management support for the CEO and CTO. The ideal candidate is fully self-sufficient, thinks ahead before being asked, and clears obstacles before they become problems.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE<\/strong><\/p><p><span>This role has seen turnover due to a lack of proactivity and self-direction. The person who thrives here does not wait to be told what to do. They anticipate needs, own their work end-to-end, and bring calm, organized energy to a fast-paced leadership team. Thick skin and a low-ego approach to supporting executives is essential.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>EXECUTIVE SUPPORT<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Proactively manage complex calendars and schedule meetings across multiple time zones for the CEO, CTO, and COO<\/span><\/li><li><span>Serve as a true right-hand partner to the COO, anticipating needs and removing obstacles before they arise<\/span><\/li><li><span>Act as a central communication hub across email, Slack, and shared calendars<\/span><\/li><li><span>Leverage AI-powered tools (Superhuman, Fyxer, or similar) to draft, refine, and manage email correspondence efficiently<\/span><\/li><li><span>Process and oversee expense reports within our ERP, including receipt forwarding and inbox rules for streamlined submission<\/span><\/li><li><span>Manage all aspects of domestic and occasional international travel, including flights, accommodations, and ground transportation (note: travel for this role is minimal, with one annual team gathering in Los Angeles)<\/span><\/li><li><span>Prepare and edit professional communications, presentations, and documents with exceptional attention to detail<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>PROJECT AND TASK MANAGEMENT<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Take full ownership of assigned tasks and projects, driving them to completion with minimal oversight<\/span><\/li><li><span>Manage and prioritize a fluctuating workload, surfacing urgent items to leadership proactively<\/span><\/li><li><span>Maintain comprehensive to-do lists for executives, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks<\/span><\/li><li><span>Lead special projects as needed, such as auditing projects on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and coordinating across teams to gather and consolidate information<\/span><\/li><li><span>Conduct focused research to support strategic initiatives, including emerging areas like prompt engineering and AI tooling<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>GENERAL ADMINISTRATION<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Monitor executive inboxes, flag urgent items, and ensure timely responses<\/span><\/li><li><span>Provide comprehensive administrative support to maintain smooth daily operations<\/span><\/li><li><span>Assist with the coordination of company events and People Operations logistics<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>WHAT YOU WILL NEED TO SUCCEED<\/strong><\/p><ul><li><span>Proven experience supporting multiple executives in a fast-paced, high-accountability environment<\/span><\/li><li><span>Exceptional organizational skills with the ability to prioritize effectively and meet deadlines without hand-holding<\/span><\/li><li><span>Native proficiency with AI-powered tools (Superhuman, Fyxer, or similar) to multiply your own efficiency<\/span><\/li><li><span>Advanced expertise in calendar management and meeting scheduling across platforms<\/span><\/li><li><span>Experience with enterprise expense systems, preferably Maconomy<\/span><\/li><li><span>Advanced proficiency in Google Workspace<\/span><\/li><li><span>Excellent written and verbal communication skills with a sharp eye for detail<\/span><\/li><li><span>Proactive, resourceful problem-solver with a strong sense of ownership and accountability<\/span><\/li><li><span>Ability to handle highly confidential information with discretion and professionalism<\/span><\/li><li><span>Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to build trust quickly with diverse stakeholders<\/span><\/li><li><span>Travel booking and itinerary management experience<\/span><\/li><\/ul><p><br><\/p><p><strong>EQUIPMENT<\/strong><\/p><p><span>Left Field Labs will provide a MacBook. This is a fully remote role with core hours aligned to Pacific Time, Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>OUR VALUES<\/strong><\/p><p><span>We hire for skill and retain for culture. The person who thrives here will see themselves in these commitments:<\/span><\/p><p><strong>Empathetic&nbsp; <\/strong><span>We seek to understand and share perspectives to have the most impact.<\/span><\/p><p><strong>Authentic&nbsp; <\/strong><span>We are honest and candid with one another.<\/span><\/p><p><strong>Relentless&nbsp; <\/strong><span>We step up to challenges and prioritize action.<\/span><\/p><p><strong>Do the Right Thing&nbsp; <\/strong><span>We fight for what's right to achieve our goals.<\/span><\/p><p><strong>Voracious Learners&nbsp; <\/strong><span>We have an insatiable appetite to learn, grow, and evolve.<\/span><\/p><p><br><\/p><p><strong>COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS<\/strong><\/p><p><span>The hourly range for this role is $32.00 to $45.00, dependent on experience, qualifications, and geographic location. develop machine learning models and predictive analytics solutions using data sourced from Snowflake<\/li><li>Perform data exploration, statistical analysis, and feature engineering to support AI initiatives<\/li><li>Collaborate with data engineering teams to ensure robust data pipelines<\/li><li>Contribute to the development of AI-driven tools and frameworks within the engineering<\/li><li>Update training, and documentation<\/li><li>Deliver user training to operating groups as required<\/li><li>Other duties as assigned<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>WHAT YOU NEED TO BE SUCCESSFUL:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Post-secondary education in a Business or STEM field, or an equivalent combination of education and relevant work experience<\/li><li>Any combination of training SQL (preferably in Snowflake), Python, and PowerBi<\/li><li>Solid understanding of machine learning algorithms, model evaluation, and AI workflows<\/li><li>Experience building end to end models and integrating them into business processes<\/li><li>Deep knowledge of data warehousing concepts and cloud-based data platforms (Snowflake and Fabric preferred)<br><br><\/li><\/ul>Wage Range: $80,000 - $95,000<br><br><strong>WHY JOIN OUR TEAM:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Competitive Wages<\/li><li>Extended Health Benefits<\/li><li>Paid Holidays<\/li><li>Pension Plan<\/li><li>A continuous learning environment<\/li><li>Ability to advance your career with a growing company<\/li><li>Ongoing employee development through a variety of in-house training initiatives along with tuition subsidies for courses at outside institutions<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>OUR WHY: <br><br><\/strong>We exist to move people. Our mission is to design and deliver exceptional transportation solutions that are safe, accessible, e\u00c2\u00adfficient and reliable.<br><br><strong>NFI Group<\/strong> is a leading independent global bus manufacturer providing a comprehensive suite of mass transportation solutions. In this position, your work will have a profound impact on the country\u00e2\u0080\u0099s most critical role \u00e2\u0080\u0093 protecting our national security.<br><br><strong>Why Join Us?<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Innovative Projects: KBR\u00e2\u0080\u0099s work is at the forefront of engineering, logistics, operations, science, program management, mission IT and cybersecurity solutions.<\/li><li>Collaborative Environment: Be part of a dynamic team that thrives on collaboration and innovation, fostering a supportive and intellectually stimulating workplace.<\/li><li>Impactful Work: Your contributions will be pivotal in designing and optimizing defense systems that ensure national security and shape the future of space defense.<br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>This is a contingent position based upon contract award<br><br><\/strong><strong><em>Who We Are<br><br>KBR Government Solutions <\/em><\/strong>delivers full life cycle professional and technical solutions that improve operational readiness and drive innovation. Our solutions help ensure mission success on land, air, sea, space and cyberspace for the Department of Defense, Intelligence Community, NASA and other federal agencies. KBR\u00e2\u0080\u0099s areas of expertise include engineering, logistics, operations, science, program management, mission IT and cybersecurity. KBR strives to create a safer, more secure and sustainable world by bringing together the best and brightest to deliver technologies and solutions that help our customers accomplish their most critical missions and objectives.<br><br><strong><em>The Mission Ahead<br><br><\/em><\/strong>This role is with KBR\u00e2\u0080\u0099s Government Solutions U.S. division. At KBR Government Solutions, we don't just envision a world that's safer, more secure, and sustainable - we create it. Our legacy of delivering advanced full life cycle professional and technical solutions is matched only by our commitment to operational readiness and innovation. As stewards of critical missions for the Department of Defense, Intelligence Community, NASA, and other key federal entities, we excel in engineering, logistics, operations, science, program management, mission IT, and cybersecurity. United in our quest for excellence, KBR stands at the vanguard, ready to transform possibilities into impactful realities for a better tomorrow.<br><br><strong>Who You Are<br><br><\/strong>You\u00e2\u0080\u0099re a dependable and hardworking Custodian with a strong commitment to maintaining clean, safe, and well-organized environments. Skilled in performing routine cleaning tasks, managing supplies, and addressing maintenance needs, you take pride in ensuring spaces are welcoming and functional. Your attention to detail, efficiency, and adherence to safety protocols make you a trusted professional in your field.<br><br>At KBR, you bring dedication, reliability, and a positive attitude to every task. Known for your ability to work independently and as part of a team, you play an essential role in creating environments that support operational success. Your commitment to excellence aligns with KBR\u00e2\u0080\u0099s mission of delivering innovative and reliable solutions for critical operations.<br><br><strong>What You'll Do<br><br><\/strong><strong>In the role of <\/strong><strong>Custodian<\/strong><strong>, your duties will include:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Maintains adequate materials, supplies and equipment to work locations, replenishing inventory as needed. <\/li><li>May perform a wide range of clean-up and housekeeping activities as needed. <\/li><li>Observes, follows, and enforces all safety rules and procedures, including wearing required personal safety equipment. <\/li><li>Performs other duties and activities as directed by facility management or others. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Requirements:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Must be a US or Australian citizen<\/li><li>Must Possess an active US Top Secret\/SCI or AUS PV Clearance.<\/li><li>Requires High School graduation or equivalent and 5 years of janitorial or housekeeping experience. <br><br><\/li><\/ul><strong>Desired Qualifications:<br><br><\/strong><ul><li>Certificate in Health Support Services<\/li><li>Certificate Hospitality<\/li><li>Possess a Driver's license<\/li><li>White Card<\/li><li>Hygiene (Food Handling)<\/li><li>Health Safety Representative Training<br><br><\/li><\/ul>This role will be located in Alice Springs, at a 4,400-acre facility with approximately 687,000 square feet of mission and support space. <em>This position is expected to be onsite 100%.<br><br><\/em><strong>Ready to Make a Difference?<br><br><\/strong>If you\u00e2\u0080\u0099re excited about making a significant impact in the field of space defense and working on projects that matter, we encourage you to apply and join our team at KBR.
